body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from the Kiggans for Congress, click here My name is Jen Kiggans, and I want to tell you a little bit about myself and why I’m the Democrats #1 target. Last year, I defeated a liberal Democrat in one of the closest elections in the entire country to help Republicans retake the House of Representatives. They are already spending big bucks to try and defeat me, so I wanted to see if you would be willing to support our campaign. But first, I wanted to tell you a little about myself and what led me to run for Congress in the first place. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=c85b3b8333bb92f413a1e8fe670b31146ade523bc0ef32c5da0db0c5a6d515257a54516424032850069757ca668e005f7e60abe0d058e9904e8915b8ff863801 That photo above is me and my husband, Steve. He is a retired F-18 pilot, and I’m a proud Navy wife and mother to four amazing children. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=c85b3b8333bb92f413a1e8fe670b31146ade523bc0ef32c5da0db0c5a6d515257a54516424032850069757ca668e005f7e60abe0d058e9904e8915b8ff863801 I also served in the Navy. That photo above is my helicopter with my call sign on it - “Blossom.” I was winged as a naval aviator in 1995 and served our nation for a total of 10 years as a helicopter pilot flying H-46 and H-3 helicopters, completing two deployments to the Persian Gulf. After serving in the Navy, I used my GI Bill benefits to go back to school and become a Geriatric Nurse Practitioner. It was an honor to care for our Greatest Generation, and I helped them fight the system to get the healthcare they deserve. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=c85b3b8333bb92f413a1e8fe670b31146ade523bc0ef32c5da0db0c5a6d515257a54516424032850069757ca668e005f7e60abe0d058e9904e8915b8ff863801 Over time, I got frustrated watching the evening news and just hearing about all the dysfunction and radical agendas in our government. But I’m not one to just complain about problems. I like to solve them. So I got off my couch, and I ran for office. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=c85b3b8333bb92f413a1e8fe670b31146ade523bc0ef32c5da0db0c5a6d515257a54516424032850069757ca668e005f7e60abe0d058e9904e8915b8ff863801 I served three sessions in the Virginia State Senate, where I used my real-world experience to actually solve problems. I was proud to champion legislation to promote election security, establish a Military Spouse Liaison, and advocate for patients, families, and caregivers in long-term care facilities. Eventually, I realized a lot of the problems facing my family, our neighbors, and our community were actually coming from Washington. We were represented by a Democrat who voted with Nancy Pelosi 99% of the time, and I felt we needed a representative who would actually put our values and community first. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=c85b3b8333bb92f413a1e8fe670b31146ade523bc0ef32c5da0db0c5a6d515257a54516424032850069757ca668e005f7e60abe0d058e9904e8915b8ff863801 So, I once again decided to stop complaining and actually do something about it. So I ran for Congress! When I commit to something, I give it my all, and that’s what we did with the campaign. We were up against a lot. National Democrats poured over $10 million into my opponent’s campaign, and big money PACs spent even more attacking me. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=c85b3b8333bb92f413a1e8fe670b31146ade523bc0ef32c5da0db0c5a6d515257a54516424032850069757ca668e005f7e60abe0d058e9904e8915b8ff863801 But, we stayed focused on the task at hand and never lost sight of why I was running. On Election Night, we won by about 10,000 votes in one of the closest races in the entire nation. And in Congress, we’ve already been able to make a big impact. We are standing up for veterans, parents, taxpayers, and hard-working Americans. We’re making good progress, but the work is just getting started. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=c85b3b8333bb92f413a1e8fe670b31146ade523bc0ef32c5da0db0c5a6d515257a54516424032850069757ca668e005f7e60abe0d058e9904e8915b8ff863801 But the Democrats and their deep pocket donors are already setting out to defeat me. The Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee has announced my seat is one of their top targets in 2024, so I’m hoping you will donate today to help our campaign start strong. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=c85b3b8333bb92f413a1e8fe670b31146ade523bc0ef32c5da0db0c5a6d515257a54516424032850069757ca668e005f7e60abe0d058e9904e8915b8ff863801 KEEP JEN IN THE FIGHT If you want to see more regular, everyday citizens in office instead of career politicians, then I need your urgent help. Can you spare anything to help me defeat the Democrats in this #1 Battleground race? I can’t stand sending messages like this. Sometimes I wonder what would have happened if I never got off the couch and ran for office…but then I remember that America is always worth protecting…no matter what! Thanks for reading my message. I hope I was able to earn your support. https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=c85b3b8333bb92f413a1e8fe670b31146ade523bc0ef32c5da0db0c5a6d515257a54516424032850069757ca668e005f7e60abe0d058e9904e8915b8ff863801 DONATE NOW -Jen To ensure you are receiving emails from Kiggans for Congress with minimum to no interruption, please add mailto:info@contact.jenforcongress.com info@contact.jenforcongress.com to your safe sender list, for instructions on how to add a contact, please click https://click.contact.jenforcongress.com/?qs=c85b3b8333bb92f4b63f198b29325939359d5ce05e31eabdec2e87e6d4d7de6c233d92ef6385047d4049e43f4bc38327f1e326f6a56e6399a06a0509df8f7cb8 here . name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpeeu85389rpgo30o22qa2rtj072p4ktn20gvnlg_rp22sh2s8i66p74c3j61o32cph2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuiq3ejeld1d146vjsiq04af3scvjgenfkhbo68g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c3j61o32cph2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcm2t7g31i238r3ijru758bnpshu91ir8i2lo3d0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c3j61o32cph2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhcfj6a1m8r8a8lcd8jltmecomkdd90nomd04v68_rp22sh2s8i66p74c3j61o32cph2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

name: American Update
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing.

| **Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America** Machines like the ones in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664658%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7GgfvbfAP26DAN6fODOXUg&sysid=1) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a **'Reverse ATM'** They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? We’ve recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, **[Dr. Prins explained these strange ‘reverse ATMs.’](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664659%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OjTVhMsOx9Jk0K%2fam2p1qQ&sysid=1)** And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and **how much time you have to prepare.** **[Click here now to see Dr. Prins’ free presentation.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664650%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JjF1oBVL5RNiR0Qql%2fNl4g&sysid=1)**

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb3tdc67pm701h9gj908i5hoa8t30m53h7nli6l0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c3gm8or1cdh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zaqscioeet0p4vu4e6j24s7ll9qrru3o2iapd5og_rp22sh2s8i66p74c3gm8or1cdh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znt536gold0oc37275l93boqc03prd5e22hmult0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c3gm8or1cdh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zi5b1hille6abq8668pbpbk3vjh3s0hjq9sgg83g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c3gmaoj1cdh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztt32qotbikjsf830iaaoipljn7dn28j4a1lfl5g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c3gmaoj1cdh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkrgnf2np2jf09nh4c2qoeaqm4po950mfevj509g_rp22sh2s8i66p74c3gmaoj1cdh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3oiku918241fh5i7ag4irbvphvq9ftavtcb9ca0_rp22sh2s8i66p74c3gmaoj1cdh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Your America
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20359%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fHy1TiGjUdwqcezVK21xag&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20350%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AaSgaj3cYmwIs7fK4d4KxA&sysid=1).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20351%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K15RDgjfVIzCg8bZfDUe1Q&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20352%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JXlTH9vVxVTj%2bWjGA7FeOg&sysid=1) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It’s a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can’t just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION --to DO SOMETHING about it, while there’s still time to save our country. **

That is why I’m writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of “We the People”--before it’s too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20353%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3a3tieedoojA%2bWdkEElcjg&sysid=1)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_

subject: One of the hardest things I’ve ever had to write...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
Lauren Boebert is a fighter that stood by my father when it mattered.

| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeqa5ro3ut6tqeatjlnq2u9k2teabop3nagl5f20_rp22sh2s8i66p74c3gmaoj1cdh2bs)
---
| | | Lauren Boebert is a fighter that **stood by my father when it mattered.**

That’s why this is the hardest email I’ve had to write in a long time...

Friend, I know you care about the MAGA agenda. Lauren has been unrelenting in supporting and defending that agenda. She’s taken the hits for it, and her Soros-backed challenger has closed the gap so much that **_her race was just declared a “Toss up.”_**

I’m looking at the numbers... and **Lauren Boebert may lose her seat.** **_We can stop this from happening. I am asking everyone reading this email to join me in contributing whatever they can and save Lauren Boebert from defeat._**
---
| | | [STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsjs7bl02fkrmmdc7p4aqqd5ljcml2eip07omomg_rp22sh2s8i66p74c3gmaoj1cdh2bs "STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN")
---
| Let’s just start with the facts.

**>** Last year, her opponent **lost by only 546 votes** after a lengthy recount.

**>** This year, he’s **outraised Lauren 3 to 1** , and she’s in danger of falling too far behind.

**>** If this trend continues, Soros will have punished **one of the strongest voices defending my father** and the American way next year. [**_I am begging every Patriot who loves this country to step up and defend Lauren Boebert. Her record speaks for itself–she had our back and now we MUST have her back. _**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr51q5dl9fufqmjhpen3ur6ic6cmrdi6atfmph98_rp22sh2s8i66p74c3gmaoj1cdh2bs)

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3cc4q7nbsaa49t6vk7ldonpr9n739h4ihir9b4o_rp22sh2s8i66p74c3gmep70cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z1397toqvs42dt3co7guquhe5kh6gj5dephs4jfg_rp22sh2s8i66p74c3gmep70cjh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkrl3nvrt0ppm3ftonqf3kkq70ukrspruo0j6pt8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c3gmep70cjh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Pro Life Update

name: Chloe Cole
subject: Help me stop the radical gender surgeries on children
body:
There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out

| |
---
| | Dear Friend, My name is Chloe. You don't know me but I'm hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson. There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out, so I'm so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest. I guess I'm what you'd call a "cautionary tale." You see, I'm one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. [**Even though we don 't know each other, I'm writing you today hoping you'll help me stop the** **horror of what happened to me, from happening to other children and their parents.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36073a4597364d65b7b928e1c330a26e&_e=y08l4QDgzr8ByxfuGichAGAUYtmH4XYNM4o38yq4ZNYQY-eFAo9bGWgqynjfyQFqdYg0m-SNi_NLum4F7ExPT9JZUb5rI-Fo6jYKsH-IBVPscG1Tp1JNbnY95HcxZcWhpS5VM3yjfCBIFYmmpo-RiL5Bs6FJsuBRtBoP99hjgjjCMnjpYx3IZyWHkeTTe0KjVzC6TiB0oYrejTyx-ibfvK5dLdJ55bhgEDFVHW5MHPwlYhwaskaTS7KnfqiuLQOy-rNbyk5CmR3Cqd_N13GNcOUhAgYYfMxbLscBrZTiG2WMJtgcEbAlul0rcrjqOuA4_Q13aV3vhIcOPohZ5H-vfITgw8A1aqCu_OgJcZAnux0%3D) It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing. I was also shy and didn't socialize easily - and I didn't feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents. But I found 'friends' on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body. And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me. I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I'd be valued and loved even more. Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender. They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to "experts" who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide. **The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: "Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?" ** Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant "saving" me. When they signed those forms, it wasn't informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress. And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. [**Will you help me fight so these radical doctors and hospitals can 't prey on another scared, confused, lonely child like they did me?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36073a4597364d65b7b928e1c330a26e&_e=y08l4QDgzr8ByxfuGichAGAUYtmH4XYNM4o38yq4ZNYQY-eFAo9bGWgqynjfyQFqdYg0m-SNi_NLum4F7ExPT9JZUb5rI-Fo6jYKsH-IBVPscG1Tp1JNbnY95HcxZcWhpS5VM3yjfCBIFYmmpo-RiL5Bs6FJsuBRtBoP99hjgjjCMnjpYx3IZyWHkeTTe0KjVzC6TiB0oYrejTyx-ibfvLRVZTeL5zdMhIPZPPwfP6S5L4v4LS6y2jlXEBGbWF6-nfVLpFWcl1aNKunSb-aKIUs8M6Y-jWO3JhQ6hLllGiaCkPb2jiKL_RUS1--VJ0YrA6izjgVw3uubtJ_8KfniSIo-V5XqhF_Lyl-vUN05PjU%3D) The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders... ...and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy. I was fifteen years old. And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused. If you're like most people I tell my story to... right about now you're probably thinking, "HOW did it ever get this far?" And the answer is simple. The "experts" lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way. They claimed I would never get "better" unless I medically transitioned - when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they're transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body... ...while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks. They never told us that there isn't one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts. When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars. At age 18, I'm just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I'll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man's, my body will look like a boy's, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner. And my parents feel like they've failed me on every level imaginable. I can't go back. I can't change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical "experts." [**And YOU can help me.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36073a4597364d65b7b928e1c330a26e&_e=y08l4QDgzr8ByxfuGichAGAUYtmH4XYNM4o38yq4ZNYQY-eFAo9bGWgqynjfyQFqdYg0m-SNi_NLum4F7ExPT9JZUb5rI-Fo6jYKsH-IBVPscG1Tp1JNbnY95HcxZcWhpS5VM3yjfCBIFYmmpo-RiL5Bs6FJsuBRtBoP99hjgjjCMnjpYx3IZyWHkeTTe0KjVzC6TiB0oYrejTyx-ibfvNUSMm50V1RN_3olsKLUsqWtFzllCeNcy0YdBJbJ3QNQWgLXJB99QdYCk1zlcbXMjCAF8V2opsRspfJbIKOmipotPbBKn1M-pp-7_fP6pRftvk4jZXkyuMQGIi2gNwkhunkrE70lpr8qjvttOB8Cw_o%3D) More and more children are mutilated and abused every day. **There 's even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in. ** And it won't stop until someone fights back. When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I'd seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn't know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn't even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face! Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty. And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn't felt in a long time -- hope. Because Harmeet is a fighter like me. She didn't tell me we'd never win against the giant medical industry. She didn't tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch. She told me my fight mattered. Not only because of what had happened to me -- but also because we could STOP it from happening to other children. And so together with Harmeet Dhillon's non-profit -- the Center for American Liberty -- I've launched a case against the radical doctors and hospital who preyed on me... ...and who continue to prey on children -- maybe even in your family. As I've mentioned several times -- I'm 18-years-old. On my own, I'd never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this. That's one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don't have the money to fight them in court. But that's exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what's right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn. Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like:
---
| |
* _Brach v. Newsom_ \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools...
* _Ngo v. Roce City Antifa_ \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING...
* _O 'Handley v. Padilla_ \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with...
* And now my case... _Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente_.

---
The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn't mean they have the big money that their opponents have. [**That 's why I hope you'll consider helping us by rushing back a small tax-deductible donation of $25 or more. **](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36073a4597364d65b7b928e1c330a26e&_e=y08l4QDgzr8ByxfuGichAGAUYtmH4XYNM4o38yq4ZNYQY-eFAo9bGWgqynjfyQFqdYg0m-SNi_NLum4F7ExPT9JZUb5rI-Fo6jYKsH-IBVPscG1Tp1JNbnY95HcxZcWhpS5VM3yjfCBIFYmmpo-RiL5Bs6FJsuBRtBoP99hjgjjCMnjpYx3IZyWHkeTTe0KjVzC6TiB0oYrejTyx-ibfvFGfxYtY2GF1RuHMzFcbgKxvACDUgCSva-9vzqSvVH37P5dJP4MCx1r56ZSV2OyfKW-24did8xWIuj4r18Mlmeg38MhJHIaWNtXWrGuuG-yOtC7jmA3BzykaJlF_KXg49bRTem0qyh2lnCOxBypjEAc%3D) There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt. Alone we're no match for them. [**But if everyone I 'm writing to can contribute just $25, or if you're able, maybe more -- $35, $50, $75, $100, $200, or even $500**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36073a4597364d65b7b928e1c330a26e&_e=y08l4QDgzr8ByxfuGichAGAUYtmH4XYNM4o38yq4ZNYQY-eFAo9bGWgqynjfyQFqdYg0m-SNi_NLum4F7ExPT9JZUb5rI-Fo6jYKsH-IBVPscG1Tp1JNbnY95HcxZcWhpS5VM3yjfCBIFYmmpo-RiL5Bs6FJsuBRtBoP99hjgjjCMnjpYx3IZyWHkeTTe0KjVzC6TiB0oYrejTyx-ibfvJmNVObzNl4MLSh3IdblUeEPvNeQLbxEAJxuxiw1IgOVp6qsyOPER-yN4z8NFh4Yqd7kNbyXbRKkCGTZEFrD7PD9KfZkyP37Ona_mbd-mUJwkHXAdTjiZqJZUcHCyWyuZbfO-iOOF5_tn6TKTiQLsas%3D), we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I've been called a "liar." I've even been told de-transitioners like me don't exist. But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say: **_" You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. I exist."_** Thank you for reading this letter from a complete stranger. I hope I can call you a friend now. And thank you for whatever help you can send to the Center for American Liberty. **[Whether it's $25, $35, $50, $75, $100, $200, or even $500 or more...](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=36073a4597364d65b7b928e1c330a26e&_e=y08l4QDgzr8ByxfuGichAGAUYtmH4XYNM4o38yq4ZNYQY-eFAo9bGWgqynjfyQFqdYg0m-SNi_NLum4F7ExPT9JZUb5rI-Fo6jYKsH-IBVPscG1Tp1JNbnY95HcxZcWhpS5VM3yjfCBIFYmmpo-RiL5Bs6FJsuBRtBoP99hjgjjCMnjpYx3IZyWHkeTTe0KjVzC6TiB0oYrejTyx-ibfvOc6O5PL6M2-dThAtOwAsBMLklhCXUGDvEFnqEWNNFZDRc1sLBACuMtnBDIdz-0kSzSw7u84px1qgZql_x6KVRxvpZufAz3lbO-u05EIIhCchasLGr8BxWOjwfDP5jZyOGYGj40U5HaTSyQRhIELbD8%3D)** every bit moves us closer to stopping these monsters.
---
| | Thank you, Chloe Cole

clean_body: There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out | | | | Dear Friend, My name is Chloe. You don't know me but I'm hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson. There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out, so I'm so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest. I guess I'm what you'd call a "cautionary tale." You see, I'm one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing. I was also shy and didn't socialize easily - and I didn't feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents. But I found 'friends' on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body. And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me. I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I'd be valued and loved even more. Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender. They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to "experts" who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide. The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: "Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?" Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant "saving" me. When they signed those forms, it wasn't informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress. And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders... ...and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy. I was fifteen years old. And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused. If you're like most people I tell my story to... right about now you're probably thinking, "HOW did it ever get this far?" And the answer is simple. The "experts" lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way. They claimed I would never get "better" unless I medically transitioned - when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they're transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body... ...while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks. They never told us that there isn't one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts. When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars. At age 18, I'm just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I'll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man's, my body will look like a boy's, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner. And my parents feel like they've failed me on every level imaginable. I can't go back. I can't change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical "experts." More and more children are mutilated and abused every day. There 's even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in. And it won't stop until someone fights back. When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I'd seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn't know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn't even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face! Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty. And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn't felt in a long time -- hope. Because Harmeet is a fighter like me. She didn't tell me we'd never win against the giant medical industry. She didn't tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch. She told me my fight mattered. Not only because of what had happened to me -- but also because we could STOP it from happening to other children. And so together with Harmeet Dhillon's non-profit -- the Center for American Liberty -- I've launched a case against the radical doctors and hospital who preyed on me... ...and who continue to prey on children -- maybe even in your family. As I've mentioned several times -- I'm 18-years-old. On my own, I'd never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this. That's one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don't have the money to fight them in court. But that's exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what's right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn. Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like: | | Brach v. Newsom \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools... Ngo v. Roce City Antifa \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING... O 'Handley v. Padilla \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with... And now my case... Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente. The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn't mean they have the big money that their opponents have. There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt. Alone we're no match for them. , we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I've been called a "liar." I've even been told de-transitioners like me don't exist. But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say: " You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. I exist." Thank you for reading this letter from a complete stranger. I hope I can call you a friend now. And thank you for whatever help you can send to the Center for American Liberty. every bit moves us closer to stopping these monsters. | | Thank you, Chloe Cole | | | | P.S. This is a photo of me now. It's been a long, painful road but I'm finding happiness and purpose as I fight to make sure what happened to me NEVER happens to another child. Thank you so much for your help. -Chloe | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc80cbd8b08d4dfd818f8efd2669d0b7&_e=9F8I82ISHPMRxMjFofsgRKb7rOzCySO7TI2w7Y-is7atp5hvr1tdxZKH843qFH1VvXVIRw79HGK4M_h-6sCiDuf73dtM3XnO98643ZVYGG_JpMwWDOMQqlLEwEZGt75oSAR97Ep9pF5For4BDkldvI7gt2kaaJIURXTyz8PH1B_Ot5dKoBbvTIVk5iNIsci3wdMssizRC3EyZoLpYx-C057G5mt8mCHdZMvTCbAVC4FqvWUi8lboLnFQc6U1Zh7GkBl0adqbrd_RnBdPztVtvZ8yFeBQ0oBgau8NSZDdWMUsYKxzEmcy4T_-nT254OBrTCcQSot8JT_n_OVU8I4XV0WueyEj0FGLmusGmASs12eBIOLU5DbXqT87x947XXSgPN2e05JmUDN_X_kZmj0t6WcHDOvv8frlTIe8tL29rYE%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc80cbd8b08d4dfd818f8efd2669d0b7&_e=9F8I82ISHPMRxMjFofsgRKb7rOzCySO7TI2w7Y-is7atp5hvr1tdxZKH843qFH1VvXVIRw79HGK4M_h-6sCiDuf73dtM3XnO98643ZVYGG_JpMwWDOMQqlLEwEZGt75oSAR97Ep9pF5For4BDkldvI7gt2kaaJIURXTyz8PH1B_Ot5dKoBbvTIVk5iNIsci3wdMssizRC3EyZoLpYx-C057G5mt8mCHdZMvTCbAVC4FqvWUi8lboLnFQc6U1Zh7GkBl0adqbrd_RnBdPztVtvfGZZ8VvaapPoC2_nlY64UQylN6KCKaW3JeprfzQSoQ9CpRBvMVXNPl76n9lQffZlaCDgSXFhUai_K4MInPmnIqH2nJTF5_ug9ajAbeyxea3lpRC6B1zxVSyC01KULpdUz6BZVyswvwYbr-cJGPL6vY%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc80cbd8b08d4dfd818f8efd2669d0b7&_e=9F8I82ISHPMRxMjFofsgRKb7rOzCySO7TI2w7Y-is7atp5hvr1tdxZKH843qFH1VvXVIRw79HGK4M_h-6sCiDuf73dtM3XnO98643ZVYGG_JpMwWDOMQqlLEwEZGt75oSAR97Ep9pF5For4BDkldvI7gt2kaaJIURXTyz8PH1B_Ot5dKoBbvTIVk5iNIsci3wdMssizRC3EyZoLpYx-C057G5mt8mCHdZMvTCbAVC4FqvWUi8lboLnFQc6U1Zh7GkBl0adqbrd_RnBdPztVtvSA-mi-zzeGxSMisKb1RvqQGj6bm2ESjAlwWwCppnuVG78Nl5cuIJ0EFrdTl6LQeI4tWtot98TvfxsoPsxKY7A0uksLcPCNQiy_ZUzTJleGE88iH63bODVsEHvqD9R8M-sgcnE-ieQZkis4_RKeOKWQ%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=fc80cbd8b08d4dfd818f8efd2669d0b7&_e=9F8I82ISHPMRxMjFofsgRKb7rOzCySO7TI2w7Y-is7atp5hvr1tdxZKH843qFH1VvXVIRw79HGK4M_h-6sCiDuf73dtM3XnO98643ZVYGG_JpMwWDOMQqlLEwEZGt75oSAR97Ep9pF5For4BDkldvI7gt2kaaJIURXTyz8PH1B_Ot5dKoBbvTIVk5iNIsci3wdMssizRC3EyZoLpYx-C057G5mt8mCHdZMvTCbAVC4FqvWUi8lboLnFQc6U1Zh7GkBl0adqbrd_RnBdPztVtvXpF2XAZmCdMgdjIbzR9Ask5LidNyJniCzCGea0-6ZXXHoWPLp-UFH1FnhN-SPHTTQZCGH4cboZLkXbKfUgvliJ9PmfGY1LFuqymqWleQLvRUcgHvir4OyI6fIcpr2xdQk7dUmnsMDjkWAkaJpjJQ_M%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

subject: Badass young people have a habit of being underestimated
body:
This is the biggest thing I’ve ever been a part of.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T94b789b6-51a1-44f6-a196-8264ec109cb0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._

| | | Hey, Peter, it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives. The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain. But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans. That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. [We can’t do this without you by our side. Will you become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc576a9b-2973-4dcc-b8fc-bfce5afd37e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change. It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats. Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office. Let’s prove them wrong, Peter. [That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you become a Founding Donor to Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation with Blue Amp Action today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T553b562b-8586-4575-b991-100086723ca1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Let’s do this, David Hogg Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve

| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: I checked the numbers...she's going to lose.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
Lauren Boebert is a fighter that stood by my father when it mattered.
%recipient.md5_hash%
| | | | [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2184951ef1eb4a3b8496a7d7722cd5e7&_e=Q59FpzCXFSUcb5fBvSgK_uHtDHaXq3QVMAohFuXCgQDHbmjWWJouxkRCh2DN3vYWmZwTMToVe6zBpmea1mq1D7cl6QOdiN0dkS1E_OrJZussZtpEC8tw56KImyP4W8LO3kSacalmEtopdXZVWk8o6ZxrBh6Nx9h6t_HaCM0Q142KSEWwPbuDT6MH033L399mRL3aTOsvGB9YVQyLhqQcXnXSUvMU0uzaeccJrYZsljuY2T2cB5mRE__aQPncVbz2fKt-UXiELDhvV7P7a7xHg6Ybk8WspQgwtHAavINXJTg%3D)
---
| | | Lauren Boebert is a fighter that **stood by my father when it mattered.**

That's why this is the hardest email I've had to write in a long time...

Friend, I know you care about the MAGA agenda. Lauren has been unrelenting in supporting and defending that agenda. She's taken the hits for it, and her Soros-backed challenger has closed the gap so much that **_her race was just declared a "Toss up."_**

name: American Briefing
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5gcarjmkjg4a89acmflqh6c4fvm3cf28k89l0l8_rp22sh2s8i66p74c3im0or2cdh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpgo6ase9e5hbb0q3etmhs08u26rgkbe3l4e36ro_rp22sh2s8i66p74c3im0or2cdh2bs).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state—that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1c5om5b780ec77m16383rmr7f00e5r8ii6d0d4o_rp22sh2s8i66p74c3im0or2cdh2bs) [NO](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znt0ejl6168o4frssq3i491r5gkd9ahgituf1l48_rp22sh2s8i66p74c3im0or2cdh2bs) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlsf0t57hhqorhalb28pboisc1h9stoq004t2kbg_rp22sh2s8i66p74c3im0or2cdh2bs)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

clean_body: This might be your only warning... The Truth About The Coming Crisis This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: "Food shortages are coming." Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself. Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late. Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can. Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

clean_body: Lauren Boebert is a fighter that stood by my father when it mattered. | | | | | | | Lauren Boebert is a fighter that stood by my father when it mattered. That’s why this is the hardest email I’ve had to write in a long time... Friend, I know you care about the MAGA agenda. Lauren has been unrelenting in supporting and defending that agenda. She’s taken the hits for it, and her Soros-backed challenger has closed the gap so much that her race was just declared a “Toss up.” I’m looking at the numbers... and Lauren Boebert may lose her seat. We can stop this from happening. I am asking everyone reading this email to join me in contributing whatever they can and save Lauren Boebert from defeat. | | | "STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN" | Let’s just start with the facts. Last year, her opponent lost by only 546 votes after a lengthy recount. This year, he’s outraised Lauren 3 to 1 , and she’s in danger of falling too far behind. If this trend continues, Soros will have punished one of the strongest voices defending my father and the American way next year. | | | "RUSH $250" | "RUSH $100" | "RUSH $50" | "RUSH $25" | "RUSH other" | You know the stakes of this election: the course of America will be decided in 2024. Joe Biden and his crooked cabal have declared it their mission to completely eradicate the MAGA Agenda , and those who support it. Soros is bankrolling their effort. And it all starts with wiping out my father and Lauren. She’s stood against the Woke “Squad,” stood up for my father during the unlawful persecutions levied against him , and never wavered in her commitment to America First. You couldn’t find a more winsome ally than Lauren. Which is why I am coming to you and all patriots who love America. | "DEFEND LAUREN BOEBERT" | My father and I are counting on you. Thanks, Donald Trump Jr. | | PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS | | | | Copyright © 2023 , All rights reserved. American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: Stop toxic pesticides from decimating monarch butterflies and our planet
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **Don’t let Bayer-Monsanto wreak havoc on monarch butterflies and our planet. Make your $27 gift now.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925656?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925657?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925658?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925659?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The monarch butterfly is officially endangered, according to the International Union for Conservation of Nature. Monarch butterflies are at risk of dying off, and **the stakes have never been higher.** Some estimates show population declines of up to 95% since the 1990s -- and toxic pesticides like Bayer-Monsanto's Roundup are a key factor. [**Stand up to Bayer-Monsanto and help save the monarchs and our planet before it’s too late! We need at least 8 people from your city to make a $27 contribution before midnight tonight if we are going to make a difference for monarchs and our planet -- take a stand and make your gift today!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925660?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
Part of what makes monarchs special is their migration patterns. Traveling around 3,000 miles every year, they act as pollinators along this route. But as the use of herbicides like Roundup has grown over the years, it has decimated the only food that monarch caterpillars depend on -- milkweed. **This is making it nearly impossible for monarch young to hatch and survive.** Yet companies like Bayer-Monsanto continue to mercilessly put profits over pollinators, people, and the planet.
Friends of the Earth is putting everything we have into protecting our ecosystems from toxic pesticides, but we need your support to make an impact.
| [ ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925661?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**EMAIL: **dpwillis67@gmail.com
**MONARCH BUTTERFLY SURVIVAL STATUS** :** RED ALERT**
**SUPPORTERS FROM YOUR AREA NEEDED** :8
---
| | [MAKE MY GIFT NOW](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925662?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
_Records reflect most recent available data. 11:59 p.m deadline._
---
**Don’t let monarchs be driven to extinction: Donate $27 today to fight for their future and the planet’s.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925656?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925657?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925658?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925659?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The incredible migration of the monarch butterfly can span hundreds to thousands of miles over five generations. Yet each generation knows its destination thanks to an internal “compass” the monarchs follow.
But pesticide companies like Bayer-Monsanto seem to lack a moral compass -- continuing to sell glyphosate, the key ingredient in Roundup, no matter the cost to our planet.
This toxic weedkiller has virtually wiped out milkweed, the only food source for young monarchs, across the U.S. **The use of Bayer-Monsanto's Roundup has increased by over 2,600%** from 1987 to 2016.
And to make matters worse, a recent study highlighted a frightening fact: _**every single sample of milkweed collected was contaminated with pesticides.**_ One third with levels deadly to monarchs. Young monarchs are hatching on beds of toxic pesticide-riddled milkweed, and their first meal may be their last.
So it’s no wonder that over 99% of the western monarch population has disappeared since the 1980s. We need your help to fight back before it’s too late!
**Help us stand up to Bayer-Monsanto and protect our planet by making your $27 gift today!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925656?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925657?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925658?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925659?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
At Friends of the Earth, we are taking the fight to Congress, the Biden administration, and corporations. We’re pressuring major grocers like Kroger to stop selling food grown with pollinator-toxic pesticides while demanding Home Depot and Lowe’s stop selling Roundup in their stores and online.
In short, we are fighting on every front to save these pollinators. Friend, we need you by our side as we ramp up our efforts to save monarchs from extinction and protect our planet.
When the profits of companies like Bayer-Monsanto come at the expense of our health and our planet, the stakes are too high to wait a minute more to take action. Monarchs are running out of places to lay their eggs in the first place. And young monarchs are hatching on pesticide-riddled milkweed, eating these plants, and dying off. Monarch populations are in freefall -- **the time to act is now, while there are still monarchs left to save.**
With each passing day, and as toxic pesticide use grows, we may only get the rarest glimpses of these beautiful butterflies. Future generations may never experience the beauty of seeing a monarch on a sunny day. Will you be one of the 8 people in your area today that will make a membership gift and help us fight to protect them and our planet from toxic pesticides?
**Help us fight back against corporate greed and the toxic pesticides driving monarchs toward extinction and wreaking havoc on our planet. Rush your $27 gift today.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925656?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925657?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925658?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1925659?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Kendra Klein
Deputy Director of Science,
Friends of the Earth**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: re: Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
The next two elections we’ve got to win in Ohio. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67983624/421535855/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ15Y_TAN_E_20230812_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWNkNzNhYy0yNjM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RUiHDeVMyDN6d230iuXzAHlBQdO5I-bX6gElYFjF7YA=&emci=c3cd73ac-2639-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=cacd73ac-2639-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
The people of Ohio just won a major victory. They rejected a Republican ballot measure that would have made it harder for voters to enshrine abortion rights in the state constitution. And they left us with three big takeaways: **1\. Reproductive freedom wins elections.** Voters understood that the right to an abortion was on the ballot. Ohio’s GOP Secretary of State said that Tuesday’s ballot measure was “100% about keeping a radical pro-abortion amendment out of our constitution.” It would have forced constitutional amendments to pass with over 60% support instead of a simple majority — right before the state referendum on abortion rights set for November. But Ohioans turned out to stop this right-wing gambit. Just like voters turned out to guarantee abortion rights last year in Kansas and Michigan. **2\. Voters are vigilant against threats to our democracy.** Republican extremists have been doing everything they can to silence the will of the people — from shredding the right to vote across the country, to filibustering popular bills in the U.S. Senate, to expelling Democratic legislators who dare to fight back at the state level. And this ballot measure was another undemocratic power-grab. It would have made it harder for voters to make their voices heard and pass broadly popular policies — like ensuring abortion rights. And it would have put more power in the hands of the rich and powerful and the out-of-touch extremists who are trying to impose minority rule. **3\. Ohioans are ready to re-elect a champion of abortion rights, democracy, and working people: my friend Senator Sherrod Brown.** Sherrod has shown that he knows how to win tough elections, and this election shows that there’s a coalition ready to back him. But it’s going to be incredibly tough for him to overcome all the Republican big money and all the mud-slinging ads. He’s one of the most vulnerable Democratic senators up for re-election next year, and Republicans will pour millions and millions of dollars into this race to try to flip the Senate. [**To build on the momentum of this big victory in Ohio, can you split a donation of $20 or any amount between Sherrod Brown’s campaign and our re-election right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67983625/421535856/-1766574538?amount=20&refcode=EMZ15Y_TAN_E_20230812_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWNkNzNhYy0yNjM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RUiHDeVMyDN6d230iuXzAHlBQdO5I-bX6gElYFjF7YA=) Sherrod fights from the heart for working families in Ohio and across the country, and we need to keep his voice in the Senate. He grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians, spending summers working on his family's farm. He’s seen manufacturing jobs shipped overseas because of trade deals benefiting giant corporations. And he’s dedicated his life to fighting for the dignity of work. It’s a pretty basic idea: hard work should pay off for everyone. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, Sherrod fights for you. As Chair of the Banking Committee, Sherrod takes on the big banks and fights to make our economy work for everyone, not just Wall Street CEOs. Oh, and remember that Republican Secretary of State who said Tuesday’s ballot measure was “100%” about stopping the constitutional amendment on reproductive freedom? He just announced that he’s running in the GOP primary to take on Sherrod. So’s a guy who’s already loaned his campaign millions of dollars. And Sherrod is neck-and-neck with them in the polls. **The fate of our Senate majority could come down to this toss-up race in Ohio — and we’ve got to do everything we can to make sure Sherrod wins.** [**If it makes sense for you right now, please split a donation of any amount between Sherrod Brown and me to help defend our Democratic Senate majority, hold off Republican extremists, and deliver the change that working families desperately need.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67983626/421535857/-1766574538?refcode=EMZ15Y_TAN_E_20230812_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWNkNzNhYy0yNjM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RUiHDeVMyDN6d230iuXzAHlBQdO5I-bX6gElYFjF7YA=) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | [**DONATE NOW**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67983627/421535858/-1766574538?refcode=EMZ15Y_TAN_E_20230812_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWNkNzNhYy0yNjM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RUiHDeVMyDN6d230iuXzAHlBQdO5I-bX6gElYFjF7YA=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Six things every American needs to know about their country
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/affirmativeaction-11570998?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**“Woke” extremists are undermining America at every opportunity**. Cultural Marxists on campus are teaching young Americans that their country is always in the wrong. History is being re-written to demoralize and disorientate the United States.

**How and why has this been allowed to happen? **
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=d39c7d3392&e=5703353baa)
---
**_Andrew Doyle & I discuss “woke” as a post-religious religion _**
| **The fundamental problem is not progressive professors or ‘woke’ CEOs. The issue is that not enough Americans are taught what makes their country special.**** ** ‘Woke’ ideas exist in a vacuum where there was once good civics education.

**Here are six things every America needs to know about their country****–** and which if understood would serve as the ultimate antidote to “woke”: ****

1. **_America is built on liberty._**

**Liberty is what makes America special.** This country was started in 1776 because people living in 13 former British colonies had had enough of being bossed about by a British king.

**America today might have its fair share of busybody politicians and bureaucrats, but the default setting in this country is to distrust anyone claiming authority over others, from George III to Dr Fauci. **

Americans also dislike being told what to think, and particularly having their children told what to think: an extraordinary 3.7 million American school children are now homeschooled.

1. **_The US Constitution created the best system of government in the world._**

**America might only be 240-something years old, but the US Constitution is now the oldest written Constitution in the world** (with the exception of tiny San Marino). For context, France, which had their revolution at about the same time as America, is now on its fifth constitution. (How's that working out?)

It might be fashionable for CNN pundits to proclaim that American democracy is in crisis, but it is nonsense. **If and when Americans adhere to what the Founders actually wrote, the system works.**

The document they drafted, which fuses English ideas about natural rights with recently rediscovered insights from republican Rome, has withstood the test of time – and the challenge from would-be tyrants.

1. **_America is a force for good._**

No country is perfect, and America has had its fair share to blunders. But overall, America has been a force for good in the world.

All previous great powers used their might to establish empires. Far from subjugating people, the United States used her strength to set people free, insisting the European powers dismantle their empires.

**On three occasions – World War I, World War II and the Cold War - the United States has intervened to save the free world.** Can you imagine what the world today would be like if on any of those occasions the other side had won?

1. **_Americans are amazingly inventive._**

**From the first flight of the Kitty Hawk to the advent of the iphone, there is one country that has proved extraordinarily inventive; the United States. **

Take a look at the everyday household objects around you as you read this. The light bulb. The microwave oven. The refrigerator. Toothpaste. All are American inventions.

Innovation depends on being able to try out new things. It means freedom to fail. **America is inventive because she free.**

1. **_Judeo-Christian ideals have shaped America._**

**Religion has been remarkably important in shaping America.** Yes, I know that the Founders kept religion and government separate. That was not because they thought religion unimportant, but in fact the opposite.

The Founders wanted to avoid the oppression of smaller religious groups, as had happened in Europe.

When George Washington became President, he wrote an extraordinary letter to the Jewish congregation in Newport, Rhode Island. In it he made it clear that they had a right to follow their faith. No one needed anyone else’s approval to worship as they pleased.

America’s emphasis on individualism is, I suspect, a reflection of Judeo-Christian thinking.

1. **_Americans have so much to be thankful for._**

**“Woke” ideology encourages grievance and resentment, rather than gratitude. This is why the “woke” seldom seem happy. **

**Gratitude is an essential ingredient for happiness** – and if you want to “pursue happiness” won’t get very far without appreciating the good things that you have.

**It is not a coincidence that one of the most important days in the American calendar is called “Thanksgiving”. **

Initially a day to show gratitude for getting the harvest in, today Thanksgiving is a day to celebrate being American. Simply being an American means you have so much to be thankful for.

**If every American understood these six truths about their country, there would be no “woke”. **Please forward this email on to anyone that you think might be interested in it.

Have a wonderful weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=64460ee9d2&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| **Ps. At our recent board meeting, we celebrated our 30th birthday!** Thirty years ago this month, the Mississippi Family Council – which is what we were initially called – moved into its first office! Happy Birthday!
---
|
---
|
---

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=5267288a02) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=5267288a02).
