name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=69f5301b87ad4fccb925a4f76ed4e667&_e=Nv48_nHuX4LTi6J1y6Pq1uNkqKeZabeojK6KMPUrXg8tl7_z47mLH80ZUJa3Wsxcu98atsDbCELfFiIbiWOvKkC5RNBxk1mYXN_CId-Pr_7AxD_Y6rQve5X15KZzFZPC-4AXpcmSyryIEPZaSWEhOe8kN6dBqh2ejsJ74zHlV0yxeio1XlEetBuhqvk0X-KAfSWfY728SjD7JfXEru7lndo8F2QGZwOU9UYADCqnlGjpPcED9COqB6QU8wMYj5jp9e4UMITJaJ4A0bDPfZ7v4P7cRulnjaVefAJwN7mFlXG11KZyHVOnYXHdQTwavkyV2s62n1W56GFu0SOIFEWv4WhLVsdbVh8AiZoYXLqDrIAVojAJyWkUwRqMMyAtKNlnt6S6-lPQP6_jdcx-WBL3U4GoxeUAfRdbGUzgc6VVaF0%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=69f5301b87ad4fccb925a4f76ed4e667&_e=Nv48_nHuX4LTi6J1y6Pq1uNkqKeZabeojK6KMPUrXg8tl7_z47mLH80ZUJa3Wsxcu98atsDbCELfFiIbiWOvKkC5RNBxk1mYXN_CId-Pr_7AxD_Y6rQve5X15KZzFZPC-4AXpcmSyryIEPZaSWEhOe8kN6dBqh2ejsJ74zHlV0yxeio1XlEetBuhqvk0X-KAfSWfY728SjD7JfXEru7lndo8F2QGZwOU9UYADCqnlGjpPcED9COqB6QU8wMYj5jp9e4UMITJaJ4A0bDPfZ7v4PVf1vYP0OecBDol7-WCBrt7ThHSkqen9NLfR0Ztf834Y2TVnWf6e61sV04G3sCSOAD_6snXaVswaU1XN34FAAhadIpD5pxGhiXbjx4EBJKViDdVpoktsww94Av12_qevOM22VxU4YZ9b-k8h-xt_j8%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=69f5301b87ad4fccb925a4f76ed4e667&_e=Nv48_nHuX4LTi6J1y6Pq1uNkqKeZabeojK6KMPUrXg8tl7_z47mLH80ZUJa3Wsxcu98atsDbCELfFiIbiWOvKkC5RNBxk1mYXN_CId-Pr_7AxD_Y6rQve5X15KZzFZPC-4AXpcmSyryIEPZaSWEhOe8kN6dBqh2ejsJ74zHlV0yxeio1XlEetBuhqvk0X-KAfSWfY728SjD7JfXEru7lndo8F2QGZwOU9UYADCqnlGjpPcED9COqB6QU8wMYj5jp9e4UMITJaJ4A0bDPfZ7v4On8LzsvkfNBoUKAtXi5kHej7x2VtRNgKadiwGo3lQpDYn-BpPuCEO2bvbp4-1EicTLZeLD_Lpv7LLSFDA5UHe04Yma80wlZTRZXBmP5DfKF87_tkLABle10Rcz07wEbKgVbgRqbWaayqDtPRW14UpY%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=69f5301b87ad4fccb925a4f76ed4e667&_e=Nv48_nHuX4LTi6J1y6Pq1uNkqKeZabeojK6KMPUrXg8tl7_z47mLH80ZUJa3Wsxcu98atsDbCELfFiIbiWOvKkC5RNBxk1mYXN_CId-Pr_7AxD_Y6rQve5X15KZzFZPC-4AXpcmSyryIEPZaSWEhOe8kN6dBqh2ejsJ74zHlV0yxeio1XlEetBuhqvk0X-KAfSWfY728SjD7JfXEru7lndo8F2QGZwOU9UYADCqnlGjpPcED9COqB6QU8wMYj5jp9e4UMITJaJ4A0bDPfZ7v4BQ9uCpxIGBchZEQcseqrz-jn81npEFcXtqsgnJTpx_aRN72hr0NLFCITowiiOUfmifQwiTHiTBTlPJWMFo2gA-okqQ9wn2DnBUDLGxRnznZnYwMGz65fjqWcnh82tQ8QYM05OX0UfNW1eXbslN0WUY%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.
---

| | | Lauren Boebert is a fighter that **stood by my father when it mattered.**

Friend, I know you care about the MAGA agenda. Lauren has been unrelenting in supporting and defending that agenda. She's taken the hits for it, and her Soros-backed challenger has closed the gap so much that **_her race was just declared a "Toss up."_**

I'm looking at the numbers... and **Lauren Boebert may lose her seat.** **_We can stop this from happening. I am asking everyone reading this email to join me in contributing whatever they can and save Lauren Boebert from defeat._**

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=63865f8dbf7e4bd295f48f9f5d2058be&_e=7UvG7yoxOFhhjFeYfBWEVllgiH8uAsETWaAGy__4r_ubru1-ZdNcxDMPcJTshVjlrG9RirwuOzO2_O82xlMwlJ_KbNbkRDMNIcJ0eqbiLcIf071dYIR6ZTyoEhtHC3sRddEoLYvaKx92-6NQOKWov5y0MXyTOOD3_uhs9dTCseI6VjSJVE6l6ONzc-mihwZVNG7GYH-YAicHsLLFWWsBtCZO2nbvqY81Nl72gdybnAjdOB3f5X3Y172eYqAGBk1f6UCQeS6a62kl2rvtVsRljMhDHqMLVY6VQdBl3P41OIBVDFyOliWpExekDUKE6OKvEmB7fUODmOhj5Qnv_XbO1QZ8EyLTydzhpSgsNK6C2lSQ1UO8aC29ijOllw0ELCE7CLCuNWkjKPVBJipTqcqLCikl1ss-DbIgSuDOSkR9oTs%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight." By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." ** Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Your input is needed
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ad073890326456a80b45b3e9492504d&_e=gm9UKOWjmu_TV9JUjPah_TAGoItylzAZycILIuh6N5xifWrhkwOLERWkCioo274pPRYCINNHswsulccuS7yNjNPnXmVXIkuj46N_PZ81yszk4KC_Z7f-Q1ZH6rgdS9ps8djsFeuEPaG0nSv46PVMkVaANP-EfI3uLVGSxdd56jF50lq0_PE-PX9v1-S_WQDGB70lbDM-rshFEJ36XytaFg_sZp-Oh-DzIYoDvfauwGYanzApnofUIzvmkn7SDvQ497Z6cXKueXXTtyR7QVYO4_4NTHQxRciqCOqMtqAdmkVDjT0meEz9D44QS6KoeU1aQE-rmNej3zNM0t2TJEGWkb1cydXia6zeLe-YArF9fr1HiSdIKkhRG-tcqRKFuInZ8Ra1BBlVshKl3vB-adP4pYm9oX37RyE3e2uhb-hJNAc%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ad073890326456a80b45b3e9492504d&_e=gm9UKOWjmu_TV9JUjPah_TAGoItylzAZycILIuh6N5xifWrhkwOLERWkCioo274pPRYCINNHswsulccuS7yNjNPnXmVXIkuj46N_PZ81yszk4KC_Z7f-Q1ZH6rgdS9ps8djsFeuEPaG0nSv46PVMkVaANP-EfI3uLVGSxdd56jF50lq0_PE-PX9v1-S_WQDGB70lbDM-rshFEJ36XytaFg_sZp-Oh-DzIYoDvfauwGYanzApnofUIzvmkn7SDvQ497Z6cXKueXXTtyR7QVYO4yPG7JeCez8DtMRHzVN-dhDr9Lh1PcKciM3r8cCFhpUwvFQ1Y65DuALpleH0_o2S0Nx1LQkyAP__9ZZfyZvy9UcLR81PKN3OnrV9SJwf5lfrQ9FgLBvIJJY52IdjfaNyZegDTke_PfYsdWGHAKadAcY%3D).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ad073890326456a80b45b3e9492504d&_e=gm9UKOWjmu_TV9JUjPah_TAGoItylzAZycILIuh6N5xifWrhkwOLERWkCioo274pPRYCINNHswsulccuS7yNjNPnXmVXIkuj46N_PZ81yszk4KC_Z7f-Q1ZH6rgdS9ps8djsFeuEPaG0nSv46PVMkVaANP-EfI3uLVGSxdd56jF50lq0_PE-PX9v1-S_WQDGB70lbDM-rshFEJ36XytaFg_sZp-Oh-DzIYoDvfauwGYanzApnofUIzvmkn7SDvQ497Z6cXKueXXTtyR7QVYO4_lGbp8HlcDSj6G95KH7lIXvYbFoQeJ205P5U15gzorppkalfevGLeKLHS1KrgT1yOdBK2OjvbxaaEHHFZqoxrFojNnsxVJRfZJvV91eDK1LmKLIAlpDfT_XSocMvcaHf4J3W543BCpB8iAGO8JKX8Q%3D) [NO](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ad073890326456a80b45b3e9492504d&_e=gm9UKOWjmu_TV9JUjPah_TAGoItylzAZycILIuh6N5xifWrhkwOLERWkCioo274pPRYCINNHswsulccuS7yNjNPnXmVXIkuj46N_PZ81yszk4KC_Z7f-Q1ZH6rgdS9ps8djsFeuEPaG0nSv46PVMkVaANP-EfI3uLVGSxdd56jF50lq0_PE-PX9v1-S_WQDGB70lbDM-rshFEJ36XytaFg_sZp-Oh-DzIYoDvfauwGYanzApnofUIzvmkn7SDvQ497Z6cXKueXXTtyR7QVYO4_wuA7J2umOuQUs1BgM7e7pgT7d9weziUTlwk37ZGsZmfdwbWKYghUwSAX7_y08qK3mHRm2j3pc8n82i00C51xI9TExXZEnJglg25nzRUN-I8G1tKevxXDDCENhyW33lO893Tp00cU1KJnbSL4wQ2ZE%3D) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4ad073890326456a80b45b3e9492504d&_e=gm9UKOWjmu_TV9JUjPah_TAGoItylzAZycILIuh6N5xifWrhkwOLERWkCioo274pPRYCINNHswsulccuS7yNjNPnXmVXIkuj46N_PZ81yszk4KC_Z7f-Q1ZH6rgdS9ps8djsFeuEPaG0nSv46PVMkVaANP-EfI3uLVGSxdd56jF50lq0_PE-PX9v1-S_WQDGB70lbDM-rshFEJ36XytaFg_sZp-Oh-DzIYoDvfauwGYanzApnofUIzvmkn7SDvQ497Z6cXKueXXTtyR7QVYO4z9V0z1EbTv7gdnbzRcxndHuiH1nLX6wm0bw13a1xYb1N6GFlCj3OAdd89gDawx3EtYsRgicYlgOf_Vi1ID92miYqvfWXh804VxIOzuSVjIZ0eiYuP-U74VSIUKKhqqXIKdFoDsU0oBwBgmQg2r7nVI%3D)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Ruben Gallego HQ
subject: Five Percent of Ruben Gallego Supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We need you to join a very important group.
#

Ruben Gallego has hundreds of thousands of supporters, Peter.
But of that group, just five percent have donated to his campaign.
Just five percent have skin in the game. That’s just five out of every hundred supporters putting up the money it takes to stop Kari Lake and Kyrsten Sinema, and send a true Democrat to the Senate.
Today, we’re asking you to join that very important group.
We’re asking today because we’re coming up on the mid-way point to our next quarterly FEC deadline on August 15th.
And to be honest with you, we’ve had a rough quarter. In fact, we’re even falling behind where we were at this point last quarter. And that’s bad news.
Because it’s going to take millions and millions of dollars to win this seat. Arizona was one of the most expensive states in the country in 2022. With the presidential election on the horizon, it’s going to be even more expensive in 2024.

name: Full Mag News
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0a6bf7c86bec4b4b86b9651936b0f7df&_e=FB9ErmqGhZ53kbOb29gIHh2MDHQTOhGqNgZpM7X9sBUl6dH1y53jJXHbWuZY3ZZ8DOGAYr5A9Se6ck2tJ0UnyL6lh7k-LIqI3HWWH5nIhlP1M1ofoYxmPr62uxzFf-wGSxNnYtXC9l7XswYe4mfF1oJqBrQzpFC_rKtTkpdFFbiuhGQnd2044ovbb3v8KSC7tYg5v2xrr2129E5oX1x7yeINgUEswmKMc1Ml8JUDcfnOVA0algggLrEb-PmLKuCgWmRE6oqra15yuC14TwBRxSON2vc5CaWBwPzqymkbq3UE9oVFPUZlgSBPV7cILwdJtO5xaALxGqpwUz589aQ_Ue6aH5YNfXQWa0mG8YcpSDwe-Qx4n3Zsyj52V-BbvMMMPbLyKYoCdrViR99HVOvoelELHAItwc3vegRFWT4oMms%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0a6bf7c86bec4b4b86b9651936b0f7df&_e=FB9ErmqGhZ53kbOb29gIHh2MDHQTOhGqNgZpM7X9sBUl6dH1y53jJXHbWuZY3ZZ8DOGAYr5A9Se6ck2tJ0UnyL6lh7k-LIqI3HWWH5nIhlP1M1ofoYxmPr62uxzFf-wGSxNnYtXC9l7XswYe4mfF1oJqBrQzpFC_rKtTkpdFFbiuhGQnd2044ovbb3v8KSC7tYg5v2xrr2129E5oX1x7yeINgUEswmKMc1Ml8JUDcfnOVA0algggLrEb-PmLKuCgWmRE6oqra15yuC14TwBRxY2YyhnqOi7-kfOXd12FBK_MRG0QgQhxyxZvsPEpbWQ40qDiboCVYBSMY_nkxE9dCjdJ5SQR8Vsg2K1J2lwhfygACPNLdrHkTGP7BrrBjVWzPyB2Ra7Z-xCoIQkOtAAR3qwH6aqWZ_CMV1G22VmXdnQ%3D).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0a6bf7c86bec4b4b86b9651936b0f7df&_e=FB9ErmqGhZ53kbOb29gIHh2MDHQTOhGqNgZpM7X9sBUl6dH1y53jJXHbWuZY3ZZ8DOGAYr5A9Se6ck2tJ0UnyL6lh7k-LIqI3HWWH5nIhlP1M1ofoYxmPr62uxzFf-wGSxNnYtXC9l7XswYe4mfF1oJqBrQzpFC_rKtTkpdFFbiuhGQnd2044ovbb3v8KSC7tYg5v2xrr2129E5oX1x7yeINgUEswmKMc1Ml8JUDcfnOVA0algggLrEb-PmLKuCgWmRE6oqra15yuC14TwBRxU7W1rtN7571A46o9yyLViIstDVECZn_sq5DMTzqh9KdQc86EwvPmjmXPIaatuYSv63pf7xG03h8UJMqADn_6ANBhcYcjLIEmajsWphBVB2DC7a3OWBt-oITzNPpEcUr816YLN_SPNVIQXp53jBP5Zc%3D) [NO](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0a6bf7c86bec4b4b86b9651936b0f7df&_e=FB9ErmqGhZ53kbOb29gIHh2MDHQTOhGqNgZpM7X9sBUl6dH1y53jJXHbWuZY3ZZ8DOGAYr5A9Se6ck2tJ0UnyL6lh7k-LIqI3HWWH5nIhlP1M1ofoYxmPr62uxzFf-wGSxNnYtXC9l7XswYe4mfF1oJqBrQzpFC_rKtTkpdFFbiuhGQnd2044ovbb3v8KSC7tYg5v2xrr2129E5oX1x7yeINgUEswmKMc1Ml8JUDcfnOVA0algggLrEb-PmLKuCgWmRE6oqra15yuC14TwBRxTXGorA0d2yABpOhG3haId-65xTWFirFZxS6K0ZCUGoEq4Cqpz-FJ7mSQ_7ZzTt7kqsMtjGTH-C6njVYKE45_MITs-ogfusXan53b8rKmOkrF7a21uFTbIqkLR4oBP_Ai37u9uvpThoSmvRrHhAlZuw%3D) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0a6bf7c86bec4b4b86b9651936b0f7df&_e=FB9ErmqGhZ53kbOb29gIHh2MDHQTOhGqNgZpM7X9sBUl6dH1y53jJXHbWuZY3ZZ8DOGAYr5A9Se6ck2tJ0UnyL6lh7k-LIqI3HWWH5nIhlP1M1ofoYxmPr62uxzFf-wGSxNnYtXC9l7XswYe4mfF1oJqBrQzpFC_rKtTkpdFFbiuhGQnd2044ovbb3v8KSC7tYg5v2xrr2129E5oX1x7yeINgUEswmKMc1Ml8JUDcfnOVA0algggLrEb-PmLKuCgWmRE6oqra15yuC14TwBRxfnAY6ozVY7twUzyNV5KEmFxlKmvdrwzgFM4vivqVzwkT5QrvRShe4QuZRQGJfxYI6aEZ6OD0pKmOaF8yX1O2Lm-CTxasNqu7KY9ERr0Qn3JV8y--Kye_9TrELkLZjYxipQ8Hc4UtQ4Ufxt4b_hGo8k%3D)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans? Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because our country is facing a constitutional crisis. It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: who rules whom? The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history. Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens. This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations. But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. That is why I'm writing to you today. Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late. To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty? Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link: Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty! Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Fellow Conservative,

**$98 PER PERSON**
**As a former Navy SEAL** , I’m not intimidated by much. I’ve been around the world and fought on battlefields against enemy soldiers in hand-to-hand combat. As an aerial firefighter, **I’ve piloted planes through some of the most intense wildfires imaginable**.

While I’ve had some thrilling experiences, I’ve never feared the challenges that have been put before me - I assess each situation and determine how best to achieve the desired outcome with minimal harm to myself or to my team.

On June 27th I declared my candidacy to be the next U.S. Senator for Montana - it was the first time in longer than I can remember that my new day job didn’t involve the risk of serious injury or even death. But just because I’m not putting myself in harm’s way at present,**I’m still in the line of fire.**

In just a moment I’m going to ask you to **[chip in $9](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6ef50ac7ac1c4b5ab8e41e584669154d&_e=eLj6peBT5uyBBvKHmdH3LRNMWoPC1c7LwFdHUs2TvOjFYnMnU8naSDKcql0YNrqteegoQ2kh0BGL1ZIJ430lkT1fH9KL-pRu5g13EeqLFap_56qAFsAg_LNER26jzIxtv_TvyZmdfLzPMQVKOrvNv_n5uchE-SZkUSgVHRSUxwFTc7xzslzQ6sUYnQbNPeIAaefNmlvqAc75P59zX0QdnKwtCaxUO8FzQ51d1kwhCsETNxZKWcWPLQjZevmge4_v993WVTdX302D2MEeH2lNLPYstgru8f02-VrJXh1JmBfiH7onEe4KWm01GrN3qEqcdoIqwF6iB3KLkpIaTYbILRQjs7Obr3surRBJ_HLlRXCsM17hOxw6R4NS2GSaeSMd)** to help me hit my goal today of **raising $886** , but please continue reading to find out why I’m asking and why it’s important conservatives like you who care about this country get engaged in my race.

When I was deciding whether to challenge Jon Tester this spring, I did some digging to find out how much a U.S. Senate campaign costs and what I’d have to raise to be competitive against the last statewide elected Democrat. _**What I discovered shocked me. **_

**_OVER $70 MILLION WAS SPENT IN 2018 - AT THE TIME THE COSTLIEST FEDERAL RACE IN MONTANA’S HISTORY. CAMPAIGNS AND OUTSIDE SUPER PACS SPENT MORE THAN $98 PER PERSON TO INFLUENCE THEIR VOTE._ **
Given that my opponent has already raised $10 million this year,**the 2018 record won’t stand.**

While I’m not scared of the task ahead of me, **it is daunting to imagine raising the money I’ll need to successfully win this election.** By some estimates that sum will be more than $100 million dollars. **[[link to donate]](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6ef50ac7ac1c4b5ab8e41e584669154d&_e=eLj6peBT5uyBBvKHmdH3LRNMWoPC1c7LwFdHUs2TvOjFYnMnU8naSDKcql0YNrqteegoQ2kh0BGL1ZIJ430lkT1fH9KL-pRu5g13EeqLFap_56qAFsAg_LNER26jzIxtv_TvyZmdfLzPMQVKOrvNv_n5uchE-SZkUSgVHRSUxwFTc7xzslzQ6sUYnQbNPeIAaefNmlvqAc75P59zX0QdnKwtCaxUO8FzQ51d1kwhCsEzgyDBAkNwW243TB776kRSD_xDc0rmwDB91sR5U2wOdhTAIpke372S0IhYPZGYonla6bZEfR6v1V3RYCYafu2hxEBq34-lVQ3U5KF3zKoBzPGNN7K8p5iVFfUfduDAQj4NrpX2k4fA9SKzTgAjKdsE)**

I know we’re not going to raise the money we need all at once - or even in a year’s time. What I do know is that we will raise it. We’re setting goals each day - and **[if we continue to hit them, we’ll eventually get to where we need to be](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6ef50ac7ac1c4b5ab8e41e584669154d&_e=eLj6peBT5uyBBvKHmdH3LRNMWoPC1c7LwFdHUs2TvOjFYnMnU8naSDKcql0YNrqteegoQ2kh0BGL1ZIJ430lkT1fH9KL-pRu5g13EeqLFap_56qAFsAg_LNER26jzIxtv_TvyZmdfLzPMQVKOrvNv_n5uchE-SZkUSgVHRSUxwFTc7xzslzQ6sUYnQbNPeIAaefNmlvqAc75P59zX0QdnKwtCaxUO8FzQ51d1kwhCsGjARlYV8o4D4TiafUn5sKW4iu0h6O8eWPrVJPA-zjDjAYzSBcKF02CCQ-jE0ZHkj7F82apS-7Zmj0Mli7znnTWNo_43KUYfZXunae2T_KKfz5eMkbXjMPVr4NiqfCOj8HXH-QRs0612hPBsPK9TuVJ)**.

clean_body: $70 MILLION was spent in the 2018 Montana Senate race – a record sum. That’s $98 per person on every registered voter in Montana with the sole purpose of winning votes. | | Fellow Conservative, $98 PER PERSON As a former Navy SEAL , I’m not intimidated by much. I’ve been around the world and fought on battlefields against enemy soldiers in hand-to-hand combat. As an aerial firefighter, I’ve piloted planes through some of the most intense wildfires imaginable. While I’ve had some thrilling experiences, I’ve never feared the challenges that have been put before me - I assess each situation and determine how best to achieve the desired outcome with minimal harm to myself or to my team. On June 27th I declared my candidacy to be the next U.S. Senator for Montana - it was the first time in longer than I can remember that my new day job didn’t involve the risk of serious injury or even death. But just because I’m not putting myself in harm’s way at present,I’m still in the line of fire. In just a moment I’m going to ask you to to help me hit my goal today of raising $886 , but please continue reading to find out why I’m asking and why it’s important conservatives like you who care about this country get engaged in my race. When I was deciding whether to challenge Jon Tester this spring, I did some digging to find out how much a U.S. Senate campaign costs and what I’d have to raise to be competitive against the last statewide elected Democrat. What I discovered shocked me. OVER $70 MILLION WAS SPENT IN 2018 - AT THE TIME THE COSTLIEST FEDERAL RACE IN MONTANA’S HISTORY. CAMPAIGNS AND OUTSIDE SUPER PACS SPENT MORE THAN $98 PER PERSON TO INFLUENCE THEIR VOTE. Given that my opponent has already raised $10 million this year,the 2018 record won’t stand. While I’m not scared of the task ahead of me, it is daunting to imagine raising the money I’ll need to successfully win this election. By some estimates that sum will be more than $100 million dollars. [[link to donate]]() I know we’re not going to raise the money we need all at once - or even in a year’s time. What I do know is that we will raise it. We’re setting goals each day - and . Are you able to assist? **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: The D.C. Establishment is afraid of our movement. They don't want to disrupt the status quo. | | Chris Christie, former Republican Joe Scarborough, and Mika Brzezinski all had a lot to say about me and this movement we're creating. Peter, they can preach to their far-left audiences all they want, it's not going to stop me from speaking the TRUTH the D.C. Establishment doesn't want you to hear. Their name-calling won't stop me. Chris Christie's interview on MSNBC made one thing clear: It doesn't matter if you have an R or a D next to your name, the “New Establishment” all share the same things: Pro-war in Ukraine Fine with political opponents getting arrested Anti-free speech Bought & paid for by Super PACs Pretends to be anti-establishment It's laughable that MSNBC will trot out someone like Chris Christie to bash me so they can feign “bipartisanship” while still totally hiding from direct debate with me. I won't ever back down from speaking the TRUTH, even if it's not popular with the mainstream media. That's why I am looking forward to the first Republican Presidential Debate later this month, but I need your help to secure a center spot on stage. | | | ---|---|--- | | Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence**. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Your input is needed
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=552c846fff184620a5c3184c4bf58d16&_e=_ph2-cIJvGkTQmN8DeStnzyLfD-Do_DJzyFC4RSukUk2mIQiCB2FIBoILuUnAozZ8vWstYmovsCD-UOkcQHyaY4why_gIxkAHLTOqadNAaT2RAhBbg3_gWHScD9dIbbNf9Xu8-1SXkvHG0DsyNPE8AOOkSJiFh59f0PbNv06ge4wbyyBc96txKU51q2r_s5R3_AdYkBhieJ20vWA_VapyqcU3s7vYwrdCekxglKrfn240L9SWSfk4ddEVdJ5w-1LULi1diY8bKxDCJ5shiIJdY-SfjyCOADPnFHE1FRn2iC6ODgBd_pGC26-fdp1jp7_0unopfs4C9UXtZ9uGD-bQv9eS2xldWkiU1WFn7ih8XFkB34LAbYrBMEzaXNM05HyvYnztCPvGzPWaxOjvBk1IYSvN-30QuQWYaT6FkNJFto%3D).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=552c846fff184620a5c3184c4bf58d16&_e=_ph2-cIJvGkTQmN8DeStnzyLfD-Do_DJzyFC4RSukUk2mIQiCB2FIBoILuUnAozZ8vWstYmovsCD-UOkcQHyaY4why_gIxkAHLTOqadNAaT2RAhBbg3_gWHScD9dIbbNf9Xu8-1SXkvHG0DsyNPE8AOOkSJiFh59f0PbNv06ge4wbyyBc96txKU51q2r_s5R3_AdYkBhieJ20vWA_VapyqcU3s7vYwrdCekxglKrfn240L9SWSfk4ddEVdJ5w-1LULi1diY8bKxDCJ5shiIJdQ-Btvq92i9vokgxjgfEOppNkyAX8FIl_iliOpjmGwenXe1IMXS-_RALRW9GBta2lmi9lNuFtinANOFDmc5FlsXPVhBPWazbAYJwloG9pl7PPlYhHa-DRXrFCYqgXj5KFubDs3Sq1O8-GY5eb8Xyqbc%3D) [NO](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=552c846fff184620a5c3184c4bf58d16&_e=_ph2-cIJvGkTQmN8DeStnzyLfD-Do_DJzyFC4RSukUk2mIQiCB2FIBoILuUnAozZ8vWstYmovsCD-UOkcQHyaY4why_gIxkAHLTOqadNAaT2RAhBbg3_gWHScD9dIbbNf9Xu8-1SXkvHG0DsyNPE8AOOkSJiFh59f0PbNv06ge4wbyyBc96txKU51q2r_s5R3_AdYkBhieJ20vWA_VapyqcU3s7vYwrdCekxglKrfn240L9SWSfk4ddEVdJ5w-1LULi1diY8bKxDCJ5shiIJdZd1t_xd9Kpt9fzrbwxMQSV0v4V_ZiJmRyZiU6c2Pt0vHE7F207F7rQQFASOMkuuCxD3r1L_Ks0--tfFi0XQgdqjUFsXEs91nL7TZ0cww7fTLJ3IgdmDOXcPISOH8JUuvpN4d1Pm1cfI-5WtmVY0Q-w%3D) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=552c846fff184620a5c3184c4bf58d16&_e=_ph2-cIJvGkTQmN8DeStnzyLfD-Do_DJzyFC4RSukUk2mIQiCB2FIBoILuUnAozZ8vWstYmovsCD-UOkcQHyaY4why_gIxkAHLTOqadNAaT2RAhBbg3_gWHScD9dIbbNf9Xu8-1SXkvHG0DsyNPE8AOOkSJiFh59f0PbNv06ge4wbyyBc96txKU51q2r_s5R3_AdYkBhieJ20vWA_VapyqcU3s7vYwrdCekxglKrfn240L9SWSfk4ddEVdJ5w-1LULi1diY8bKxDCJ5shiIJdTvn1-pVbB5uZcF3Uozz9I1tGb500WbjLWMBZ0lHXHHChc3juCFf6gjuDYoEkJSJ0JS9ZppMdTn9-Sqzdnj9WMvCYLDyDPJ9yJ0IkKj8_xNLm9rPxd2GOCcX1rEneVSZVDEU9D96ZcsPDfrq4D5fwkE%3D)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body: | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63059093:6PoSJ-IN3:m:1:3299561967:549144300B8050C2A84C41E23209A10B:r) Chris Christie, former Republican Joe Scarborough, and Mika Brzezinski all had a lot to say about me and this movement we're creating. Patriot, they can preach to their far-left audiences all they want, it's not going to stop me from speaking the TRUTH the D.C. Establishment doesn't want you to hear. **Their name-calling won't stop me.** _**[Will you stand with me?](https://secure.winred.com/vivek-2024/cc-msnbc-attacks-tst-r?sc=20230811_VIVEK_EE_TST_MSNBC-ATTACKS_REV_duty&utm_source=rev&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=msnbcattacks&utm_term=duty)**_ Chris Christie's interview on MSNBC made one thing clear: It doesn't matter if you have an R or a D next to your name, the "New Establishment" all share the same things: * Pro-war in Ukraine * Fine with political opponents getting arrested * Anti-free speech * Bought & paid for by Super PACs * Pretends to be anti-establishment It's laughable that MSNBC will trot out someone like Chris Christie to bash me so they can feign "bipartisanship" while still totally hiding from direct debate with me. I won't ever back down from speaking the TRUTH, even if it's not popular with the mainstream media. That's why I am looking forward to the first Republican Presidential Debate later this month, but I need your help to secure a center spot on stage. **[Will you chip in today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63059093:6PoSJ-IN3:m:1:3299561967:549144300B8050C2A84C41E23209A10B:r)** | [Chip in $25 ➔](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63059094:6PoSJ-IN3:m:1:3299561967:549144300B8050C2A84C41E23209A10B:r) | | [Chip in $50 ➔](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63059095:6PoSJ-IN3:m:1:3299561967:549144300B8050C2A84C41E23209A10B:r) ---|---|--- [Chip in $100 ➔](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63059096:6PoSJ-IN3:m:1:3299561967:549144300B8050C2A84C41E23209A10B:r) | | [Chip in $250 ➔](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63059097:6PoSJ-IN3:m:1:3299561967:549144300B8050C2A84C41E23209A10B:r) Thanks, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63059093:6PoSJ-IN3:m:1:3299561967:549144300B8050C2A84C41E23209A10B:r) Vivek Ramaswamy [** JOIN OUR TEAM ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63059093:6PoSJ-IN3:m:1:3299561967:549144300B8050C2A84C41E23209A10B:r) --- **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. [**STAND WITH VIVEK**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63059093:6PoSJ-IN3:m:1:3299561967:549144300B8050C2A84C41E23209A10B:r) --- | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63059098:6PoSJ-IN3:m:1:3299561967:549144300B8050C2A84C41E23209A10B:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63059099:6PoSJ-IN3:m:1:3299561967:549144300B8050C2A84C41E23209A10B:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/63059100:6PoSJ-IN3:m:1:3299561967:549144300B8050C2A84C41E23209A10B:r) ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 --- Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

**[I would really appreciate you taking the time to read this message if you have a moment. Time is valuable, but this is important.](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=d8be37b9339c461cb7bb8f2af81d1b5b&_e=WpRWo5iF6Auqpx-yL4AfLxUO991gTShSaC13S2pO93gmhzJUj21a3xyeaDsM3i3orU6jfzExcNNljBUpDjTb_GEmWAe-AOtSGD0CLiMbdTQaG0ahyCyTMB40dHKdo2CvbeZh-S1JtHSSzdIjsTCIx5Cy_CXYMxfA7xUgH9YiVaFrqYdSZ4_VRGRipXT9fhmVTxIMD0HJlpIwve3T8b3viwtTlcKdK0-6ZLoze_C-5B2KYECQ917z6b1XgheCMEutMoF4GjLod7flnMooxiLlL2jL_kaF_4GmTHa6k7C40DEyUZ5ZjACcacMqIbDLiKXt2FG0ITOmvpX6N8NvQWiCj6AfyNKVVYzv4fuCKBSZ6xgFyMWPkKVgioqO-FX1A9uB4HvVQqK46dPZrguCSQYnzrbqEdDPyWpR5s3dbWubJxmX0hkl7S-ma1pDG43vq7v_08Ao3d08UUA54G7TG_Sz57ytZ1DZwGZGrlC7HgtTzrXUZusHSyfn91Si0FsCnW2xt0Zxs-8u0nOgHoOokPBDGaUIm37KG1zFI-HIS3V7Ct6xMg66HaecTlTir1EuDbM0)**

To start, I wanted to tell you about my career and how we got to this point. At West Point, I was top of my class and honored to serve in the U.S. Army. From there, I started a small business and eventually ran for Congress to defend America First, Conservative values. Following President Trump's 2016 election victory, I served as CIA Director working to keep Americans safe. My last stop was at the White House, where I served as President Trump's Secretary of State.

Today, I am fighting to get America back on the right track by continuing my fight for America. I love my country and want to preserve the foundation of our nation for generations to come.

| [ **JOIN MIKE POMPEO** ](http://links.houseconservatives.org/u/click?_t=a828c22267f2452d9c778060a3aea04e&_m=d8be37b9339c461cb7bb8f2af81d1b5b&_e=WpRWo5iF6Auqpx-yL4AfLxUO991gTShSaC13S2pO93gmhzJUj21a3xyeaDsM3i3orU6jfzExcNNljBUpDjTb_GEmWAe-AOtSGD0CLiMbdTQaG0ahyCyTMB40dHKdo2CvbeZh-S1JtHSSzdIjsTCIx5Cy_CXYMxfA7xUgH9YiVaFrqYdSZ4_VRGRipXT9fhmVTxIMD0HJlpIwve3T8b3viwtTlcKdK0-6ZLoze_C-5B2KYECQ917z6b1XgheCMEutMoF4GjLod7flnMooxiLlL2jL_kaF_4GmTHa6k7C40DEyUZ5ZjACcacMqIbDLiKXt2FG0ITOmvpX6N8NvQWiCj6AfyNKVVYzv4fuCKBSZ6xgFyMWPkKVgioqO-FX1A9uB4HvVQqK46dPZrguCSQYnzqEqI8idgk4vC37-IKu2L2bWNr6H3db4db12SfzQr3tFA6rG-zBqk20M9KMQK79yooTeX0kJxP3z2yVuU9IIHrxFSUvwANGyYfoKziNg1K3Ko7sqFyRZDYk4SOBwfQd7yTq3zZLaeJ7LaCAivHZm7veRTIK7hbzwJRvBWa5h_U63)

I am fighting to make sure no campaign is left behind. We must fight for Republicans to fix the problems at hand. True Patriots, like Kevin Hern, are on the verge of losing their seats in Congress if we don't rush emergency support!

Take a look 👀 | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67976398/421509393/-2090587605?refcode=utc_em_logoT_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzZGQ0ODhmLTE4MzktZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ue42xMZHvJ6_4NZnCuSZvzIx99zxSQEybj9FtyJWSI4=)

Peter — _[before we ask you to chip in $5 to support President Biden's re-election in 2024, we want to take a moment to remember some key dates to mark the progress we’ve made with President Biden in office:](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67976399/421509394/-2090587605?refcode=em_UTC_FR_Biden_Inflection_081223_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzZGQ0ODhmLTE4MzktZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ue42xMZHvJ6_4NZnCuSZvzIx99zxSQEybj9FtyJWSI4=)_ November 7, 2020 A resounding victory! Over 80 million voters united behind President Biden to defeat Donald Trump and his dangerous MAGA agenda. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67976400/421509395/-2090587605?refcode=em_UTC_FR_Biden_Inflection_081223_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzZGQ0ODhmLTE4MzktZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ue42xMZHvJ6_4NZnCuSZvzIx99zxSQEybj9FtyJWSI4=) January 20, 2021 A new era begins! President Biden was inaugurated as the 46th President of the United States and embarked on his mission to deliver for the American people. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67976401/421509396/-2090587605?refcode=em_UTC_FR_Biden_Inflection_081223_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzZGQ0ODhmLTE4MzktZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ue42xMZHvJ6_4NZnCuSZvzIx99zxSQEybj9FtyJWSI4=) January 20, 2022 Milestone reached! One year in, President Biden and Vice President Harris fueled historic growth: 6 million jobs created and 3.9% unemployment rate. They even made historic strides in reducing child poverty and expanding health coverage to millions. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67976402/421509397/-2090587605?refcode=em_UTC_FR_Biden_Inflection_081223_img3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYzZGQ0ODhmLTE4MzktZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Ue42xMZHvJ6_4NZnCuSZvzIx99zxSQEybj9FtyJWSI4=) April 25, 2023 The race is on! President Biden launches his 2024 re-election bid. clean_body: Here’s what you need to know. | = Friend, in a moment, = But first, I want to let you know a few things about this race: Democrats are only five seats away from taking back the House. The key to making that happen is flipping this district. NY-04 is one of the most competitive TOSS-UP races of 2024. My Republican opponent, Anthony D’Esposito, is a dangerous MAGA extremist who is more loyal to criminals in his party — like George Santos and Donald Trump — than to the American people. I’m not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. On day one, I committed to building a people-powered campaign where working people are the ones in control, not the special interests. That's why it's crucial that we hit our 1,000 grassroots donations goal to stay on track for our first mid-month deadline of the campaign in 72 hours. body:
When you power this campaign, you’re powering the work we do every day to fight for our values.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=408%2E791427%2EEkzMgC)

Friends —
When you make your first $3 contribution towards our August fundraising deadline, you’re not just contributing $3 to my campaign for re-election.
You’re contributing $3 for a Green New Deal that can tackle the climate crisis and protect our planet while creating millions of jobs.
$3 to finally guarantee health care for all, so nobody has to forgo the care they need because they can’t afford it.
$3 to fight to restore the right to an abortion and reproductive freedom in every state of this nation.
$3 to keep up our work to cancel student debt and relieve millions of Americans from decades of crushing debt.
Because when you power this campaign, you’re powering the work we do every day to advance these progressive values. You’re powering an entire movement that believes a better world is possible.
So please:
**[Will you make your first $3 contribution and help us beat our August fundraising goals before the end of the month? Every single dollar makes a difference.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug23.SAeyb4&refcode=em230806-1-t1&t=2&akid=408%2E791427%2EEkzMgC)**

body:

name: Petitions Team @ HER Time
subject: We’re preparing for the mifepristone case to go all the way to the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67978052/421515314/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230812_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGE5MjRhM2MtMWEzOS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=k7zyroZ8--Bnw1ZGCCH2q9Mq62TnAOf81VJgfErC7vA=)
---
Peter, We’re preparing for the mifepristone case to be appealed all the way to the Supreme Court — and we can’t help but be worried about how the justices will rule when it does. It was almost exactly a year ago that the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and opened the country up to the onslaught of regressive, dystopian abortion restrictions we see in place all over the country. This Court is sending our country backwards — that’s why we’re calling for Court reform before it’s too late. Our Supreme Court is broken. MULTIPLE seats were stolen by Mitch McConnell’s obstruction in the Senate. Clarence Thomas is allowed to accept (and lie about) obscenely expensive gifts from a Republican mega donor, while his wife helps organize a coup, with no consequence. **These are the people who have our rights in their hands.** We must not sit by as a corrupt court takes away our rights.**** The time to reform the Court is now. [_**If you agree, please sign our petition calling for immediate reform of the Supreme Court. We need your voice on this important matter:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67978054/421515316/-220061698?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230812_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGE5MjRhM2MtMWEzOS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=k7zyroZ8--Bnw1ZGCCH2q9Mq62TnAOf81VJgfErC7vA=&emci=2558b321-8338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=8a924a3c-1a39-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1720400) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67978056/421515318/-220061698?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230812_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGE5MjRhM2MtMWEzOS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=k7zyroZ8--Bnw1ZGCCH2q9Mq62TnAOf81VJgfErC7vA=&emci=2558b321-8338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=8a924a3c-1a39-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1720400)

clean_body: | = Peter, We’re preparing for the mifepristone case to be appealed all the way to the Supreme Court — and we can’t help but be worried about how the justices will rule when it does. It was almost exactly a year ago that the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade and opened the country up to the onslaught of regressive, dystopian abortion restrictions we see in place all over the country. This Court is sending our country backwards — that’s why we’re calling for Court reform before it’s too late. Our Supreme Court is broken. MULTIPLE seats were stolen by Mitch McConnell’s obstruction in the Senate. Clarence Thomas is allowed to accept (and lie about) obscenely expensive gifts from a Republican mega donor, while his wife helps organize a coup, with no consequence. These are the people who have our rights in their hands. We must not sit by as a corrupt court takes away our rights.** The time to reform the Court is now. | Thanks for standing with us, HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Sharice Davids
subject: Stepping into a meeting and need to reach you→
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hi, it’s Sharice.

I’m going into a strategy meeting with my campaign manager, Mohona, and our team and would really appreciate it if you could answer my survey, so we know what parts of my work are impacting my supporters the most.

Can you take 2 minutes and answer here?

**_[https://act.shariceforcongress.com/a/summer-priorities-survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67978359/421516483/87032021?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230811_SV_summer_1.2_0_3MO_candidate_NA_NA_summerpriorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDk0NWVhNi0xYTM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=427JOCZMo6ITz66ZNhVyXlH12LfMGcvzBF2BLDmS3ME=&emci=c05d4d03-c536-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=b0945ea6-1a39-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)_**

I am proud of the work we’ve accomplished over the past few months. With your help, we’ll keep it going in 2024 and beyond.

Have a great weekend!
— Sharice

The left is all-in to flip this seat – _Ted is Chuck Schumer and his D.C. swamp pals' #1 target._ It’s all hands on deck to **KEEP TEXAS RED** and **SAVE THIS SEAT**! August is always a tough month for fundraising. As summer winds down, we’re reaching out today to ask you to [**help us stay on track to reach our monthly goa** l](http://trk.tedcruz._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1FLUhvdXNlRmlsZSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Q3J1el9BdWd1c3QtTWlkTW9udGgtMV8yMDIzMDgwOCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUF1Z3VzdC1NaWRNb250aC0xJnV0bV9hZ2VuY3k9UEcifQ/LFa5NPmRoMhtt2WA8T1mUQ) on August 31st.

name: Dr. Shawn Wilson for Governor
subject: Let the race begin!
body:
image of ... [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/swlogo2.png]
TEAM WILSON WEEKLY UPDATES
Peter,
I am proud to be writing to you as an officially qualified candidate for the office of Louisiana Governor. It’s been a busy summer on the campaign trail but with the field now officially set, let the race begin!
It's our time, Louisiana.
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sw-web]
QUALIFYING
I am proud to have officially qualified to be your next Louisiana Governor on Tuesday morning.
I am driven by the belief that we can bridge the bias and find common ground to create a better, smarter, and safer Louisiana.
It's our time, Louisiana! Let’s geaux!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-08-08T085928.794.png]
After qualifying I took a moment to appreciate some of our progress. 😎
https://youtube.com/shorts/fDMcwudPkUo?feature=share [https://youtube.com/shorts/fDMcwudPkUo?feature=share]
Thank you to everyone who came out to our rallies in Donaldsonville and LaPlace Tuesday afternoon.
The people of the River Parishes are fired up and ready for some new energy!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-08-11T082947.159.png]
Congratulations to all the candidates now officially running for office across Louisiana in this Fall's elections.
I was proud to qualify for Governor on Tuesday, surrounded by my loving family.
With qualifying now behind us, the election now begins in earnest.
With the outpouring of support, I am excited by the chance to be the leader the families across our great state need.
It's our time, Louisiana!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/Shawn%20Wilson%20%20Race%20for%20Gov.png]
HIGHLIGHTS FROM THE CAMPAIGN TRAIL
Grand Isle
Last weekend Team Wilson hit the gulf for the 40th CCA Legislative Rodeo . Guided by Connor from Monroe, LA , we fished the waters that sustain and promote businesses across Louisiana. After bringing in our catch, I spoke to Legislators from across the state about how we can support our local fishing economy.
Conservation of our natural resources will be a top priority of my administration. Without sustainable regulations, waters like the Gulf will not be able to support our vast fishing industry.
With my decades of proven bipartisan experience, I am the best choice to sustain Louisiana’s growth and move us into a new period of prosperity
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-08-11T083756.527.png]
Baton Rouge
Over 1,000 educators turned out for Senator Regina Ashford Barrow 's back to school giveaway event for faculty and staff. Classroom supplies were overflowing and several printers and smart screens were given out, along with other key items to make their jobs easier.
Team Wilson was happy to support this effort and all efforts to provide adequate resources to improve educational outcomes for Louisiana.
I am committed to expanding our investment in education at every level.
I can't wait to do it all for you as Governor.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-08-11T090633.061.png]
Grambling
I was grateful to speak with President Rick Gallot and other leaders from Grambling State University this week.
Improving Louisiana’s education system is paramount and will take a leader who is willing to fully fund higher education, support tenure to attract and retain the best and brightest, and protect our bedrock institutions and historically Black colleges and universities.
As a proud product of Louisiana's public schools, former SGA President, and past President of the Alumni Association for the University of Louisiana at Lafayette , I am keenly aware that we cannot put our schools on the backburner nor sit by while our education system – and their buildings – crumble.
Strengthening our workforce means prioritizing and investing meaningful resources in education, prioritizing immediate maintenance, increasing access and affordability, and expanding STEM and research programs so that our colleges and universities not only compete nationally but prepare our students for the high-demand careers it will take for Louisiana’s job force to compete globally.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-08-09T101246.154.png]
New Orleans
New Orleans’ Democrats turned out to celebrate the end of qualifying last night and there was so much energy!
I was grateful for the opportunity to meet with so many voters from the area and share how I plan to help build a better Louisiana.
As always, it was a pleasure to reconnect with the trusted leaders of the city, leaders like State Representatives Matthew Willard , Aimee Adatto Freeman , Jason Hughes & School Board Member Carlos Zervigon .
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-08-11T153509.473.png]
Last month I had the opportunity to share with the Louisiana Municipal Association forum my vision for collaboration between local government and the state government. I will incorporate an open-door policy because I believe that relationships are foundational to our collective and collaborative success.
I told the Mayors and other local government leaders that under a Wilson administration, they will have no need to worry about having a liaison in their office because they will be able to liaison directly with me.
https://youtu.be/77ByLvaSC4g [https://youtu.be/77ByLvaSC4g]
The fentanyl crisis is personal for my family - and it's wrecking families across Louisiana.
As Governor, my plan to end this public health crisis focuses on enforcement, education, overdose reversal and treatment.
I plan to ensure every bartender and public servant receives fentanyl prevention training — making sure it’s as common as CPR.
https://youtu.be/o9pCq-fa8jk [https://youtu.be/o9pCq-fa8jk]
GIVING PRAISE
Baton Rouge
Sunday’s first worship service was at Beacon Light Baptist Church of Baton Rouge, with Pastor Eric Williams delivering an electrifying service. It was incredible to be joined by the entire Southern Jaguars Football team and the Liberty Magnet High School football team in service.
Our second service of the day was at Rose Hill Church with Pastor Danny Donaldson . It was another meaningful day of praise and worship!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/My%20project-1%20-%202023-08-11T090029.088.png]
UPCOMING EVENTS
Shreveport
We're going to build a better Louisiana!
Join us for a rally in Shreveport at the Uptown Kourtyard this Sunday, August 13th at 3 pm .
There will be food, fun, entertainment, and, of course, a vision for a brighter future.
It's our time, Louisiana!
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/build%20a%20better-2.png]
New Orleans
New Orleans - Please join me at Zulu Social Aid & Pleasure Club, Inc. on Thursday, August 24th for an evening of food, music and fun. King Zulu-elect 2024 Marvin Labat will be in attendance.
This event is open to all Zulu members, family, and friends.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/104399/images/Shawn%20Wilson%20%20Zulu%20Flyer-High-Quality.jpg]
HOST SHAWN AT AN EVENT [events@wilsonforla.com?subject=Host%20Shawn%20At%20An%20Event]
To learn more about my candidacy visit wilsonforla.com [wilsonforla.com] .
With hope,
Shawn Wilson
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sw-web]
ENDORSE [https://www.wilsonforla.com/endorse]
LEARN MORE [WILSONFORLA.COM]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]

Wilson for Louisiana
P.O. Box 4572
Baton Rouge, LA 70821
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/408Tlfh_cUKqKl0Yd-tKBw2?unsubscribedata=fkJxlAct6q3CCDy9aCSD6p8llrzOS8AKO16hSwgMbOop1e%2BWvCjn1PHvEiD6FmK2siK1tW0l8jyd0zmUK5k%2FAR5PAmSIa2Cg3QZdVZGh4jOKAnENcw%2FlLALWGydj%2BROi8BZCKdfI8v1moRenox8yfMfONemLWGdAhHlzddWTnzqLnkoUUX5aJVIxvQUGA1lsNmKSQJQug4KOkPn6nAhO9cKdCbGq3t%2F4Viq0LHSyiDiWyk4Q%2B3qa4mzacVYIW%2FBv6LZVdxXVDbQv5lA2ufhYVeh8ltSC7sOmcl2xKrKaYQOD9hPMglOAQ6UGMH04BhOuNxgrzawTvoOuVgD8ZZLvGok997cdxsfjfaoXWRXwZbPr8lo7zj4b5wG1ZYrB9idDKIRDkbkLVcDXbf6mxPTRBDDTzawVaJXg50LRz3ptXIXxapTlbgsZE8HhKX%2FxxzJ7 .

I was grateful for the opportunity to meet with so many voters from the area and share how I plan to help build a better Louisiana. As always, it was a pleasure to reconnect with the trusted leaders of the city, leaders like State Representatives Matthew Willard , Aimee Adatto Freeman , Jason Hughes & School Board Member Carlos Zervigon . [] Last month I had the opportunity to share with the Louisiana Municipal Association forum my vision for collaboration between local government and the state government. I will incorporate an open-door policy because I believe that relationships are foundational to our collective and collaborative success. I told the Mayors and other local government leaders that under a Wilson administration, they will have no need to worry about having a liaison in their office because they will be able to liaison directly with me. [] The fentanyl crisis is personal for my family - and it's wrecking families across Louisiana. As Governor, my plan to end this public health crisis focuses on enforcement, education, overdose reversal and treatment. I plan to ensure every bartender and public servant receives fentanyl prevention training — making sure it’s as common as CPR. [] GIVING PRAISE Baton Rouge Sunday’s first worship service was at Beacon Light Baptist Church of Baton Rouge, with Pastor Eric Williams delivering an electrifying service. It was incredible to be joined by the entire Southern Jaguars Football team and the Liberty Magnet High School football team in service. Our second service of the day was at Rose Hill Church with Pastor Danny Donaldson . It was another meaningful day of praise and worship! [] UPCOMING EVENTS Shreveport We're going to build a better Louisiana! Join us for a rally in Shreveport at the Uptown Kourtyard this Sunday, August 13th at 3 pm . There will be food, fun, entertainment, and, of course, a vision for a brighter future. It's our time, Louisiana! [] New Orleans New Orleans - Please join me at Zulu Social Aid & Pleasure Club, Inc. on Thursday, August 24th for an evening of food, music and fun. King Zulu-elect 2024 Marvin Labat will be in attendance. This event is open to all Zulu members, family, and friends. [] HOST SHAWN AT AN EVENT [events@wilsonforla.com?subject=Host%20Shawn%20At%20An%20Event] To learn more about my candidacy visit wilsonforla.com [wilsonforla.com] . With hope, Shawn Wilson DONATE [] ENDORSE [] LEARN MORE [WILSONFORLA.COM] [] [] [] [] Wilson for Louisiana P.O. Box 4572 Baton Rouge, LA 70821 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

Fellow American,
We both know that Florida’s farmers and ranchers are no strangers to adversity.
Hurricanes, sudden freezes, devouring swarms of insects: Florida’s agricultural producers have weathered it all and come out stronger every time.
However, nothing from Florida’s swamps is as disastrous to our farms than what comes out of The Swamp in D.C..
Democrats in D.C. want to use the Farm Bill to give breaks to multinational corporations while Florida’s family farms struggle.
Thankfully, Florida’s farmers and ranchers have a champion in Kat Cammack, who is fighting to make sure that America’s agricultural producers have the support they need and the voice they deserve.

Fellow American, What are the Democrats doing...
Right now, Congress is crafting the latest Farm Bill and Florida’s farmers and ranchers have the most to lose.
As the only Florida Republican serving on the House Agriculture Committee, I take this responsibility very seriously.
Unfair trade deals have flooded America’s markets with poor quality foreign produce while Florida’s farmers and ranchers continue to struggle.
That is why, I have opposed measures which make the United States reliant on foreign supply chains and I have fought to make fresh, healthy Florida foods available to all Americans.
[I can’t win this battle alone, my friend. Join me and show your support for Florida’s farmers! clean_body: | | | | Florida’s farmers need our help... Fellow American, We both know that Florida’s farmers and ranchers are no strangers to adversity. Hurricanes, sudden freezes, devouring swarms of insects: Florida’s agricultural producers have weathered it all and come out stronger every time. However, nothing from Florida’s swamps is as disastrous to our farms than what comes out of The Swamp in D.C.. Democrats in D.C. want to use the Farm Bill to give breaks to multinational corporations while Florida’s family farms struggle. Thankfully, Florida’s farmers and ranchers have a champion in Kat Cammack, who is fighting to make sure that America’s agricultural producers have the support they need and the voice they deserve. Show your support for Florida’s farmers and ranchers and let’s keep Kat in the fight! Thank you, Team Kat \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Kat Cammack Subject: Fight for Our Farmers To: %%Email%% Begin forwarded message: Fellow American, What are the Democrats doing... Right now, Congress is crafting the latest Farm Bill and Florida’s farmers and ranchers have the most to lose. As the only Florida Republican serving on the House Agriculture Committee, I take this responsibility very seriously. Unfair trade deals have flooded America’s markets with poor quality foreign produce while Florida’s farmers and ranchers continue to struggle. That is why, I have opposed measures which make the United States reliant on foreign supply chains and I have fought to make fresh, healthy Florida foods available to all Americans. With your help, we will ensure thatFlorida’s agricultural producers receive the support they neednot just this year, butfor generations to come. | | | | | Florida’s agricultural producers deserve our support! As the sole Florida Republican representative at the negotiating table, I will not back down. Thank you, | | Rep. Kat Cammack Congresswoman FL-3 | | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Team Kat 5200 NW 43rd st, suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 \- =

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=10117b31151e4ba595bd42e89b1964b6&_e=4toBuhCNRTcfnIlm1DcafqWThC8WtkdSX_GqPaa5uue1LelZrdYSAs6GtOm1DUY21VFc3BCfsVV51h7ay-axJaL3khPjY7dakpbfuD8DnulTIh2db6K96MaEOzjB_5rj423o2XCOBKg8q1D-f7N0yFJ0Mge4mcS25nwWuzUxNTDZvLiOdJsQmUmHOicq8CL2s2WZBAx9LvyJkqFwhiluoxQ6H85zHrm06vzTDjDfHNFx6U4RUi8CmA7Pa6Qveh6DzYyvkBzytNMs_SGPin24FKDiWTr7JE6at3V0M5tz8ALvkOPnnmkCsyVwgc0kVmMmnIrvh7QGfewPv--lzNjgjheuPnNJhYL65pPLxRqdsek5C7OULEAu0lXm2WS4atc8J9HaEArghGX_Wib1grfP9lCUfuM2mzTL0ytF5kYzERE%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=10117b31151e4ba595bd42e89b1964b6&_e=4toBuhCNRTcfnIlm1DcafqWThC8WtkdSX_GqPaa5uue1LelZrdYSAs6GtOm1DUY21VFc3BCfsVV51h7ay-axJaL3khPjY7dakpbfuD8DnulTIh2db6K96MaEOzjB_5rj423o2XCOBKg8q1D-f7N0yFJ0Mge4mcS25nwWuzUxNTDZvLiOdJsQmUmHOicq8CL2s2WZBAx9LvyJkqFwhiluoxQ6H85zHrm06vzTDjDfHNFx6U4RUi8CmA7Pa6Qveh6DzYyvkBzytNMs_SGPin24FK43wcqY_rJRZlVAE9NmuerswylulzSEwQICfB8yE6HIW-A_xWslGLzpbcVhzCw00m0aX5aSgJ-BFDEnzczfPqwH45uKvg8ZOisdOgqstIXTWtROCkRIQQ5B10G6vYFWjzXGMRNWtZ7kenimpoXtSLw%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=10117b31151e4ba595bd42e89b1964b6&_e=4toBuhCNRTcfnIlm1DcafqWThC8WtkdSX_GqPaa5uue1LelZrdYSAs6GtOm1DUY21VFc3BCfsVV51h7ay-axJaL3khPjY7dakpbfuD8DnulTIh2db6K96MaEOzjB_5rj423o2XCOBKg8q1D-f7N0yFJ0Mge4mcS25nwWuzUxNTDZvLiOdJsQmUmHOicq8CL2s2WZBAx9LvyJkqFwhiluoxQ6H85zHrm06vzTDjDfHNFx6U4RUi8CmA7Pa6Qveh6DzYyvkBzytNMs_SGPin24FMNwB4aKipZWR9kvx7zHHGX9QYGwi9zr0puk-YiCsKc-_ALHByd4AQORmlt7rf3R1gdTOMA0D9AxY413u34xFBN57OtO6VdU9VL7Zf7rWT1mnakQIS8MD8OsVuDaOXi67wpnuivSyJmGWF4preQfghk%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=10117b31151e4ba595bd42e89b1964b6&_e=4toBuhCNRTcfnIlm1DcafqWThC8WtkdSX_GqPaa5uue1LelZrdYSAs6GtOm1DUY21VFc3BCfsVV51h7ay-axJaL3khPjY7dakpbfuD8DnulTIh2db6K96MaEOzjB_5rj423o2XCOBKg8q1D-f7N0yFJ0Mge4mcS25nwWuzUxNTDZvLiOdJsQmUmHOicq8CL2s2WZBAx9LvyJkqFwhiluoxQ6H85zHrm06vzTDjDfHNFx6U4RUi8CmA7Pa6Qveh6DzYyvkBzytNMs_SGPin24FK9de8IweK_L84UzhPj8CvVjC0iNoiACbmfEWrk8wS-w9nJDeWuISjF29vyBn61G8qM_LTqyrG6b0yFnn17qyQfBTwG5uv3bGe_KHc0oYRRT8Bvdkld68dwuOOafphBomccQkCEJXbRHtDKYt-Ksl54%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

clean_body: After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law | | | | | Fellow American, There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: It’s time for Ted Cruz to go, and Colin Allred is going to be the one to unseat him.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Friends -
I am reaching out with a humble request today.
**[Can you please contribute $5, $10, or $50 to Colin Allred’s campaign for Senate today? 100% of your contribution will go directly towards supporting Colin’s campaign to unseat Ted Cruz.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-solo.C_PvF0&refcode=em230812-1-t1&t=1&akid=4731%2E196590%2E7YfULf)
Extremist Republicans like Ted Cruz have threatened and targeted our fundamental democratic freedoms time and time again for personal gain. Whether it be limiting abortion access, banning books, or disenfranchising voters, nothing is off the table if Republicans regain control of the Senate.
Our democracy is fragile, and a Republican Senate majority is dangerous.
**_But we have a clear path to guaranteeing we keep the Senate blue, and that path runs through Texas with Colin Allred.**_
Colin Allred is taking on Ted Cruz because he believes Texans deserve a Senator that will prioritize people over politics.
Colin is a lifelong Texan who has witnessed and _experienced_ the challenges working families face in Texas firsthand. Raised by a single mother — a public school teacher who worked two jobs to support her family — he knows what families need to succeed and **will** deliver results.
But Colin is in one of the most challenging fights in the nation, taking on extremist Ted Cruz and the millions of dollars his GOP allies will throw behind him. They know Colin is the candidate that can defeat Cruz and will spend all they can to stop him.
So we have a real opportunity to help Colin and flip this seat. **[Will you please contribute whatever you can to Colin Allred’s campaign for Senate in Texas? 100% of your donation will go directly to his campaign.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-solo.C_PvF0&refcode=em230812-1-t1&t=2&akid=4731%2E196590%2E7YfULf)
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-allred-solo.C_PvF0&refcode=em230812-1-t1&t=3&akid=4731%2E196590%2E7YfULf)
We've all watched Ted Cruz fail his constituents for years and choose himself and his corporate donors’ interests repeatedly. It’s time for him to go, and Colin Allred is going to be the one to unseat him.
Let’s do this,
Mandela

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=4731%2E196590%2E7YfULf).
