clean_body: Friends - I am reaching out with a humble request today. Extremist Republicans like Ted Cruz have threatened and targeted our fundamental democratic freedoms time and time again for personal gain. Whether it be limiting abortion access, banning books, or disenfranchising voters, nothing is off the table if Republicans regain control of the Senate. Our democracy is fragile, and a Republican Senate majority is dangerous. But we have a clear path to guaranteeing we keep the Senate blue, and that path runs through Texas with Colin Allred. Colin Allred is taking on Ted Cruz because he believes Texans deserve a Senator that will prioritize people over politics. Colin is a lifelong Texan who has witnessed and experienced the challenges working families face in Texas firsthand. Raised by a single mother — a public school teacher who worked two jobs to support her family — he knows what families need to succeed and will deliver results. But Colin is in one of the most challenging fights in the nation, taking on extremist Ted Cruz and the millions of dollars his GOP allies will throw behind him. They know Colin is the candidate that can defeat Cruz and will spend all they can to stop him. So we have a real opportunity to help Colin and flip this seat. We've all watched Ted Cruz fail his constituents for years and choose himself and his corporate donors’ interests repeatedly. It’s time for him to go, and Colin Allred is going to be the one to unseat him. Let’s do this, Mandela

That kid is me, and I can tell you personally that he never thought he’d have to face the struggles I’ve encountered. But I can also tell you that he never would’ve thought he’d feel the profound happiness that I feel to be loved and supported by my family. **I can also PROMISE he never thought he’d grow up and run for Congress one day.** But that’s exactly what I’m doing. [**Can you rush in $1, $5, or even $25 to help me reach my $3,000 mid-month goal?**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=ddc09d66b1ed42658b704a55f9c3574d&_e=Ro1vvrbnmL4ddfnfvcNAU7fD0-gQVtwRDlDSFyxfILjb-Ozws_PnK22YkH99dQMeE4UgJpCmExgWDVDA3AmHR7HzSsEDHldPNx6UWgGUZ602gdImaFi12x2R_jlqGNrO2Uuw5G0EhW1dQJEWWIPvYzNtV0LT2sq_ehEF5Ocdmg084-Qvk6F8PhHUTlax5HheibWb4Q41gZG0u5aIYL1i06uTAjezcR1iqvgCn-icaxXZhJEvTgVP8i3fKVBWW8MBMDg9GwAqJWMwHpxDVUZb1a7Dtg3iFwntcPoJLMAiCj_vdsT3IuXEaXOWHs7y_0jILcPCnPLJtI2rEi-Wm9WVET8gobyLnRBpf94ODRY-Qco4V5-UJqVhT2aQU8hmiy22Qj43HKeNWduO1AZsB1Wjbw%3D%3D) I’m running to make sure little kids can grow up in a safe and prosperous world – to make sure that there are opportunities for them to feel the happiness that I’ve gotten the chance to feel. **[I hope that you’ll help me make that aspiration a reality by chipping into my campaign before our mid-month deadline on Thursday night.](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=ddc09d66b1ed42658b704a55f9c3574d&_e=Ro1vvrbnmL4ddfnfvcNAU7fD0-gQVtwRDlDSFyxfILjb-Ozws_PnK22YkH99dQMeE4UgJpCmExgWDVDA3AmHR7HzSsEDHldPNx6UWgGUZ602gdImaFi12x2R_jlqGNrO2Uuw5G0EhW1dQJEWWIPvYzNtV0LT2sq_ehEF5Ocdmg084-Qvk6F8PhHUTlax5HheibWb4Q41gZG0u5aIYL1i06uTAjezcR1iqvgCn-icaxXZhJEvTgVP8i3fKVBWW8MBJYNGdM3OE8eTdI_NTawO0J6Y7Azzwh671QIT2MANHM0jr6q4oWiKYbmmAWxsp_TIUIYoB0PwFtZEAR_M6Fq9m35-Tz-jSWw1Ei_WXzYa00Vp9aQUdJyVsnwyEWFzQBRm_GI4HSU400d9pt-eBIi_jw%3D%3D)** It’s the middle of the quarter, and we can’t afford to fall short. Thank you for anything you can give. – John **My story is not unique.** I was born and raised in Pennsylvania in rural, blue-collar, and old coal mining communities. I'm a proud husband and father to three amazing children. I witnessed firsthand how both major political parties have neglected rural communities and left behind working families. I'm running to build a movement and a government that works for working families. [**Join me.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=ddc09d66b1ed42658b704a55f9c3574d&_e=Ro1vvrbnmL4ddfnfvcNAU-jhx2i-AwsD6KoMctbG92eF75pO2ng3jkldMeUu49CYkgIhCdjz5YbYYx_b58pUUuaDH1k1IRpgdimkWViKEg7Q9S815H9UcouT9E0NRrLJCsWFbnSCxMLLCvxOB-odL3nCSTl2c__E8fcldjnROGwt47-4TbySUVCmCJvvTp7khh1vMWoHLRU6E5YiM-hu8w%3D%3D) [DONATE MONTHLY](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=ddc09d66b1ed42658b704a55f9c3574d&_e=Ro1vvrbnmL4ddfnfvcNAU7fD0-gQVtwRDlDSFyxfILjb-Ozws_PnK22YkH99dQMeE4UgJpCmExgWDVDA3AmHR7HzSsEDHldPNx6UWgGUZ602gdImaFi12x2R_jlqGNrO2Uuw5G0EhW1dQJEWWIPvYzNtV0LT2sq_ehEF5Ocdmg084-Qvk6F8PhHUTlax5HheibWb4Q41gZG0u5aIYL1i06uTAjezcR1iqvgCn-icaxU76w7r8Pa-HS8bS8VOnkhpF_oVGjRa2iYg0SwxXVW-wNKYHy7ki4ecTM8M0107RRkDfa9V4Rx9UOMHqiaZoc8iHdW2vuE8Gt-cW6Mx5SGjyupzTqpNYYtuucN5lKBUqtYIrMZaYPnw8be1MReIi8WqLovAKL-MJ9SLpW6gfeXuXetRMcGLLDJ_NzOUV2T8lBM%3D) Paid for by Padora for Colorado

Peter, Republicans have already named me a top target for this coming election. I won’t sugarcoat it: this is going to be a tough fight ahead. The attacks have already started, but that's why it's so important to build a strong foundation now to prepare for any possible attacks ahead.

Last year, _we won by just 4 points_ , and Republicans view this district as an opportunity to pick up another seat. But Democratic victory here in Rhode Island brings us one step closer to taking back our majority – and we can win again in 2024 if we keep up our early organizing. That starts with hitting every fundraising benchmark, including our mid-month deadline on Tuesday.

[So Peter, will you chip in right away to help us meet our mid-month goal and take back our House majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67979842/421521437/1542275797?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20230812_FR_mmfr1.1_0_1MO_sethmagaziner_NA_NA_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDE5MzQwZS0xZTM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3EgSvhp0FiszxSJAJwNndgLR0g_CKCaBpyYDibHZkho=)

If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | On Tuesday, we are going to be halfway through August, so we are picking up the pace on our fundraising efforts. In politics, you’ll often hear of a summer slump – where fundraising energy hits a low during the summer. But each month brings us closer and closer to 2024, so now we need to fight back against this summer slump and build up our campaign. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Peter, Republicans have already named me a top target for this coming election. I won’t sugarcoat it: this is going to be a tough fight ahead. The attacks have already started, but that's why it's so important to build a strong foundation now to prepare for any possible attacks ahead. Last year, we won by just 4 points , and Republicans view this district as an opportunity to pick up another seat. But Democratic victory here in Rhode Island brings us one step closer to taking back our majority – and we can win again in 2024 if we keep up our early organizing. That starts with hitting every fundraising benchmark, including our mid-month deadline on Tuesday. = Thanks, Seth | = PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress PO BOX 40993, PROVIDENCE, RI 02940 If you’d like to unsubscribe, . name: Pat Rynard, Courier Newsroom
subject: Ron DeSantis blocked one of our journalists from covering his event
body:
We must be doing something right.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1379%2E120351%2EVWKySO)
Hi Peter, I’m Pat Rynard — Founder of _Iowa Starting Line_ , part of the Courier Newsroom family.
Here in Iowa, the 2024 presidential election is operating at a sprint. Our team has been busy covering events and appearances by all the candidates to ensure our readers have the facts they need.
**Before yesterday, we had covered nine Ron DeSantis events, but then this happened:**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230812?refcode=em20230812&amount=5&refcode2=1379_120351_VWKySO&akid=1379%2E120351%2EVWKySO)
No other media outlets were excluded from the event, just our reporters — with no explanation.
Peter, our reporters were there to do what they do best: record the facts, publish the story, and keep Iowans all across the state informed about what a DeSantis presidency could mean for them.
**If that scares Ron DeSantis, then we must be doing something right.**
[**Like all of Courier’s newsrooms, we’re fighting to deliver trustworthy local news to the communities that need it most. Heading into such a consequential election, that need has never been greater. If you believe in our work, will you chip in $5 now to help us spread our stories far and wide?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230812?refcode=em20230812&amount=5&refcode2=1379_120351_VWKySO&akid=1379%2E120351%2EVWKySO)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230812?refcode=em20230812&amount=5&refcode2=1379_120351_VWKySO&akid=1379%2E120351%2EVWKySO)**
Thanks for supporting our work,
Pat Rynard
_Founder, Iowa Starting Line_
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=2&refcode2=1379_120351_VWKySO&akid=1379%2E120351%2EVWKySO)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1379%2E120351%2EVWKySO)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

subject: Did you see what’s happening in Virginia?
body:
Our ability to block Gov. Youngkin’s far-right agenda and pass meaningful legislation hinges on electing strong Dems to lead the VA House. We only need to flip a few seats to retake control. | | |

We only need to flip five seats to retake control. Your contribution today could help put Democrats over the top. Early investments right now go much further than those made in the weeks and months leading up to Election Day. Supporting our efforts to take back the Virginia House from Republicans will help make a lasting impact on the lives of millions of families across Virginia. November’s elections are pivotal. name: Bob Casey
subject: What we need to continue making progress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Pennsylvania is a top target for the GOP in their attempt to flip the Senate
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=439%2E552475%2EF1rfQ5)
Hey Peter,
From day one of this campaign, we knew Pennsylvania would be a top target for the GOP in their attempt to flip the Senate.
**But now, Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are recruiting an ultra-wealthy hedge fund executive to run in our race – and we need to be prepared.**
So my team and I are setting a goal: **$45,000 in online contributions before our mid-quarter deadline on August 15th so we can fight back.**
[**I hope that you'll rush $5 or whatever you can right now so we can reach our goal and defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230812-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230812-1&refcode2=439_552475_F1rfQ5&akid=439%2E552475%2EF1rfQ5)
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230812-1?refcode=em20230812-1&refcode2=439_552475_F1rfQ5&akid=439%2E552475%2EF1rfQ5)**
I'm proud of the work we've done on behalf of Pennsylvanians to improve the lives of our working families -- and we need to continue making progress. **But all of that could be at risk if we lose this battleground Senate race.**
With national GOP donors ready to pull out all the stops to win in Pennsylvania, it's clear we have to do all that we can to push back. That's why I am coming to ask our grassroots supporters:
[**Will you make your first donation to help us reach our $45,000 mid-quarter goal and hold our Senate majority?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230812-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230812-1&refcode2=439_552475_F1rfQ5&akid=439%2E552475%2EF1rfQ5)
Thank you for your support; it means so much to us.
With gratitude,
Bob Casey

name: =?utf-8?Q?Active=20Republican=20Women=20of=20Las=20Vegas?=
subject: August Newsletter - Save the Date - Sept. 12, 2023
body:
New Leadership and Fresh Vision

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/ebd00b09faea/august-newsletter-save-the-date-sept-12-2023?e=23eca40478)

** MEET YOUR NEW CLUB LEADERS!
------------------------------------------------------------

President Mimi Odicho
Treasurer Adella Solano
Secretary Erica Medley
The Active Republican Women of Las Vegas (ARW) has not been very active recently. But that's about to change! ARW has elected a new President - Mimi Odicho. Mimi was involved in our sister organization in Arizona for many years. After moving to Las Vegas, she immediately signed up for ARW only to find that the club was going through a rough transition. She immediately stepped up and volunteered to be President to get this longstanding club back on track.

Mimi appointed Erica Medley to serve as secretary and Adella Solano to serve as treasurer. Come to our next monthly meeting on September 12th and meet ARW's new leaders. We are excited to get to know all the members and work together to create a fresh vision for the club going forward.

President Mimi Odicho (left) with Nevada Federation of Republican Women (NvFRW) President Caroline Smith (right) after Mimi was elected President on May 12, 2023.
PRESIDENT MIMI B. ODICHO

Mimi is an activist, poet, teacher, and mother. She grew up as a simple farmer that learned how to work hard and be patient to harvest. Mimi has published five books about patriotism, loving our country, and loyalty to it. Mimi created a program called "Read for Your Hero" to recognize and respect true patriots.
TREASURER ADELLA SOLANO

Adella is a 49-year-old happily married woman with two wonderful children. Over 25 years ago, her family relocated from Albuquerque to Las Vegas, as her husband pursued a career in law enforcement by attending the police academy. For the past 21 years, they have called Las Vegas their home and raised their children here. Currently, Adella's kids reside in Austin, TX.

Professionally, Adella works as the events coordinator and assistant to the President at the Las Vegas Police Association (LVPPA). Additionally, she takes pride in producing the LVPPA podcast. Outside of her job, Adella is an active member of the Summerlin Rotary club, where she participates in various committees.

Adella's two greatest passions are sports and community service. Since she can remember, Adella has been an avid fan of the Raiders, supporting them wholeheartedly. She also finds fulfillment in giving back to the community that she loves.

With an important election year approaching, Adella feels a sense of responsibility as an American citizen to ensure that the right person is elected. Adella believes that active participation in the democratic process is crucial for a thriving society, and she is committed to doing her part to make a positive impact on our country.
SECRETARY ERICA C. MEDLEY
Erica is a business litigation attorney at Holland & Hart LLP. Erica grew up in Oregon and California and moved to Las Vegas in 2012 to attend UNLV Law School. After law school, Erica clerked at the Nevada Supreme Court and then joined the United States Air Force JAG Corps, where she served at Nellis Air Force Base as both a prosecutor and defense counsel. After the Air Force, Erica received her Master of Laws degree from Harvard Law School. Erica and her husband just welcomed their first child--a baby girl--in April 2023.

Our next meeting is
Tuesday, September 12th, 2023
from 5:30 to 8:00 p.m.

Las Vegas, NV 89135

Peter -

I came to Winston Salem North Carolina 32 years ago with a few bucks to my name and the hope for better days ahead. Through God’s blessing and my wife Kelly’s support, I was blessed to be a pastor for sixteen years. So, I know firsthand the despair that haunts so many.

But just like when I was a struggling young man, I have hope that there are **better days ahead.** I’m proud to act on that hope and pave the path forward for all North Carolinians.

**My name is Mark Walker, and I’m running to be the next Governor of the great state of North Carolina** [**because we desperately need a pastor to be part of the solution to the government’s greatest problems.**](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=9af6e183e0984465ab41508e64e0039b&_e=gAK-e0ohjAdK16plGl__C6M4pUUCDXeneEww1wSrpAOF8g7c8on6EWzODxwz54rDuAA5CDSYw40Sa8lhRM0jVQyvWj4nvo7r4pHvP1XNNI8E6_Vb_M8HJo1ic8PwacBBvplml9bS87ZKSNNsDuZGfFRF33ppjvBovupWL5my1xCGsLKtw6k3RjT4Nk89jkZ-2XriUoBEm25pcVuqyn9LjbOids7aaW6q3_kHlfaUXa7px_AVVY4_bE8ZD15C4KE2DQjw8wETNnCZeDWC3766BzBq-KbP3ER22_NSfb2e0qf0kPFNSnOcz4dDbgpw9SojzlS9ITyQqP_XW6_gZZrZQCPF1eVhP1ui2LQHwpdcEDgLyPRBtlJewp6T3z3_x_yQ)

[** SEND A PASTOR TO FIX THE GOVERNMENT **](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=9af6e183e0984465ab41508e64e0039b&_e=gAK-e0ohjAdK16plGl__C6M4pUUCDXeneEww1wSrpAOF8g7c8on6EWzODxwz54rDuAA5CDSYw40Sa8lhRM0jVQyvWj4nvo7r4pHvP1XNNI8E6_Vb_M8HJo1ic8PwacBBvplml9bS87ZKSNNsDuZGfFRF33ppjvBovupWL5my1xCGsLKtw6k3RjT4Nk89jkZ-2XriUoBEm25pcVuqyn9LjbOids7aaW6q3_kHlfaUXa6I4waDOQKHROy9VG_aW3_5mMr4Jh37MV3n085MYUrbc-E9kgK0njZfFtNo3MsA9Z0_TLs2gW2zo3_otgw_rLdEsrEsLOr6ztOHQZPN2DHsKOVj_MeaDxUGUfSMXq4Y-kq67IAiv7EIS_I5DL7THcOK)

_It’s clear: we’ve steered away from our core values as Conservatives._ We need a leader who is driven by family values, fights with integrity, and leads with conviction. That’s what I bring to the table.

But here’s the thing, Peter, being unapologetically conservative doesn’t have to mean wavering on your commitment to faith and leading with compassion. That’s exactly the kind of attitude we need in the Governor’s mansion. [**That’s why I’m in this fight.**](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=9af6e183e0984465ab41508e64e0039b&_e=gAK-e0ohjAdK16plGl__C6M4pUUCDXeneEww1wSrpAOF8g7c8on6EWzODxwz54rDuAA5CDSYw40Sa8lhRM0jVQyvWj4nvo7r4pHvP1XNNI8E6_Vb_M8HJo1ic8PwacBBvplml9bS87ZKSNNsDuZGfFRF33ppjvBovupWL5my1xCGsLKtw6k3RjT4Nk89jkZ-2XriUoBEm25pcVuqyn9LjbOids7aaW6q3_kHlfaUXa5vkbOB3ibr2Ad6AKNoW1oyKkIFFKLhpIYfOw7Ic3vdCtUz-sR7N9DH6CD8YZuTaDb0f_FjzjSj0iBPNXc5MGH9oLsTIE6AKXEeZc1VkS27w1af2Lnv885h9dXhGkjBRXxIYAa4LJ6ESd3es_gi8vAQ)

You have my commitment that I will bring the lessons I learned as a pastor and utilize them to create solutions for the American people. [**But I need your help to stay in this race. Can I count on your commitment of any amount today?**](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=9af6e183e0984465ab41508e64e0039b&_e=gAK-e0ohjAdK16plGl__C6M4pUUCDXeneEww1wSrpAOF8g7c8on6EWzODxwz54rDuAA5CDSYw40Sa8lhRM0jVQyvWj4nvo7r4pHvP1XNNI8E6_Vb_M8HJo1ic8PwacBBvplml9bS87ZKSNNsDuZGfFRF33ppjvBovupWL5my1xCGsLKtw6k3RjT4Nk89jkZ-2XriUoBEm25pcVuqyn9LjbOids7aaW6q3_kHlfaUXa4Yu7kFlCp_MB-bMmQxc0U4rZzlxLuFrI2cyRWFuUa4j6PuEZw8iuWizjDDTpbk0tdMEqHB1jLkhqfn2cbIe_QQpKQ0KnaYmCuRR6J8yAvkdcpFBaqWnLjnvUyBSSx2h5fcEvMGs4rWETzqCJKdZnmF)

[** INVEST IN MARK **](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=9af6e183e0984465ab41508e64e0039b&_e=gAK-e0ohjAdK16plGl__C6M4pUUCDXeneEww1wSrpAOF8g7c8on6EWzODxwz54rDuAA5CDSYw40Sa8lhRM0jVQyvWj4nvo7r4pHvP1XNNI8E6_Vb_M8HJo1ic8PwacBBvplml9bS87ZKSNNsDuZGfFRF33ppjvBovupWL5my1xCGsLKtw6k3RjT4Nk89jkZ-2XriUoBEm25pcVuqyn9LjbOids7aaW6q3_kHlfaUXa5Npw2T1wh_0PbyotzoiBxHv1xsWA20apI7cfeC2blLlknn_EfNaz1TUOAt5rii4xx-OswM4A5JKiDGFtj2Txd1a4HTOBo_2EX6m4jUQgKd3jpuSXUjxkLEoD2aKDWaC45YqgxnH_BI9ZovTIOh0cZO)

We are at a tipping point in America and North Carolina. This election is all about a battle for the hearts and minds of our children and grandchildren.

As long as I have the Lord's guidance and with Kelly next to me, I’ll take the fight to both the radicals and the political elites... but I need you with me.

[**I hope I can count on you today.**](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=9af6e183e0984465ab41508e64e0039b&_e=gAK-e0ohjAdK16plGl__C6M4pUUCDXeneEww1wSrpAOF8g7c8on6EWzODxwz54rDuAA5CDSYw40Sa8lhRM0jVQyvWj4nvo7r4pHvP1XNNI8E6_Vb_M8HJo1ic8PwacBBvplml9bS87ZKSNNsDuZGfFRF33ppjvBovupWL5my1xCGsLKtw6k3RjT4Nk89jkZ-2XriUoBEm25pcVuqyn9LjbOids7aaW6q3_kHlfaUXa5vAIVu0GU7sabGgHjsnheIRAbMAmKRAVyRrDd9N5TEHqUuDXRUHapiBfRCt7vEioLltWW4z-NosW9zFDtEE6skRpWprtDGac51wLs6EwR2pGXohGuwIQMhl49W8eH4b13Oy1_dGdgGcov7UY3Voo1w)

God bless,

Mark Walker

| Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

name: Team Alex Padilla
subject: Do you have a minute?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
Alex wants to hear from you
#

Hi there,
About once a month, we like to check in with a few of Alex’s top supporters to get your read on the most important issues facing our country.
**Today is the day, and you’ve been selected to share your thoughts!**
Friend, we noticed you haven’t taken our issues survey yet — and we want to hear from you! If you have a minute, it would mean a lot if you could take our survey and share your thoughts with Alex and our team.
[**Do you have a minute to take Alex’s survey? Here’s the first question:](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/August-Issue-Survey-2023-em/?source=em230812-1-15&refcode2=1476.159979.1nlPbx&akid=1476%2E159979%2E1nlPbx)**
[](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/August-Issue-Survey-2023-em/?source=em230812-1-15&refcode2=1476.159979.1nlPbx&akid=1476%2E159979%2E1nlPbx)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/August-Issue-Survey-2023-em/?source=em230812-1-15&refcode2=1476.159979.1nlPbx&akid=1476%2E159979%2E1nlPbx)**
Every day, Alex goes to work ready to fight for people like us. But in order to do that, he needs to know where we stand and what we prioritize.
So please, fill out our brief survey. It won’t take long, and it really does help Alex make sure he’s representing your interests in the U.S. Senate.
Thanks again,
Team Padilla
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/August-Issue-Survey-2023-em/?source=em230812-1-15&refcode2=1476.159979.1nlPbx&akid=1476%2E159979%2E1nlPbx)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=1476%2E159979%2E1nlPbx)

Peter,
We’re living in a critical moment for our democracy. That’s why Emerge is ramping up our programs to empower bold Democratic women to lead. We just launched our second-ever Seated Together cohort – **[our program to empower trailblazing Black women in politics to rise to higher office!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67981809/421529131/-1688865842?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1269-su-nd&refcode=jtk1269-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxNzAwNGE0LTIxMzktZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=81yr8C_PUWq12AmIyOn_fDAC5EiJ2UCBTQ1BnWujPwc=&emci=1959087e-5338-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=317004a4-2139-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)**

body:
We're backing five candidates from Military and National Security backgrounds who can win
#
Hey Derek, hope you're enjoying your weekend.
After a lot of focus on Tuberville lately, we're coming to you with something a little different today.
There are important elections every year, and most of them don't get a ton of attention. Take Virginia, for example.
Virginia's legislature tipped towards the GOP in 2021, and a lot of the progress that was made under two consecutive Democratic Governors has been rolled back.
Virginia goes to the polls for their legislature this year, and we can have a huge impact in determining the balance of power. So we're backing thirteen candidates from Military and National Security backgrounds who can win.
We're funneling money into these races. We’re advising them on strategy and tactics, using the resources and expertise we’ve built up over the years. And we’re getting a ground game ready to get voters to the polls.
And as we plan our next steps, we wanted to come to you.
**[Could you make your first $5 donation and help us support our candidates in Virginia? We’ll put it to good use in our efforts to take back the state house.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august23.WcYsFQ&refcode=em230812-1-15&t=1&akid=15610%2E3013755%2EhMsQkL)**

name: Team Pramila
subject: All that we can achieve by passing Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We all know the problem. The United States healthcare system is the worst of any advanced economy in the world.
#
Peter,
We all know the problem. The United States healthcare system is the worst of any advanced economy in the world. Nearly 30 million Americans are uninsured. Those who are insured face skyrocketing premiums, deductibles, and out-of-pocket costs. Millions cannot afford their prescriptions. **It's a cruel system and we must take action.**
**We all know how to fix it. The United States can and must join every other major country on earth in guaranteeing health care as a right. Every person should be able to go to the doctor if they are sick. Every person should be able to go to the hospital without going bankrupt after.**
**We all know we need Medicare for All.**[**If you stand with Pramila and our movement to elect candidates who support universal health care for everyone no matter their race, ethnicity, zip code, or ability to pay, please add your name and amplify our petition today.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-medicare-for-all-signon/?source=em20230812-2804&t=1&akid=2804%2E420207%2E4ie2cU)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-medicare-for-all-signon/?source=em20230812-2804&t=2&akid=2804%2E420207%2E4ie2cU)**
Americans shouldn't have to worry about taking on mountains of medical debt just because they got sick — and with the Medicare for All Act of 2023, no one would be put in this position ever again.
**By passing the Medicare for All Act of 2023, we will ensure that:**
* Everyone will have health care coverage, including dental, vision, hearing, and long term care.
* Expensive premiums, deductibles, co-pays, and other out of pocket costs will be eliminated completely.
* Roughly 95% of all U.S. households would save money on health care costs.
* The U.S. would save over $450 billion on health expenses annually.

[**Please add your name today and join our fight to finally put an end to corporate greed in our healthcare system and cement universal health care in our democracy for generations to come.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-medicare-for-all-signon/?source=em20230812-2804&t=3&akid=2804%2E420207%2E4ie2cU)
Thank you,
Team Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230812-2804-footer&t=4&refcode2=2804_420207_4ie2cU&akid=2804%2E420207%2E4ie2cU)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=5&akid=2804%2E420207%2E4ie2cU)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2804%2E420207%2E4ie2cU)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Joe Biden
subject: Charlottesville
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
That moment made clear to me: We were living through a battle for the soul of this nation. And we still are. | | |
---
**Today marks six years since hate and extremism marched from the shadows in Charlottesville, Virginia.** Crazed, angry faces illuminated by torches. Chants echoing the same anti-Semitic bile heard across Europe in the 1930s. Neo-Nazis, Klansmen, and white supremacists emerging into the bright light of day on the streets of a historically significant American city. A young woman, standing up to them, was killed. And a president said in that darkest of moments -- there were good people on both sides. **That moment made clear to me: We were living through a battle for the soul of this nation.__And we still are.__** Right now, extreme MAGA politicians across the country are working to undermine our basic freedoms. _Defending insurrectionists who attacked our democracy on January 6th._ _Burying history and banning books._ _Dictating what health care decisions women can make. Curtailing voting rights._ _And so much more._ _I know we can stop them -- because I know America._ I know we’re good and decent people. I know we’re still a country that believes in honesty, respect, and treating people with dignity. _**We are a nation where we give hate no safe harbor. We believe that everyone should be treated equally, and everyone should get a fair shot.**_ _**And I know this -- silence is complicity. And we will not remain silent.**_ Six years ago, Charlottesville motivated me to run for president in the first place. The way millions of people like you stood up for our core values motivated me to run again -- and to finish the job. What’s at stake for America is nothing less than who we are, what we believe, and perhaps most importantly, who we are going to be. **Joined together, we will win this battle for our soul of America. Because if there’s one thing I know about the American people, it’s this: there is nothing beyond our capacity when we do it together.** Keep the faith. Joe Joe Biden

# [Sign your name: Demand Senator Tuberville stop putting our nation's defense at risk ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2012df7a-aee8-4006-9204-6e31d289a16e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | For months, hundreds of critically important defense jobs have been left unfilled because GOP Senator Tommy Tuberville of Alabama has put a "hold" on them. [**This needs to stop NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T926d21f6-cada-4489-ade0-034e7caae144/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

**Tuberville is doing this to score points with anti-abortion extremists** , who object to the military covering travel expenses for service members who need the procedure.

Tuberville is putting our nation at risk and degrading our defense with each passing day. We can't let this continue. We need to ratchet up the pressure.

[**Add your name, and demand Tuberville end his hold ****NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5bb99be3-b145-4cc8-82be-85bc43440611/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

In the latest update, a total of 45 countries are preparing to join the BRICS alliance weeks ahead of the summit. The new country that expressed interest and formally submitted its application to join the BRICS bloc is [Palestine](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=941291baf2&e=8edd2b8f7d). A growing number of countries are showing discontent with the U.S. dollar and America’s control over global finances. Therefore, BRICS is making use of the dissatisfaction by convincing other countries to ditch the U.S. dollar and trade in native currencies.
[Continue reading...](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=635b7cfdd2&e=8edd2b8f7d)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Pukita=2C=20GFI?=
subject: Download our FREE app!
body:
Download our FREE app for Apple and Android now! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=345c64e17a&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| | |
**The "420K Project"**
** **
**\- also known as -**
** **
**The "3.5% Project"**

---
|
There has been much research done on what percent of the population is needed for a civic movement to reach a tipping point. Where the movement achieves enough mass to be able to affect the change it wants. Not just to not be ignored, not just to have its voice heard, but to accomplish its objective. That number is 3.5%. In Ohio, with a population of about 12M people, 3.5% equates to 420,000 people.

For this reason, we're kicking-off the "420K Project" which we'll also call the "3.5% Project". Our goal is to connect & organize 420,000 Ohioans who love America, but don't like it right now. 420K Ohioans who are fed up with the corruption, dishonesty, and lies we see, read, and hear daily from all the institutions we previously respected. Government. Academia. Legacy Media. Political Parties. Churches. Non-profits. Charities. The list is endless.

The 2016 and 2020 elections started a movement in Ohio and America. They woke people up. Our goal is to build on this by using every tool available to reach the tipping point, to connect 3.5% of Ohioans, to unite 420,000 of us.

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=881ae5cb4f&e=5c740fa3e2)

* * *
---
|
---
| |
**What can you do to help TODAY?**

---
|
Over the coming weeks, we'll be sharing our statewide strategy for the "420K Project" also known as the "3.5% Project". It's simple, but not easy. As a teaser, here's an image from the strategy presentation:

Today, you can do two things.

**First** , download our new app calle**d GFI _connect_**. It's available for both Google and Android and it's **FREE**.

Go **[HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=5e08517133&e=5c740fa3e2)** to download and install **GFI _connect_** , or click on the image below.

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=3664bb201a&e=5c740fa3e2)

**Second** , you can forward this message to 5 friends or family members who you feel would be willing to consider joining us. Please ask them to download and install the **GFI _connect_** app, but also ask them to fill out the questionnaire found **[HERE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e293966c6b&e=5c740fa3e2)** or by clicking on the image below:

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=32eff07d2a&e=5c740fa3e2)

**South/60 • North/30** is part of our effort to ACTIVATE more Ohioans to our movement while the **GFI _connect_** app is a way to UNITE, COMMUNICATE with, ORGANIZE, and EDUCATE those in our movement, striving for constant improvement of our knowledge, skills, and tactics.
---
|
---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
|
[July 30, 2023 - Select Better Candidates

July 23, 2023 - Help Trevor Cain](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=dbdcb5a9a1&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|
---
| **How Can You Help GFI?**
You can help GFI by inviting your friends & family to become part of our **network**. You can forward them this email and ask them to:

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b3a61b9687&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| If you want to text an invite to someone, just cut and paste this into a text (or email):

I'm a part of the Grassroots Freedom Initiative (GFI) network. Please accept my invitation to join me.

Together, through GFI, people like us across Ohio are building the largest, off-grid, network of Ohio patriots. Just click the link below to get started!

Thanks!

[http://eepurl.com/h1wIZ5](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d94b52c5d4&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
mark@gfiohio.com
614-499-0599 (c)**
---
| | _Copyright © 2023 The Grassroots Freedom Initiative, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
The Grassroots Freedom Initiative4240 Hobbs Landing Dr WDublin, OH 43017-6025
[Add us to your address book](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=edaf17b349) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=edaf17b349).

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: What real freedom means to me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Hey Derek – you may have heard me talk about a thing called “real freedom.” Here’s what I mean: Real freedom means being able to thrive, no matter who you are, who you love, where you’re from, what you look like, or who you pray to. It means the opportunity to live in strong communities, with schools where our kids can feel safe and be safe. And it means that our most fundamental rights – like the freedom to vote, the freedom to choose, and the freedom to love – always remain protected. Real freedom is what _every_ Pennsylvanian deserves – and that’s what I’m fighting for every day as Governor. [_**If you believe that real freedom and real opportunity should never be taken away, will you chip in $10 to support our team? name: David Hogg, Leaders We Deserve
subject: we scare the shit out of Republicans.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is the biggest thing we’ve ever been a part of. | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. Hey Peter — it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives.

The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain.

But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans.

**That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve** — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future.

[We can’t do this without you by our side. Will you become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and The Collective PAC today?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xXVYKa6mzuP4rslwapSs_0NyM1-xjxtM1FS4r0L7mDSFL7388yo6Tj87uVZ9fRAPqTKvIwbUJaeHPaPrfCWAZKttmkM3jkW_Exc_ZRy1r7_F8LjxN4dibnx1n8IZQb4u-ERo4DMnotPYj4OFbethJEVIg3Edu30vJazpjH2iRvPJ9bk82gNpvYXJm0ShSrmZUDw-acTHK8P1KAl98F19XNbhF4LROhnftxlPziMEwKrhPb3MzX24kmm1A3_2KkOuXiXX55qm9ntoK9KCKTb7p9_p65Rh6kyppPZnZ3G78iJjeeBUdFTrKBrgF2-pNEWOueemhB0_kccXs0YkyNzhhLmgp4MJDh52b_2apXZLjK-2NuFRN9tq7OS3Bm5JsRAn0OTQvStA8uLByDivH6-deMZua0ArbVvOBmKKm9mVuR0f0jLMN5XuCQ9inv0E6CORWhZUdrinz3uJRW-KvgOTWE/3yo/m717M4GsSGaKhRCuvzhstA/h2/rsi__OM0vhFZrqXYX38hX_FUWwTycn0TwXslVqMwOFk)

I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change.

It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats.

Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office.

**Let’s prove them wrong, Peter.**

[That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you become a Founding Donor to Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation with The Collective PAC today?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xXVYKa6mzuP4rslwapSs_0NyM1-xjxtM1FS4r0L7mDSFL7388yo6Tj87uVZ9fRAPqTKvIwbUJaeHPaPrfCWAZKttmkM3jkW_Exc_ZRy1r7_F8LjxN4dibnx1n8IZQb4u-ERo4DMnotPYj4OFbethJEVIg3Edu30vJazpjH2iRvPJ9bk82gNpvYXJm0ShSrmZULOYaB1p3K1T-_I3bmu4PsdoLDPmQj1vqhcUCTKAEVR9oaqw_melerVefgJ5hLYRsB1OJUXh7dGKbkhgY4yzTOHgBnzaUT3VRH90Nipx70KoP6zS7b7tRdL0r9zfFw0m0bJLEGsDN6CGXlvllEwlrE7Oi5KDS-x_zqQxuYsH-k5FHhtI8YcOG3NQOqUGam1VEhMPgF43pck-STbGaYZt2Mo1WN5YFv9Ti9O16vHgPAN0KKQ1KELcSietLuhRF71hhfh64Ak7x1ySaBh228_GBc/3yo/m717M4GsSGaKhRCuvzhstA/h3/4g6f6Wz87M6HqFD3XbbjHGl-YnITTa3KtgxHo8O2gbY)

Let’s do this,

David Hogg
Co-founder
Leaders We Deserve

We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz
subject: Subcommittee Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Raul Ruiz For Congress Committee P
body:
it’s been a little bit since our last update... | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, [please click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC1zXjOgMKTq1qg9b7LMk8NY4biyiGBVJXIDelS7m60cKaXwQDfsi6wVlrlpGB5RcgfuIIHe6hd8iOGFvsd6XbH6bPGloasmPsNPOUCpYuDqjrfWXPulk7ACO8jglUSTg0SFkDqwwdbQnnES7PMCCugtR3jAQOkI1surwz_qrOK2tjWRoQDoLL2It2ShcrdqsAzxgdipt09iUKaYYS3c2h2dZZAJG4SQo9Whqvqo7BEfmQEYzHJWa9EGRkAJbTDcqmb13OPsTfSs6xAPF2niH6g/3yo/dqtWDez4QaKCChlXQw-t9g/h0/Le_uwyR5u68BRpDZe506Z2szySPz0ZcQiYUketQyLzo) And if you have a moment, please read our message below.
---
[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yDlvnM2jBW9sbXZMScUxaDDAZib5N3I5cZ-7Y6cDGksPKXTlKvsGpCXSzqyy_eJwH5WRhl4jsOTFLOdM1474NNcth7_S9sR22NmZndwJR3bG1-NqVEgUrJmdn_bVl-Jrc1MOYbdkCwHgiIwVim6KJqFiEpLNgudJa1OqtbeScjGRIrGvvlSkH6PDzPy8yNsBDIyaHd3Oj0LPNvrCHE-A7GxTIxVD4-Qf3tUj8lklyD3zFZFBG8piX43eaAAnGWXQ6Hw5McyhuyDyyfxOQiH4nMUm5V-Q6BuF6crNDv-stm-2-Baa1R5vKJRoBmo7y4Alg/3yo/dqtWDez4QaKCChlXQw-t9g/h1/KkQdRepGYfEhDDIa9h_oDXu9vWhViJ4zOMC49PjNFPs)
Folks, it’s been quite a while since I last gave you an update on the Select Subcommittee on the Coronavirus Pandemic, on which I serve as the ranking member.

[**_If you don’t have time to read the whole email, but you support my efforts to stamp out extreme Republican lies and protect the American people, would you consider donating to my campaign? »_**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKf71R59ZzmOlsyq-YAIOi3gpLM3UnwxESNJb94Im3-51svk0ZvuBSTsv1H2a1rzBXeambMZhV9T8hPGmlxcfFXzxcp1TNqbocl7oVd3EfoaFU1tJ0CnAWodU4PfQFCHpA8A5J1TyHcv-p3j-SY46l1DVdrRwyvrk5IpoKNcvT74e2NuYHGEWWr-ETqgQGFKAv00uOqCHM9clIVljYQzCiBFO8gp2kEyBpPpkzYtBXWG3XnMntHi8y9eMleiWotRVpZdbdZM2OM3OQkzMrx_YXWB3YFQAV2VqO4oggJgzXBWe63BtKWDKsONujR-Ww2eR62BFle9CZlys2ziaZ8atSg02ZKQNnCjZtn6X47y7T3p8/3yo/dqtWDez4QaKCChlXQw-t9g/h2/OuaVL920Hv7xs82Qdz0uCahkFXrcTU-aE-Zh51_h3bs) **It’s been frustrating, friend.** When we last spoke I updated you that MAGA Republicans were using precious committee time to promote fringe beliefs and attack public health experts, all to justify and placate the views of their most extreme supporters.

**I wish I could say things have gotten better.** The awful truth is that three million-plus individuals died, and Trump Republicans have only deepened their rhetoric, their accusations, and their fringe beliefs not backed up by data. **-** I’m tired of the National GOP cherry picking evidence.
**-** I’m tired of them disregarding the truth of what’s in front of them.
**\- And I’m tired of their lies.** Listen, I agree with the public health experts on this one: **If we can’t even agree on what to investigate, much less how to go about it, Covid will be further politicized and the nation will be more vulnerable to future pandemics.**

And at a time when MAGA Republicans in DC are voting on bills to slash funding for the World Health Organization, CDC, and FDA – it’s up to us to fight back.

[**So I’m counting on folks like you to help support my Democratic colleagues in our fight to take back the House and restore balance, science, and truth to the House. clean_body: it’s been a little bit since our last update... | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Folks, it’s been quite a while since I last gave you an update on the Select Subcommittee on the Coronavirus Pandemic, on which I serve as the ranking member. It’s been frustrating, friend. When we last spoke I updated you that MAGA Republicans were using precious committee time to promote fringe beliefs and attack public health experts, all to justify and placate the views of their most extreme supporters. I wish I could say things have gotten better. The awful truth is that three million-plus individuals died, and Trump Republicans have only deepened their rhetoric, their accusations, and their fringe beliefs not backed up by data. - I’m tired of the National GOP cherry picking evidence. - I’m tired of them disregarding the truth of what’s in front of them. \- And I’m tired of their lies. Listen, I agree with the public health experts on this one: If we can’t even agree on what to investigate, much less how to go about it, Covid will be further politicized and the nation will be more vulnerable to future pandemics. And at a time when MAGA Republicans in DC are voting on bills to slash funding for the World Health Organization, CDC, and FDA – it’s up to us to fight back. Thank you for taking a moment to read this email. I'll be in touch again soon. — Dr. Raul Ruiz A quick note from Rep. Ruiz's campaign team: Hi team, we're incredibly proud of the work that Dr. Ruiz is doing on this new Select Committee. At this point, Trump is doing nothing more than using his supporters to foot his legal bills... and they're piling up as his credibility plummets through the floor. Thank you,Team Hurd | | | | www.hurdforamerica.com | | |

name: Gov. Roy Cooper
subject: I need you to join me and DEMAND Republicans do their job and pass a budget >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Peter, I’m counting on your signature.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67984586/421539644/823540626?refcode=ea.81984750-2939-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.81984750-2939-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTk4NDc1MC0yOTM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jAnFwn_CQ981Pl0ziEkHrJ3nssIPWKEAlaALP-vJa8Y=&emci=97185433-6638-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=81984750-2939-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
_This is a longer email, but it’s important, so I hope you’ll read it to the end. If you’re already up-to-date on the fight to expand Medicaid in North Carolina, you can go ahead and[sign my petition to decouple Medicaid Expansion from the budget here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67984590/421539657/1329377746?refcode=ea.81984750-2939-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.81984750-2939-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTk4NDc1MC0yOTM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jAnFwn_CQ981Pl0ziEkHrJ3nssIPWKEAlaALP-vJa8Y=&emci=97185433-6638-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=81984750-2939-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)_ Fighting for North Carolinians’ access to health care has been a priority of mine as governor, Peter. **The folks in our state _deserve_ quality, affordable, accessible health care — which is why Democrats have spent the last decade or so fighting to pass Medicaid Expansion into law.** Until earlier this year, Republicans blocked it over and over again. But when GOP legislators finally agreed to come to the table, we worked together to pass a framework for Medicaid Expansion. That was a big deal. However, Republicans unnecessarily insisted upon tying Expansion to passing the budget — and now, despite their one-seat supermajority in the General Assembly, GOP legislators can’t seem to do their jobs and agree on a budget! Peter, this delay is costing North Carolina in so many ways. It’s wasting tax dollars. It’s forcing rural health centers to close. It’s already ripping away health care from thousands of North Carolinians who were able to get coverage during the pandemic but who are losing it now because the federal emergency order has expired. Medicaid Expansion would cover many of those people if the legislature would just let it start. We’ve ALREADY AGREED TO IT for goodness' sake. Where is the concern from the Republican leadership for these families who are losing their health care coverage? **[We need a budget and we need to expand Medicaid. Please, sign on if you agree>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67984593/421539667/1329377746?refcode=ea.81984750-2939-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.81984750-2939-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTk4NDc1MC0yOTM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jAnFwn_CQ981Pl0ziEkHrJ3nssIPWKEAlaALP-vJa8Y=&emci=97185433-6638-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=81984750-2939-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67984598/421539678/1329377746?refcode=ea.81984750-2939-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ms=ea.81984750-2939-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTk4NDc1MC0yOTM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jAnFwn_CQ981Pl0ziEkHrJ3nssIPWKEAlaALP-vJa8Y=&emci=97185433-6638-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=81984750-2939-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)

If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XRfPFq3TrUC8xvIQHGyyTA2?unsubscribedata=y%2Fmz8UuYlOR7t%2BneVAjhu93osR5QNhHoGBR4B78ID1o%2BtdNuiwKwT479FgodZGoUOC1gJuIZ7QKJafMyxK6pJYcVlOwPNijhI%2FEVWYbuoFuJMyY9k3nZdAoeeKuuaSZ2SgXY770SuS00hAX7VlKvoKR0tc8pZMRPpWshP7sGDmfXj0W3U2uy%2FSS5DoCxfHAajh5hp6SX3S1iVW%2F7abRbaShwsMf%2FKFa7k4kf2khLaw6C3tA7%2F0Yt77uGMawgCVbBaLBdZN5YxUJ%2BscNs9F7KTnDeNPiRzlI7Vfu0rNEKuket0nCavC7KaXw6YaIVtRaWbT3SDeBlmtDS3o2UgHwgPhGg0OP8VHKac7BGgtU4ms5k0jMjVM%2F%2BIFIMqKqzYbJ%2BKLJA9EcYzZrApAk4JJ1ilq9q1XhynFl08bS07RLyqmI%3D)
clean_body: Peter, I’m counting on your signature. | This is a longer email, but it’s important, so I hope you’ll read it to the end. If you’re already up-to-date on the fight to expand Medicaid in North Carolina, you can go ahead and Fighting for North Carolinians’ access to health care has been a priority of mine as governor, Peter. The folks in our state deserve quality, affordable, accessible health care — which is why Democrats have spent the last decade or so fighting to pass Medicaid Expansion into law. Until earlier this year, Republicans blocked it over and over again. But when GOP legislators finally agreed to come to the table, we worked together to pass a framework for Medicaid Expansion. That was a big deal. However, Republicans unnecessarily insisted upon tying Expansion to passing the budget — and now, despite their one-seat supermajority in the General Assembly, GOP legislators can’t seem to do their jobs and agree on a budget! Peter, this delay is costing North Carolina in so many ways. It’s wasting tax dollars. It’s forcing rural health centers to close. It’s already ripping away health care from thousands of North Carolinians who were able to get coverage during the pandemic but who are losing it now because the federal emergency order has expired. Medicaid Expansion would cover many of those people if the legislature would just let it start. We’ve ALREADY AGREED TO IT for goodness' sake. Where is the concern from the Republican leadership for these families who are losing their health care coverage? | Thank you for speaking out, Roy = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign. # **FOX & Friends Features
Breakthrough Solar
Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans
Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJx0jrtu4zAQRb9m1EngDM2HChbeFWQsFrtwkcaVwYdoMxYjWZJj-O8DGUm6lHPvwdxj89in-DCgfgHROYUZiIBvgeh6uOfp9pr_7kp5-Fde5f8s1pJ-A9HyGLtv8vNJ1WWb-jVVTRGMlTZ2oegMyhq1kKipOBusBXMYmKyjU9ohxk4F5YTDgC4KViRDjDjTSCgZCV35riYMAZ2NgRTzsGHPocri3U7TMOTKD7nozXlZxvlp1AK1m3GZLpytHVDr--QvwNtlek8BeIOcuAaS2_ZPs56sFkDSxnicb24NNGfll0g5I1eeafkCJG9LPnqbR5tOb8Cb_X5X_gAXkwnjPfV9mqWCDTs9rf2QPwIAAP__5nRqgw) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJx0jrtu4zAQRb9m1EngDM2HChbeFWQsFrtwkcaVwYdoMxYjWZJj-O8DGUm6lHPvwdxj89in-DCgfgHROYUZiIBvgeh6uOfp9pr_7kp5-Fde5f8s1pJ-A9HyGLtv8vNJ1WWb-jVVTRGMlTZ2oegMyhq1kKipOBusBXMYmKyjU9ohxk4F5YTDgC4KViRDjDjTSCgZCV35riYMAZ2NgRTzsGHPocri3U7TMOTKD7nozXlZxvlp1AK1m3GZLpytHVDr--QvwNtlek8BeIOcuAaS2_ZPs56sFkDSxnicb24NNGfll0g5I1eeafkCJG9LPnqbR5tOb8Cb_X5X_gAXkwnjPfV9mqWCDTs9rf2QPwIAAP__5nRqgw) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts
Fear Imminent Threat To
Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government Is
Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJx0jrtu4zAQRb9m1EngDM2HChbeFWQsFrtwkcaVwYdoMxYjWZJj-O8DGUm6lHPvwdxj89in-DCgfgHROYUZiIBvgeh6uOfp9pr_7kp5-Fde5f8s1pJ-A9HyGLtv8vNJ1WWb-jVVTRGMlTZ2oegMyhq1kKipOBusBXMYmKyjU9ohxk4F5YTDgC4KViRDjDjTSCgZCV35riYMAZ2NgRTzsGHPocri3U7TMOTKD7nozXlZxvlp1AK1m3GZLpytHVDr--QvwNtlek8BeIOcuAaS2_ZPs56sFkDSxnicb24NNGfll0g5I1eeafkCJG9LPnqbR5tOb8Cb_X5X_gAXkwnjPfV9mqWCDTs9rf2QPwIAAP__5nRqgw). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000
Americans already have it
in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or – what's really cool – with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generator In Action!**](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJx0jrtu4zAQRb9m1EngDM2HChbeFWQsFrtwkcaVwYdoMxYjWZJj-O8DGUm6lHPvwdxj89in-DCgfgHROYUZiIBvgeh6uOfp9pr_7kp5-Fde5f8s1pJ-A9HyGLtv8vNJ1WWb-jVVTRGMlTZ2oegMyhq1kKipOBusBXMYmKyjU9ohxk4F5YTDgC4KViRDjDjTSCgZCV35riYMAZ2NgRTzsGHPocri3U7TMOTKD7nozXlZxvlp1AK1m3GZLpytHVDr--QvwNtlek8BeIOcuAaS2_ZPs56sFkDSxnicb24NNGfll0g5I1eeafkCJG9LPnqbR5tOb8Cb_X5X_gAXkwnjPfV9mqWCDTs9rf2QPwIAAP__5nRqgw) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Thanks to your support, we're able to provide support to important charities that help American veterans and their families. Charities like Fisher House, A Soldier's Child Foundation, Team Rubicon and Operation Homefront. **Customers Are
Raving About Their
Solar Generator** **Joe B.**
"My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast" hurricane hit my town. It was a lifesaver. After losing all power, we would have been in absolute darkness with no way to communicate to the outside world. If we needed aid or rescue, it would have been impossible with dead phone batteries. The Patriot Power Generator was everything you said it was and more. I say this with tears in my eyes: I'll never be without at least one. Great product, people! You should be proud!" **Bob A.**
"Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing! Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other survival needs! Just spoke with Sienna at customer service to say how much I love the products! Sienna was very courteous and professional!" **Carla U.**
"The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and security of your family!" **Bernice L.**
"Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As soon as we could, we purchased another generator!" **Patricia T.**
"This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running 150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use. There's no good reason to put off getting back-up power! Peace of mind and convenience, too! Love it!" **Angel H.**
"Just went through the winter storm. I absolutely love my generator. It is a life saver! We had three days of no power with below freezing temperatures. We have a 3-year old and a 75-year old to take care of, and their lives depend on my ability to provide. I hooked up TV and DVD players, and had small 250-watt heaters. I put the solar panels in the windows all day while our generator was in use. Even though there was no direct sunlight, the panels helped keep the generator charged. After three days, we still had a small charge on our generator while keeping my family entertained and warm enough not to shiver." **Sharon P.**
"Having this generator means I'm not stuck. 4Patriots is by far the best place to shop for your critical emergency needs! I have been a customer since 2017! It's better to be prepared than to start doing that crazy buying that people were doing, for instance, at the start of the pandemic." [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generator In Action!**](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJx0jrtu4zAQRb9m1EngDM2HChbeFWQsFrtwkcaVwYdoMxYjWZJj-O8DGUm6lHPvwdxj89in-DCgfgHROYUZiIBvgeh6uOfp9pr_7kp5-Fde5f8s1pJ-A9HyGLtv8vNJ1WWb-jVVTRGMlTZ2oegMyhq1kKipOBusBXMYmKyjU9ohxk4F5YTDgC4KViRDjDjTSCgZCV35riYMAZ2NgRTzsGHPocri3U7TMOTKD7nozXlZxvlp1AK1m3GZLpytHVDr--QvwNtlek8BeIOcuAaS2_ZPs56sFkDSxnicb24NNGfll0g5I1eeafkCJG9LPnqbR5tOb8Cb_X5X_gAXkwnjPfV9mqWCDTs9rf2QPwIAAP__5nRqgw)
---

Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: My duty as a meteorologist in Congress:
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67985287/421540899/2043242937?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjY0NDdjZS0yOTM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yw6zcTG0uMfq8NXBPHrPA6ZzsvIkWTs9ZG0ZrjSbEGA=)
Did you see this, Peter? Just as July was declared the _hottest month ever recorded_ in human history, Republicans unveiled a plan to double down on dirty energy, much to the delight of their friends in the fossil fuel industry. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67985288/421540900/2043242937?refcode=em-8.12.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjY0NDdjZS0yOTM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yw6zcTG0uMfq8NXBPHrPA6ZzsvIkWTs9ZG0ZrjSbEGA=) According to _Politico_ , the plan would:
* block the expansion of wind and solar power.
* prevent states from adopting car pollution standards.
* delegate more regulation of polluting industries to Republican state officials.

As the only meteorologist in Congress, I feel responsible for calling out bad climate policy when I see it. The Republican plan would set us back decades in the fight against climate change and cause unnecessary harm to lives worldwide through worsening extreme heat, drought, floods, and wildfires. **We would be giving up on our duty to care for the planet.** The GOP’s proposal underscores the importance of keeping trusted climate communicators like myself in Congress. clean_body: I have the experience and record to take on the false choice that Republicans will try and divide us with. | | | | Peter, For too long, special interests and D.C. politicians have stymied environmental progress by dividing us along false lines. They've tried to frame the debate as a stark choice between manufacturing and protecting our planet. As an engineer and an elected official who's committed to addressing the climate crisis, I'm here to tell you thatprotecting our environment and building things don't have to be mutually exclusive; they shouldn't be. In fact, they can'tbe. And I'm running for Congress to deliver on both issues for Oregonians. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = I've accelerated the construction of affordable housing units. I've ensured that local roadways are more accessible. I've spearheaded measures to protect forests, farmland, and watersheds, and I've fought to make sure Metro plays a lead role in building resiliency for frontline communities threatened by wildfires. I have the experience and record to make a powerful argument to voters, and counter the false narrative that Lori Chavez-DeRemer will trot out to justify coddling corporate polluters. = Thank you, Lynn = | | | Paid for by Lynn Peterson for Congress |

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: finance update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We’re about midway through the month of August, so I wanted to give you a
quick financial update on where Justice Democrats stands at this moment.

It’s no secret that we’ve faced a downturn in fundraising since the 2022
election ended. That’s always the case in off-years, especially during the
summer months.

But the reality is we’re powered by small-dollar grassroots donations from
people like you, and our opponents are already gearing up in a big way for
2024.

In the past week alone, we learned AIPAC is actively recruiting
congressional candidates to run against our Justice Democrat incumbents,
including Squad members Ilhan Omar, Jamaal Bowman, and Summer Lee.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136950?refcode=em20230812-30339&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=30339%2E1203867%2Ei7id5R ]The 2024 election may feel far away, but Justice Democrats needs to
start raising money to fight back NOW. Will you chip in $3
or whatever you can to help build the resources needed to defend our
progressive incumbents from AIPAC?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136950?refcode=em20230812-30339&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=30339%2E1203867%2Ei7id5R ]Donate $3

The status quo has dark money from super PACs and corporate interests
behind them. We have you.

Thank you,

Alexandra Rojas, Executive Director
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=30339%2E1203867%2Ei7id5R ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=30339%2E1203867%2Ei7id5R ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230812-30339-footer&t=1023&refcode2=30339_1203867_i7id5R&akid=30339%2E1203867%2Ei7id5R

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=30339%2E1203867%2Ei7id5R

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Sara Rodriguez
subject: I raised the alarm myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Rodriguez for Wisconsin
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP06/1/84281/images/sara%20email%20nurse%20pic.png]
As a nurse, epidemiologist with the CDC, and healthcare administrator, the arrival of COVID in America horrified me.
I knew immediate action was needed to stop a national outbreak. But I watched in anger as Republican elected officials in Wisconsin did nothing ; the GOP-led legislature didn’t meet for 8 months.
So I decided to run against my State Assemblyman, and raise the alarm myself.
Political insiders said it was a noble, but lost, cause.
But I hit the pavement and talked to as many voters as possible. I flipped the seat blue by just 735 votes.
When I took office, Republicans had let it get so bad that on average a Wisconsinite was being diagnosed with COVID every minute.
We had to work fast to combat misinformation and introduce an economic recovery package that could get Wisconsin back on its feet.
Then, I was asked to run for Lieutenant Governor.
I’ll admit I was nervous. This would be the toughest race of my life — Trump had won Wisconsin just a few years previously.
But I knew what was at stake - everything from reproductive rights, to the foundations of our democracy.
So I ran. And this time, I won with 51.15% of the vote.
Tight races like mine for Lieutenant Governor have a big impact on states, but we don’t get nearly as much attention or funding as other races. That’s why I need to ask for your help, friends. Can you split a $10 donation between my campaign and the Democratic Lieutenant Governors Association before our upcoming mid-month fundraising deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dlga-rodriguez?refcode=20230811rodriguez_l1&amount=10]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dlga-rodriguez?refcode=20230811rodriguez_l1&amount=10]
OTHER AMOUNT >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dlga-rodriguez?refcode=20230811rodriguez_abxother]
Races like mine are often overlooked, but they shouldn’t be. Lieutenant Governors often lead statewide departments, cast tie-breaking votes, or even decide what legislation can be voted on.
We have 27 seats to flip, and many more, like mine, to protect. Anything you can chip in helps.
In gratitude,
Sara Rodriguez
Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin
Email is an important way for us to keep supporters like you informed about our work and build a strong people-focused campaign. But if you'd still like to unsubscribe you can unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/bSK0S2TpB06fE82_CF0vSg2?unsubscribedata=BE1sffpBhqj0aftmilDFCdEH6cvHjq5WtuKaK8GLV6iW%2F%2B8rzkqNl9NNGzJb3xmek1mEWYYK1GcLZZulPlgJoKzu6s4H4xsLZ%2B6Bz5GHsscFRpvVjGr4ziDftwqiGsX3fWjQ3EtVBfjMnfY%2Fw25QO6VGVQfASX5ScghK1Y9OT5u%2FlsbWqsp43ZZqOURBC68oHdUZJCx18k3sSx0nlBByVEgL5E20LUdP98gRPmtDEh1NAE6508nWA%2FOaLFCUEfFETOXtR5rWgYusMxPlGxVVJzaYtz5k0vFONGwuZ33%2BJ4pvwxdXB8TGsP0DIaMKfBwfdbH2KWQOfWwAqggHCPs5Cz6zorZf0S%2BAWm84d8HgpNUw77cP8HImbZU6tfrYCx4RmnpvaKkkFke4Q03WWPkrzLgwSI%2BAhqOQ16OS02h%2BlzL2Lcx%2FjdvKn0ZO%2FvANafFC .

I just reintroduced the Cumulative Impacts Act to put people’s health first. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTv---HOb7OxC66zSKFDBOarog-k5LhWrFgkSJ2rqDuCXuYBMulN6QyRe_FpeCgsUw-aPYxUWb7Fqam8yCedbX_EtVQl1rTKo50IkIbjMx1lOF85YPmqFLn7idPnMzSeJni8R79RjvasjKI__3lpuHX4kjVYU_HUz_-_EqL_9y735cechhZgLz9N6x1o5cbL79jjeYwvKXD7dPrPs9OLUm-8g/3yo/MA1Yl0ujQ_O5tmWFrarBnw/h0/xICoro8SwvYc2CaLCMe0GU4EqIcqqcTlD7CTr25ioD0)

Friend, Listening to our residents, especially our seniors talk about having some of the worst asthma this year is devastating. We can't let this become our new normal. With the 12th Congressional District having some of the worst air quality in the world, it's time for us to move with urgency. We have seen it over and over again where corporate polluters operate in majority Black and brown communities like ours. This has compounding harms for public health—leading to high rates of cancer, respiratory diseases, infant mortality, and more. For example, Metro Detroit has some of the highest asthma rates in the country, and Black Detroiters are over three times more likely to be hospitalized for asthma. **Something has to change. This is why I reintroduced the**** _Cumulative Impacts Act_****.** The bill would require the EPA to consider the cumulative harms of pollution in an area before granting permits for polluting facilities—and to deny permits for facilities that would endanger public health. This would be a revolutionary, transformative change for our neighbors who just want to breathe clean air. [**Please sign today to support the**** _Cumulative Impacts Act_****, which would require environmental regulators to prioritize people’s health over the profits of corporate polluters.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyAR14j_zoIVV3sFcajuSDyXT7sl8yJhSDldsi2Y_n75-lxlP7AHwOQiVbi4MOZ8Ax4uCIdW4E-nps0San8o6_eBgAhaWOSzp5FO2GRqPDdiBk1mNZTUCK6DVZBmPs9AfOw-pNGztygg20pmxw84uCl-YS_VeWmGqN-f6fo2ORq-K7U3q005MwxU_1TJ2_vjzTkgFFYjoA6ntwWJK7b0P2nY947dzqrR53gUnF0ejIsqYA9HNrtR067aG4a57PbOogx_lcYW0_5Wq-zk-dlCHhv-xkcn04qtgPbEkdbMxAoxiLJjpqentQxZHapFrSZeuLAKCXSLWFsbNExbGu8fSyzT6lf4x1vfLNnRa439pnCsBkZOSSUAatsl9LqNKyCMkgBoIX8Vfospu4PNbCfh3OaE9K3hvfS_b6zRM21rplLlZ03CufEnSeNylZgA3ZI-fPQmMZAIaTvXn4SCJdozmrlPxjaYQXqDpYqquvQGbhm3vYVMNHjwwmUWlk8mjbv61N4FozY3GVZva2CSykdKT7HnqihcynTNphPq_MMYcG-19yXkHcSqQLvU5M-HMqfV23lSexlmwYNfr-G3v26c6k5PaSNC382Osj2d7_NYEC-3MXk/3yo/MA1Yl0ujQ_O5tmWFrarBnw/h1/vpwaJm27XUO-O5SJNuCJmQDy3uyPb8rRIZFn7tfQZIA) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyAR14j_zoIVV3sFcajuSDyXT7sl8yJhSDldsi2Y_n75-lxlP7AHwOQiVbi4MOZ8Ax4uCIdW4E-nps0San8o6_eBgAhaWOSzp5FO2GRqPDdiBk1mNZTUCK6DVZBmPs9AfOw-pNGztygg20pmxw84uCl-YS_VeWmGqN-f6fo2ORq-K7U3q005MwxU_1TJ2_vjzTkgFFYjoA6ntwWJK7b0P2nY947dzqrR53gUnF0ejIsqYA9HNrtR067aG4a57PbOogx_lcYW0_5Wq-zk-dlCHhv-xkcn04qtgPbEkdbMxAoxiLJjpqentQxZHapFrSZeuLAKCXSLWFsbNExbGu8fSyzT6lf4x1vfLNnRa439pnCsBkY0B5uSB9-AU87xxS4-77Lig0XXi2yGKzBYGLoa80qEei3VDtDZ08ecbtPNbDD_sKiiegIY96altLd2_7cUEcQgQ-JUv8Pn0h9enEbIOR5VJyxsEG4PV5bELp5C2EkqWH9_ygsu0edZX-UCb_Uandoa8oMLF9TjBVB7_ejjwzaeXpl03Rt19ADSTFkGl1Kf-8BCx6QnUHT0LSVwEdUO08frCB6XCRSjI-XklnL7SFQW94KRtEvz8mWuXrA6KYfFVGM/3yo/MA1Yl0ujQ_O5tmWFrarBnw/h2/9NCPLn6rrc_g52Q9hBBVEzSm6Q248TgMGlxhMlsPS-U)
