When approving new polluting facilities, the EPA doesn’t currently take into account the cumulative impacts—the public health and environmental effects of past, present, and future pollution releases in the community.
The _Cumulative Impacts Act_ would require the EPA to analyze cumulative impacts in permitting decisions under the _Clean Air Act_ and _Clean Water Act_ , and deny permit applications unless the applicant can demonstrate a reasonable certainty of no harm to the community or vulnerable groups.
**This legislation will protect and empower residents of frontline communities who are living with the devastating effects of climate change and fossil fuel development.** That includes residents of Dearborn’s South End, which is home to an extreme concentration of corporate polluters that sit directly across from schools, homes, and playgrounds.
Samra’a Luqman, a community advocate in the neighborhood, says:_“We refuse to continue being the nation’s dumping ground for industries and corporations in the name of corporate greed. My family and our neighbors deserve to breathe clean air and drink clean water as basic human rights, and we need new laws that will put the well-being of impacted communities before the profits of the companies poisoning us.”_
Yes, we all deserve to breathe clean air and drink clean water. Where pollution occurs is a policy choice, and we can change the EPA’s permitting process to put people’s health first—particularly in communities already overburdened by air and water pollution.
[**Please sign today to support the**** _Cumulative Impacts Act_****, to rectify environmental racism and protect our public health from corporate polluters.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyAR14j_zoIVV3sFcajuSDyXT7sl8yJhSDldsi2Y_n75-lxlP7AHwOQiVbi4MOZ8Ax4uCIdW4E-nps0San8o6_eBgAhaWOSzp5FO2GRqPDdiBk1mNZTUCK6DVZBmPs9AfOw-pNGztygg20pmxw84uCl-YS_VeWmGqN-f6fo2ORq-K7U3q005MwxU_1TJ2_vjzTkgFFYjoA6ntwWJK7b0P2nY947dzqrR53gUnF0ejIsqYA9HNrtR067aG4a57PbOogx_lcYW0_5Wq-zk-dlCHhv-xkcn04qtgPbEkdbMxAoxiLJjpqentQxZHapFrSZeuLAKCXSLWFsbNExbGu8fSyzT6lf4x1vfLNnRa439pnCsBkaCHpLje73BG6gb968ZxNaRgXLE-YTI1zM7SS8JeS7AEpRCpAmEAsLWW2z-aOdOloloShYVKyIg8eH4rJI5rDoIBGCitOBZmUim4OfOO9-TLQ9WFyW4TmmnM0Z6nXgZ9mBXAj2oP4-fUGrjIfikGA_dlpD6EaN62etgHF2hEjFhbli8Vp4-U1ppJyrxGtubMcs371dM46noGsy2tDftNs7f-hIiD82E49GqPl8H-W0sYA7dK3S0sOwUhNfEAUCT7yA/3yo/MA1Yl0ujQ_O5tmWFrarBnw/h3/N2zxL7iS84A6thuFYtwFwnzAdqWI7BWBF_R3p9OfhFU)

clean_body: I just reintroduced the Cumulative Impacts Act to put people’s health first. | | | Friend, Listening to our residents, especially our seniors talk about having some of the worst asthma this year is devastating. We can't let this become our new normal. With the 12th Congressional District having some of the worst air quality in the world, it's time for us to move with urgency. We have seen it over and over again where corporate polluters operate in majority Black and brown communities like ours. This has compounding harms for public health—leading to high rates of cancer, respiratory diseases, infant mortality, and more. For example, Metro Detroit has some of the highest asthma rates in the country, and Black Detroiters are over three times more likely to be hospitalized for asthma. Something has to change. This is why I reintroduced the Cumulative Impacts Act. The bill would require the EPA to consider the cumulative harms of pollution in an area before granting permits for polluting facilities—and to deny permits for facilities that would endanger public health. This would be a revolutionary, transformative change for our neighbors who just want to breathe clean air. | When approving new polluting facilities, the EPA doesn’t currently take into account the cumulative impacts—the public health and environmental effects of past, present, and future pollution releases in the community. The Cumulative Impacts Act would require the EPA to analyze cumulative impacts in permitting decisions under the Clean Air Act and Clean Water Act , and deny permit applications unless the applicant can demonstrate a reasonable certainty of no harm to the community or vulnerable groups. This legislation will protect and empower residents of frontline communities who are living with the devastating effects of climate change and fossil fuel development. That includes residents of Dearborn’s South End, which is home to an extreme concentration of corporate polluters that sit directly across from schools, homes, and playgrounds. Samra’a Luqman, a community advocate in the neighborhood, says:“We refuse to continue being the nation’s dumping ground for industries and corporations in the name of corporate greed. My family and our neighbors deserve to breathe clean air and drink clean water as basic human rights, and we need new laws that will put the well-being of impacted communities before the profits of the companies poisoning us.” Yes, we all deserve to breathe clean air and drink clean water. Where pollution occurs is a policy choice, and we can change the EPA’s permitting process to put people’s health first—particularly in communities already overburdened by air and water pollution. Thank you for taking action. I will continue to hold corporate polluters accountable for treating communities of color like mine as sacrifice zones. Together, we’ll keep fighting for a world where all of us can thrive. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . body:
In the 180 years since its creation (before that, we had an at-large district), there has never been a woman to represent MI-01 in Congress. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67993436/421552029/-926527472?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20230811_fr_convince_fd_sm_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQwMDIyMjQtMzEzOS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6a_YWR4fPVfq_fLzd8TaPu_pT11M25NN5zT6RK5KbXo=)

Dear Peter, In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a monthly contribution to Callie's campaign for Congress. But first, I want to explain why your contribution is so important: **1) If elected, Callie would be the first woman to _ever_ represent MI-01.** Seriously. In the **180 years** since its creation (before that, we had an at-large district), there has _never_ been a woman to represent MI-01 in Congress. So - we are making history! **2) We need to keep up the momentum.** In the first 3 months after launch, we saw a steady stream of donations coming into the campaign. These funds help us organize in Upper & Northern Michigan – but now that Callie has been in the race for more than 3 months, we want to keep our pedal to the metal, and we need your help. **3) Your contributions are the lifeblood of our campaign** Every donation helps us purchase the nuts and bolts of any campaign: radio and TV advertising, organizing supplies like telephones and yard signs, and the gas that fuels us as we travel the district. Without your generous contributions, we'd be running this race with one hand tied behind our back. By investing _now_ , you're helping us plant roots across the district and setting us up for success for the remainder of this campaign. **4) Our average donation value for the month of July was $39** It's not a lot, especially when corporate PACs are allowed to contribute as much as $5,000 per candidate per election. **But all it takes is 129 people willing to pitch in $39 to match that – people power!** The truth is, our campaign is rooted right here in Upper & Northern Michigan, which means we need local support to power our progress. [**So, Peter, please consider making a recurring contribution to this campaign. After such a strong launch, we need all hands on deck to keep up the momentum.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67993437/421552030/-926527472?refcode=EM_FL_BAR_20230811_fr_convince_fd_sm_90da_xx_l1&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmQwMDIyMjQtMzEzOS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6a_YWR4fPVfq_fLzd8TaPu_pT11M25NN5zT6RK5KbXo=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, you will be charged every month automatically:

By investing now , you're helping us plant roots across the district and setting us up for success for the remainder of this campaign. 4) Our average donation value for the month of July was $39 It's not a lot, especially when corporate PACs are allowed to contribute as much as $5,000 per candidate per election. But all it takes is 129 people willing to pitch in $39 to match that – people power! The truth is, our campaign is rooted right here in Upper & Northern Michigan, which means we need local support to power our progress. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, you will be charged every month automatically: | = = = = And if you're not able to commit to a recurring donation, we totally understand – =. Thanks again, and we'll be in touch soon. Gratefully, Trevor Trevor Jones Finance Director, Callie Barr for Congress | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. She’s running to take on extremism and do-nothing politicians in D.C. that are leaving rural America behind. body:

Peter,

We're almost halfway through the third quarter of the year, and every day Kim has been working to deliver results for the people of Washington's 8th District.

But, while Kim's been fighting on behalf of Washingtonians, Republicans have been working around the clock to flip WA-08 red. Earlier this year, national Republicans named Kim as one of their top targets of 2024, and now they've launched a new wave of attacks targeting Kim.

Recently, they blamed her for soaring gas prices, and last time they called Kim - a Jewish American - a "rabid antisemite." These are just some disgusting and absurd types of attacks Kim's facing. We know these attacks are ridiculous, but we need your support to fight back and ensure Washingtonians know the truth, too.

clean_body: Last month, they called Kim an “antisemite,” and now they blame her for the price of gas Peter, We're almost halfway through the third quarter of the year, and every day Kim has been working to deliver results for the people of Washington's 8th District. But, while Kim's been fighting on behalf of Washingtonians, Republicans have been working around the clock to flip WA-08 red. Earlier this year, national Republicans named Kim as one of their top targets of 2024, and now they've launched a new wave of attacks targeting Kim. Recently, they blamed her for soaring gas prices, and last time they called Kim - a Jewish American - a "rabid antisemite." These are just some disgusting and absurd types of attacks Kim's facing. We know these attacks are ridiculous, but we need your support to fight back and ensure Washingtonians know the truth, too. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. subject: One year ago today:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wexton for Congress
body:
I proudly voted to pass a landmark climate and drug-price reduction bill

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67993718/421553409/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230812MM_MM_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGYzYWRiMC0zMTM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UBAgKDost6UTm1VtV9ZEOJYeJwtjy_9xyydd2WiFBFA=)
---
Exactly one year ago today, I voted to pass the Inflation Reduction Act through the House. I was so proud to support a historic piece of legislation that is already making a real difference for families across the country.

This landmark bill addressed the rising costs of living by helping folks pay for gas and prescription drugs. It strengthened the Affordable Care Act to make health insurance even more accessible. It’s raising critical revenue by making the wealthiest corporations finally pay their fair share of taxes. **And it was our country’s biggest investment _ever_ in clean and alternative energy — laying the groundwork to jumpstart a new era in combating climate change and maintaining a good quality of life.**

From the start, Republicans strongly opposed this legislation. Ever since they took control of the House, they’ve tried to gut the Inflation Reduction Act — and they’re going to try even harder as we enter a government funding fight in September. **If we want to secure the progress of our landmark legislation and continue to deliver for the American people, we need to re-take the House in 2024.**

**[That starts with securing swing districts like mine. So will you chip in before my mid-month deadline this week to help lay the early groundwork for my re-election campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67993721/421553411/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_230812MM_MM_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGYzYWRiMC0zMTM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UBAgKDost6UTm1VtV9ZEOJYeJwtjy_9xyydd2WiFBFA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67993722/421553414/-772585877?express_lane=true&refcode=EM_FR_230812MM_MM_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_EB10&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOGYzYWRiMC0zMTM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UBAgKDost6UTm1VtV9ZEOJYeJwtjy_9xyydd2WiFBFA=)**

clean_body: I proudly voted to pass a landmark climate and drug-price reduction bill = Exactly one year ago today, I voted to pass the Inflation Reduction Act through the House. I was so proud to support a historic piece of legislation that is already making a real difference for families across the country. This landmark bill addressed the rising costs of living by helping folks pay for gas and prescription drugs. It strengthened the Affordable Care Act to make health insurance even more accessible. It’s raising critical revenue by making the wealthiest corporations finally pay their fair share of taxes. And it was our country’s biggest investment ever in clean and alternative energy — laying the groundwork to jumpstart a new era in combating climate change and maintaining a good quality of life. From the start, Republicans strongly opposed this legislation. Ever since they took control of the House, they’ve tried to gut the Inflation Reduction Act — and they’re going to try even harder as we enter a government funding fight in September. If we want to secure the progress of our landmark legislation and continue to deliver for the American people, we need to re-take the House in 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Republicans are determined to give me another tough challenge this cycle, and they’re certain to spend heavily to distort the truth of legislation like the Inflation Reduction Act. But with your help, I’ll be able to campaign hard on what we've been able to accomplish and what we'll continue to champion as we work to protect the Inflation Reduction Act and other landmark bills from right-wing attacks. Peter,

**$98 PER PERSON**
**As a former Navy SEAL** , I’m not intimidated by much. I’ve been around the world and fought on battlefields against enemy soldiers in hand-to-hand combat. As an aerial firefighter, **I’ve piloted planes through some of the most intense wildfires imaginable**.

While I’ve had some thrilling experiences, I’ve never feared the challenges that have been put before me - I assess each situation and determine how best to achieve the desired outcome with minimal harm to myself or to my team.

On June 27th I declared my candidacy to be the next U.S. Senator for Montana - it was the first time in longer than I can remember that my new day job didn’t involve the risk of serious injury or even death. But just because I’m not putting myself in harm’s way at present,**I’m still in the line of fire.**

In just a moment I’m going to ask you to **[chip in $9](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=09fae81a45c54b688d23da6f24ca3890&_e=JLa4-yqL3uHbNjXvztoDAR2BqJ19ExxzmeT0lJ7c6oRIKEGawPjNf8yQ0k7TaYXHT6-gZF57qelcXDpyFMYkh9G7mh8tFnaRS2Avq4MEjpHmJV6WwMnKH4UFYjoovieYwMCAufohtwFhgCNmZhKBAVIIzQyYoDHsDo87tVgNwXmhzLHj0PPLItqPnVM4OZr6GOpHYk9Y3SG24READJjrbSGbRlu3PFr59oFLHiCDk4VDFyG6E1E2V14lHzXa7XEbqNud_Q7ERuw-wYWdOQrAvzPWwwz3dno-Mb_kb5cfYayJwoUnykUUroEsd_vvFi8TELQue-I9-CrnBBdSJBrOR4kn5wYTjCStHayHwqjZ6HAibPTHTn2-YTf17CYFcQHE)** to help me hit my goal today of **raising $886** , but please continue reading to find out why I’m asking and why it’s important conservatives like you who care about this country get engaged in my race.

When I was deciding whether to challenge Jon Tester this spring, I did some digging to find out how much a U.S. Senate campaign costs and what I’d have to raise to be competitive against the last statewide elected Democrat. _**What I discovered shocked me. **_

**_OVER $70 MILLION WAS SPENT IN 2018 - AT THE TIME THE COSTLIEST FEDERAL RACE IN MONTANA’S HISTORY. CAMPAIGNS AND OUTSIDE SUPER PACS SPENT MORE THAN $98 PER PERSON TO INFLUENCE THEIR VOTE._ **
Given that my opponent has already raised $10 million this year,**the 2018 record won’t stand.**

While I’m not scared of the task ahead of me, **it is daunting to imagine raising the money I’ll need to successfully win this election.** By some estimates that sum will be more than $100 million dollars. **[[link to donate]](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=09fae81a45c54b688d23da6f24ca3890&_e=JLa4-yqL3uHbNjXvztoDAR2BqJ19ExxzmeT0lJ7c6oRIKEGawPjNf8yQ0k7TaYXHT6-gZF57qelcXDpyFMYkh9G7mh8tFnaRS2Avq4MEjpHmJV6WwMnKH4UFYjoovieYwMCAufohtwFhgCNmZhKBAVIIzQyYoDHsDo87tVgNwXmhzLHj0PPLItqPnVM4OZr6GOpHYk9Y3SG24READJjrbSGbRlu3PFr59oFLHiCDk4WHB3kptNq9-1_eB-qavMGa-3JZbUhHFRta0l4U7IGV_SauxW4CqFnsFIAzJ95PGaDHDTu1KYpi8dDPG2a77dhFf_9QuXJL3uas3AtE6gk0So8zWTV949uDZyU3xWArtMdEBxyagI8-Gt8GlA5Zwq5X)**

I know we’re not going to raise the money we need all at once - or even in a year’s time. What I do know is that we will raise it. We’re setting goals each day - and **[if we continue to hit them, we’ll eventually get to where we need to be](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=09fae81a45c54b688d23da6f24ca3890&_e=JLa4-yqL3uHbNjXvztoDAR2BqJ19ExxzmeT0lJ7c6oRIKEGawPjNf8yQ0k7TaYXHT6-gZF57qelcXDpyFMYkh9G7mh8tFnaRS2Avq4MEjpHmJV6WwMnKH4UFYjoovieYwMCAufohtwFhgCNmZhKBAVIIzQyYoDHsDo87tVgNwXmhzLHj0PPLItqPnVM4OZr6GOpHYk9Y3SG24READJjrbSGbRlu3PFr59oFLHiCDk4UjSdQz420dHVjiWr7fwd7Jo4DzN6fj-PiGnW8l9CIEcvxEDnmCdRH1WNzPN4CwBnSMqVzNBPzow2ZGX74Oa6EmDnb2Sh_O5RcGbGbNrDHKmb8Y0UvFLWK5SL4a1dOKvZPIQmMDI1cjJFZOc0A-DJ4N)**.

[**CHIP IN $9
HELP ME HIT MY GOAL TODAY ->
**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=09fae81a45c54b688d23da6f24ca3890&_e=JLa4-yqL3uHbNjXvztoDAR2BqJ19ExxzmeT0lJ7c6oRIKEGawPjNf8yQ0k7TaYXHT6-gZF57qelcXDpyFMYkh9G7mh8tFnaRS2Avq4MEjpHmJV6WwMnKH4UFYjoovieYwMCAufohtwFhgCNmZhKBAVIIzQyYoDHsDo87tVgNwXmhzLHj0PPLItqPnVM4OZr6GOpHYk9Y3SG24READJjrbSGbRlu3PFr59oFLHiCDk4V-VwxwQ7MEHYI2BkB5K8qTP61ReIfasaed5M9GOsu-E18PzFsleFhodtcqJwKXAtm3Sx5MGzWkdEMdlGJKNtfFGDdoi3tKggNx2Yj4vpeuyLgErbmsId8426hxO5pmkYE7EeZlQ8sOrXZsmuPiMNv6)

Are you able to assist?

With respect,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

[**SEND IN THE SEAL

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. With respect, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Team Cori
subject: Sign on to end police violence.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Cori Bush just re-introduced the groundbreaking People’s Response Act. | |
---
Peter, St. Louis has led the country in police killings per capita. In St. Louis County, Ferguson police have targeted Black residents, who have endured near-constant police surveillance and harassment. Police violence is so pervasive, many Black and marginalized people avoid calling the police when they are undergoing some of the most difficult emergencies. This is Congresswoman Cori Bush’s district. **Cori knows that our systems of public safety have failed to keep us safe.** She came to Congress to save lives, after having served as a registered nurse and an activist with the Ferguson Uprising. Recently, Cori re-introduced the _People’s Response Act_ , which re-envisions public safety by treating our communities’ moments of crisis not as opportunities for law enforcement to further police and criminalize -- but as public health emergencies to be treated with compassion and care. [**Please sign on today to support the _People’s Response Act_ , groundbreaking legislation that Cori Bush just reintroduced to transform our approach to public safety by investing in the health and well-being of our communities.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmTu6IJ7unwFJcux6yAg63JRraEFq22DpdodN40J8FDnde8jhpyMkkfmMaOKFCa_t8xAuVr0XmMb8dPs9aUqFaNL7y5FsBvghxTnQ74cBzxAxmJUJ4bHfFQNRTITzGGiHbIrBGdEa-PiqXfXXPoH7d2tmZPlVKQ2fT9vdLcv_SNrPz7NZ3BmMR5OpbT76A6-1nyQ2pFA1IUfDVXD6mfDkbeDJeqOSmXOKBESKGdpICwg_oMiNu7580BYJnAxEKNpAEGSoNflHTuBdABcS7-t561RzSyQFgPLLizyUls8juP7gZytcD1lFaFJZaX0BVkOGDTP1cHBX2aAd9UUDsgFqQT3VnghEEUiJ5_A9XHwU40diwkzL3qrCNk_NLvEdFvnZhPaKwi6Q1BwKcfzKYSesz4DNO6oC-lhPaO1ABMc8X6iEYUsccw5fZy9bJnxEDdMlynoeFMeGQSGNcJInjdCB4ykR9HAqgpxwH9MPbVpW2ErrPxon6vnekYiNwJMlPkSx8/3yo/N26F2PQRQMqt9WMIUln1cQ/h0/pYhi9TVjjoKlMyK0hH5vlyePHlcDdMxu1aQsV3ltuaU) **[SIGN ON NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmTu6IJ7unwFJcux6yAg63JRraEFq22DpdodN40J8FDnde8jhpyMkkfmMaOKFCa_t8xAuVr0XmMb8dPs9aUqFaNL7y5FsBvghxTnQ74cBzxAxmJUJ4bHfFQNRTITzGGiHbIrBGdEa-PiqXfXXPoH7d2tmZPlVKQ2fT9vdLcv_SNrPz7NZ3BmMR5OpbT76A6-1nyQ2pFA1IUfDVXD6mfDkbeDJeqOSmXOKBESKGdpICwg_oMiNu7580BYJnAxEKNpAEGSoNflHTuBdABcS7-t561RzSyQFgPLLizyUls8juP7k2b_MoNiAN5gqbL22Y8icU8fIL-QYQGIgW9D2ZCW3kA4XgtlTcDoumnFNhI39GKMn-s1b71VdDdNtNnMl5OGZBO-JYm1qEkm7Xt-fNinkQI62Yf0855rdRRQekUh4hiYXljj3ojA3vXlgZtojIjghWOitaaI-mwHcKK2ERW_mFlgEGXKpnerCxXJNhBKYLpEyecNebxx9A6NXSUrJBcsZA/3yo/N26F2PQRQMqt9WMIUln1cQ/h1/BLMTkY9lzptf_AYFdyovO_bmUOYJ1D4ALrqPzQev4kc) ** In Cori’s home state of Missouri, Black people are almost 5 times more likely to be killed by police compared to white people. But we must be clear: This isn’t just a problem in Missouri. Our nation is failing to keep our communities safe, particularly Black and brown communities. Police violence is a leading cause of premature death for young Black boys in this country, and it is fully preventable. **Clearly, our country’s system of policing is not keeping us safe.** During the Ferguson Uprising, Cori Bush was violently brutalized by police while trying to bring a woman to paramedics to help with a medical emergency. Cori herself was traumatized by the harassment and violence she experienced from police while protesting police violence. As a nurse serving people with mental health crises, Cori also witnessed punitive responses that harmed the vulnerable people in her care. Today, armed law enforcement agents (who lack expertise in health crises) are the first to respond to a variety of health emergencies. This has deadly and traumatic consequences. **When there is a health emergency, an appropriately trained and unarmed health expert should be sent to support those in need.****[We deserve a world where marginalized people can call for help and not risk being murdered by police. Please add your name in support of the _People's Response Act_ now.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmTu6IJ7unwFJcux6yAg63JRraEFq22DpdodN40J8FDnde8jhpyMkkfmMaOKFCa_t8xAuVr0XmMb8dPs9aUqFaNL7y5FsBvghxTnQ74cBzxAxmJUJ4bHfFQNRTITzGGiHbIrBGdEa-PiqXfXXPoH7d2tmZPlVKQ2fT9vdLcv_SNrPz7NZ3BmMR5OpbT76A6-1nyQ2pFA1IUfDVXD6mfDkbeDJeqOSmXOKBESKGdpICwg_oMiNu7580BYJnAxEKNpAEGSoNflHTuBdABcS7-t561RzSyQFgPLLizyUls8juP7gBiocNbLQYt98bzP_e15Xwgcll2_qTTJcdC3gSM-FfrrrSNjvpU1QgGS9SINEIc963Nbch78nNYylrMveiTRoUTi2kR_PF2JL7l_1TGbXpK3mdOyHxWUu8tCVhpL9q3MxVUSW13RqrumZhIpxrwbd2wCkqGc9ZmsYGSkx3Ev7i7qC6dRiRXys-O5VlwrakFTYUS2Ghd8qUCdU59oAKQQ88/3yo/N26F2PQRQMqt9WMIUln1cQ/h2/ME5KH3bs3_xJ9fZwsy2Bi7g2Q_kzZVTzDM6fsZ1iHw4) ** **The _People's Response Act_ transforms our approach to public safety to center care, not criminalization. The legislation supports cities, states and community-based organizations in launching and scaling public health alternatives to policing.** It’s not just a bill -- it's a movement in action. Cori Bush is lifting up the demands of the movement for Black lives, and she has engaged with local community groups all over the country about this legislation. **If passed, the _People’s Response Act_ would:**
* **Institute a new public safety division within the Department of Health and Human Services** focused on non-carceral and health-centered approaches to public safety;

* Develop a federal first responders unit to support [states and local governments] with emergency health crises;

* **Promote alternative approaches to public safety** , including coordination of research and policies across HHS and other agencies to center health-based and non-carceral responses throughout the federal government;

* **Provide $11 billion in grant funding to community-based organizations** , as well as state and local governments, to fund public safety and improve crisis response;

* **Set up a $2.5 billion First Responder Hiring Grant, which would create thousands of jobs for emergency first responders******(including licensed social workers, mental health counselors, substance use counselors, and peer support specialists) to improve our crisis response efforts focused on non-carceral, health-based approaches to public safety.

[**We must urgently transform our system of public safety to center care, not criminalization. If you agree, please sign on as a grassroots cosponsor of the _People’s Response Act_ today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmTu6IJ7unwFJcux6yAg63JRraEFq22DpdodN40J8FDnde8jhpyMkkfmMaOKFCa_t8xAuVr0XmMb8dPs9aUqFaNL7y5FsBvghxTnQ74cBzxAxmJUJ4bHfFQNRTITzGGiHbIrBGdEa-PiqXfXXPoH7d2tmZPlVKQ2fT9vdLcv_SNrPz7NZ3BmMR5OpbT76A6-1nyQ2pFA1IUfDVXD6mfDkbeDJeqOSmXOKBESKGdpICwg_oMiNu7580BYJnAxEKNpAEGSoNflHTuBdABcS7-t561RzSyQFgPLLizyUls8juP7voRIk2pi57eOxLgbrUY_Mpvk1hjnvQLjZ3vJXgW-n4izg5Or4pwX-4zHZpgBxEIE5Kb2SPPQwF7oLRom5kcdVNXnP4JtY2n-F2V2hd1P8pm6q50ihc4aaIINXFUG7mT4v4-HduOzTkL0S_1IUBmVBEbkpl7UCZLhh6EyGCHP0A4l8dxwfDqJmkYAlZGN1bR086fnHJ66hep5tn6LAKpYUI/3yo/N26F2PQRQMqt9WMIUln1cQ/h3/XWiy2AlEfpz850EGruQLPTK0Xa7DUf01St_GJvdZa_Y) We are building an America that works for all of us, and which treats every person with respect. We must dismantle anti-Black, white supremacist systems of violence in America and build a future of care. As Cori reminds us, another world is possible and within reach -- if we build it together. In solidarity, \- Team Cori **[SUPPORT OUR MOVEMENT](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w6bIs1sMIjeK6M5WSpWn6GsL0LxbpIAbvNCyuX-YfLkRl8ECmeVN8StVHEf6QcpNQLHic7kUMbAO7CyBZ98Wwd2TPRaXkGPeFME26oJdWxamPXjfWJ1zvg3umCvIENRCj6W0GAF1aqZSrl9k1K6UeKbx4izHbttwn-fMmwxCO6JXb0eK1nA8Ezf6RvHPS3nBSUWW2abdtheHTFEITjoxiO3iIfDiWTXjny7H71pOWZ_gam5xTuZEvsmOj1RORRrifFpbHjKFx18kP-Eq1g-tQtz_4IwLRcyxvX54O_uUdQXKs_Hh7lsqaDetRm68cIoIHQ-4zQEVwOTt3z_miuwPgDpqBXUd65I7q9MoUBlofL6A/3yo/N26F2PQRQMqt9WMIUln1cQ/h4/sbM9diopopOmcF-tke_dRXQmctEnc8PCQpL8zfgnalw)**

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Hi team,

I'm Mondaire Jones and I’m running to flip NY-17. In a moment, I’ll
introduce myself more, but first, I have some exciting news to share:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19013?t=1001&akid=3480%2E346206%2EWVdq6R ]I’m running for Congress. If you’re fired up and ready to flip this
district and take back the House majority, make a donation of $20 to
Charles Booker and my campaign today.

Let me introduce myself and share why I’m running to represent the Hudson
Valley in Congress.

Growing up poor, Black, and gay, I never saw anyone like me running for
office, let alone the U.S. House of Representatives. In fact, someone like
me had never been elected to Congress—whether from the Hudson Valley or
anywhere in America.

But I decided to run anyway—to be a voice for working families like my
own. And with the help of our grassroots, people-powered movement, we
shocked Washington’s political establishment and won.

I was proud to be part of the most productive Congress in modern
history—rescuing the American economy during COVID, lowering prescription
drug costs for seniors like my grandma, negotiating passage of the
infrastructure law, creating millions of jobs, defending our democracy,
and fighting for the freedom to have an abortion.

But despite this and the other progress we made, New York redistricting
and political machinations pushed me out of Congress.

For the past few months, I have watched with the rest of America as the
extreme MAGA Republican majority has passed policies that hurt everyday
people. And they have rallied behind a twice-impeached, serially indicted
criminal defendant, Donald Trump, who threatens to further undermine our
democracy.

Right now, Mike Lawler represents my district after winning by only 1,820
votes. A career political operative, Lawler will say anything you want to
hear, but do whatever Kevin McCarthy and the extreme MAGA Republicans tell
him to do. He’s slick like the Big Oil industry he used to lobby for. And
he must be defeated in order for Democrats to retake the House.

That’s why I'm not done fighting. I'm getting back in the ring.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19013?t=1002&akid=3480%2E346206%2EWVdq6R ][IMG]

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19013?t=1003&akid=3480%2E346206%2EWVdq6R ]We've got a chance to send Lawler packing. In 2020, President Joe Biden
won this House district by 10 points. If we don’t flip NY-17, Democrats
are simply not taking back the House in 2024. So we’ve set a huge $500,000
online launch goal to get my campaign off the ground. Split a donation
between my campaign and Charles Booker today.

Here’s the thing; I didn’t have it easy growing up. But it was the lessons
I learned from my family and Hudson Valley neighbors that got me here
today.

My grandfather was a janitor, and my grandmother cleaned homes. Mom
struggled with mental illness, and we often relied on government
assistance to put food on the table. But thanks to the support and
encouragement I received from my family and Rockland community, I went
from East Ramapo public schools to Harvard Law and the halls of Congress.

As a key player in the most productive Congress in history, the policies
we enacted were personal to me. But there’s more work to do for the
American people, including:

* Lowering the cost of prescription drugs for everyone, even those not
on Medicare
* Codifying Roe v. Wade into law and protecting the freedom to have an
abortion
* Banning assault weapons and enacting universal background checks to
keep our communities safe
* Defending our democracy from the Republican assault on voting and fair
elections
* Protecting Social Security and Medicare from Republican cuts

Our country is at a crossroads, and I refuse to sit on the sidelines.

We still need leaders in Congress for whom policy is personal — leaders
committed to creating real opportunity for all.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19013?t=1004&akid=3480%2E346206%2EWVdq6R ]This race isn’t about me; it’s about the people of the Hudson Valley.
With your support, we’re going to flip this district and take back the
House majority—are you ready? Watch my launch video, then split a donation
between Charles Booker and my campaign by making a donation of $20 or more
today >>

Let's do this,

Mondaire

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230812-3480-footer&t=1005&refcode2=3480_346206_WVdq6R&akid=3480%2E346206%2EWVdq6R

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3480%2E346206%2EWVdq6R

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Team DLCC
subject: $7, $25, $50, or $100 →
body:
By making a donation today, your money will go straight toward resources that will help elect state Dems who are laser-focused on improving our democracy. | | |
---

Every single grassroots supporter helps power our mission to elect state Democrats. That's why we’re calling on you to heed this call to action: Here are just a few ways your gift could help expand Democratic power in our statehouses: 1. A gift of $7 could buy 10 new clipboards for organizers 2. A gift of $25 could pay for 1,000 people to see our digital ads 3. A gift of $50 could fund our candidates' phone banks 4. name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: Action needs to be taken
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
| | Peter,

Throughout my career on the frontlines, I’ve seen too much preventable death and suffering due to firearms. It is what inspired me to run for Congress and fight for change — to end the human toll of gun violence.

More than 25,000 people have died from gun violence this year already, and **there are still 141 days left in 2023.** We’re also on track to surpass the previous record for most mass shootings in a year. We can no longer ignore that the epidemic of gun violence is only getting worse.

[We are not powerless to create life-saving change. Will you sign this petition to stand with me in the fight against gun violence?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67995143/421558383/870970569?source=EM_NBI_BW_20230812_PT_Guns_0_3MO_DrBrianWilliams_na_na_2023Record&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzgxYjNjZGMtMzMzOS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-Oqg5ww6d9PhYGjigR2hLiXvK_ZpndqAocVZmlPBuDQ=&emci=6f7422d6-3339-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=381b3cdc-3339-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=13153572) | [TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67995146/421558385/870970569?source=EM_NBI_BW_20230812_PT_Guns_0_3MO_DrBrianWilliams_na_na_2023Record&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzgxYjNjZGMtMzMzOS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-Oqg5ww6d9PhYGjigR2hLiXvK_ZpndqAocVZmlPBuDQ=&emci=6f7422d6-3339-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=381b3cdc-3339-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=13153572)

I have told too many mothers and fathers they would never see their child alive again due to gun violence. I’m running for Congress because I believe no parent should ever have to hear such devastating news.

[That’s why I’m committed to advocating for meaningful gun safety reform as a representative in Congress. If you’re with me, will you sign your name today? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67995148/421558388/870970569?source=EM_NBI_BW_20230812_PT_Guns_0_3MO_DrBrianWilliams_na_na_2023Record&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzgxYjNjZGMtMzMzOS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-Oqg5ww6d9PhYGjigR2hLiXvK_ZpndqAocVZmlPBuDQ=&emci=6f7422d6-3339-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=381b3cdc-3339-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=13153572)

clean_body: | | Peter, Throughout my career on the frontlines, I’ve seen too much preventable death and suffering due to firearms. It is what inspired me to run for Congress and fight for change — to end the human toll of gun violence. More than 25,000 people have died from gun violence this year already, and there are still 141 days left in 2023. We’re also on track to surpass the previous record for most mass shootings in a year. We can no longer ignore that the epidemic of gun violence is only getting worse. | I have told too many mothers and fathers they would never see their child alive again due to gun violence. I’m running for Congress because I believe no parent should ever have to hear such devastating news. – Brian | | | = | Click ** to unsubscribe from our email list. It’s a cause that’s close to my heart not just because it’s important equity work, but also because organizing communities of color is key to democrats winning. I joined Josh’s team because I saw him actually doing the work. His campaign last year wasn’t just reflective of the community, his team was actively involved in it. From early investments in latino organizers, to literally throwing an Aqua Fresca Competition, Josh puts his money where his mouth is. So, what does this cycle look like for organizing in our communities of color? I’ll explain more about that below, but if you can chip in today to help us kick this off, I’ll leave a link **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67995162/421558408/-63074460?&refcode=E3701-20230812-LatinoOrganizing-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjdmYTA5Y2MtMzMzOS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hkvJOeTgyxl7HkQOwU8xvVFyClRrhRBm48yJRLACsTQ=)**. Because of redistricting, we have gained a variety of new communities we need to introduce to Josh. This includes a sizeable AAPI community including Chinese and Sikh families as well as a very large latino population. **In fact, our district is one of the most diverse in the whole country!** So here’s our initial plan:
1. First, we need to hire a Constituency Director to manage the entire program - including organizing events and meeting with leaders in each community.
2. And second, we need to launch our digital ads in both English and Spanish. We know the Republicans are spreading misinformation to the Latino community and we have to respond in-language.

Both of these programs can only be funded through your support. body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67995174/421558476/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzcwNmZmMC0zMzM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LnZlmpqvo6FStYgac3_EU__ZP6mJkdmIpaNb_ClQJ6U=&emci=fc6f6ff0-3339-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0c706ff0-3339-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7731215)

| | Some day, people will ask what it was like to witness the Trump Presidency. All you have to do is point to the images of Charlottesville, Virginia, on August 11th and 12th, 2017. Images of men marching with lit torches brandishing swastikas and Klan symbols. A weekend punctuated with chants of "You will not replace us" and a horrific, hate-filled murder. **And Donald Trump's response?****_"Very fine people on both sides."_** This was the moment we were reminded what the dangerous MAGA movement was about, and we knew we had to stop it. Donald Trump and his extremist allies are rallying together and working to take back power in 2024, and we already know what another Trump Presidency will look like. What happened in Charlottesville is a symptom of the MAGA extremism that threatens our country, and we need to do everything we can to wipe out the hate and violence. **So we are building the grassroots movement to stop MAGA extremists.** We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. That means fighting for state legislatures, city councils, Congress, the U.S. Senate, and the Presidency. Because we are all that stands between good governance and the MAGA extremists who would tear our country apart. We've seen what happens when MAGA Republicans are empowered by a hateful, racist president – and it is horrifying. We cannot allow the fringes of extremism to become the mainstream again, so we must build the grassroots movement to stand strong against them. [**We need you to join this movement to empower Democrats up and down the ballot and take on MAGA extremists. Can we count on you?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67995175/421558477/-641752998?refcode=2023-08-12-charlottesville&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=0c706ff0-3339-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzcwNmZmMC0zMzM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LnZlmpqvo6FStYgac3_EU__ZP6mJkdmIpaNb_ClQJ6U=) Onward! _Jeff_ |

clean_body: | | | | Some day, people will ask what it was like to witness the Trump Presidency. All you have to do is point to the images of Charlottesville, Virginia, on August 11th and 12th, 2017. Images of men marching with lit torches brandishing swastikas and Klan symbols. A weekend punctuated with chants of "You will not replace us" and a horrific, hate-filled murder. And Donald Trump's response?"Very fine people on both sides." This was the moment we were reminded what the dangerous MAGA movement was about, and we knew we had to stop it. Donald Trump and his extremist allies are rallying together and working to take back power in 2024, and we already know what another Trump Presidency will look like. What happened in Charlottesville is a symptom of the MAGA extremism that threatens our country, and we need to do everything we can to wipe out the hate and violence. So we are building the grassroots movement to stop MAGA extremists. We need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. That means fighting for state legislatures, city councils, Congress, the U.S. Senate, and the Presidency. Because we are all that stands between good governance and the MAGA extremists who would tear our country apart. We've seen what happens when MAGA Republicans are empowered by a hateful, racist president – and it is horrifying. We cannot allow the fringes of extremism to become the mainstream again, so we must build the grassroots movement to stand strong against them. = Onward! Jeff | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. body:
We’re letting 100,000 Republicans go without a challenger every year.
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67995279/421558813/855222454?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWVkM2U1Yy0zNDM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y-1cmpkDg70Rzdv9io6gp1gg_VZjHMMvdWB74_GzMhc=&emci=0093a38a-6e38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=3aed3e5c-3439-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=5534179)

| | What if I told you that we're letting 100,000 Republicans win their races every year? What if I told you that that statistic didn't include races where a Democratic candidate lost, but rather where _no one challenged the Republican at all_? **We can't hand 100,000 Republicans seats without putting up a fight, so our keystone project, Contest Every Race, is on a mission to bring competitive Democratic candidates to**** _every_****race**** _everywhere_****.** Contest Every Race is an unprecedented effort to transform this moment of crisis into long-term change. [**Can you chip in just $15 today to help us invest in year-round, on-the-ground organizing and bench-building in neglected communities across the country?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67995280/421558814/1988962032?refcode=2023-08-12-cer-intro&recurring=&amount=15&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=3aed3e5c-3439-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWVkM2U1Yy0zNDM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y-1cmpkDg70Rzdv9io6gp1gg_VZjHMMvdWB74_GzMhc=) For too long, Republicans have been the only ones competing in certain areas. When we stop the GOP from running up the score in red and rural areas, we'll start winning back state houses, governors' mansions — and Congress. So, what's the strategy? **A Targeted Approach:** Identify which local offices are on the ballot, how to file, when to file, and all the important info a prospective candidate needs to know. **Recruit Candidates:** Work with the national, state, and local Democratic parties to reach out to their members and communities of interest and encourage them to run. We invite prospective candidates to meet local party leaders, connect them with coaches and training resources, and help them file for office. **Long-term Organizing:** Provide local organizers and county parties with unlimited volunteer recruitment, training, and small grants for completing organizing goals. Continually invest in long-term rural organizing capacity. **This strategy works. Since 2018, we've moved the needle!**
* 5,563 candidates successfully recruited to run;
* A whopping 44% of races won by our candidates instead of an uncontested Republican; and
* An overall 3% increase in rural votes for Democratic candidates.

[**Don't just take our word for it — check out what President Barack Obama has to say about this strategy:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67995281/421558815/1988962032?refcode=2023-08-12-cer-intro&recurring=&amount=15&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=3aed3e5c-3439-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWVkM2U1Yy0zNDM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y-1cmpkDg70Rzdv9io6gp1gg_VZjHMMvdWB74_GzMhc=)

name: Team Mondaire
subject: "Mondaire-mentum"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
This race is heating up big time.
Team, it’s been over a month since we launched our campaign, and already the Mondaire-mentum is heating up. (Thank _Politico_ for that one, not us...)

We’re building a movement, with everyday people—teachers, service workers, parents, renters, homeowners, union members, students, seniors, veterans, and working people—at the helm.

Folks are fired up to send Mondaire back to Congress, because they’ve seen what he’s already done to make life better for everyday people, and they _know_ he’ll fight tooth and nail for them again in D.C.

[**If unbridled enthusiasm were enough to win an election, we’d be a shoo-in, but the truth is it’s going to take a ton of resources to go up against Mike Lawler’s corporate PACs and extreme MAGA allies. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67995603/421560134/1224595648?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTkzNmNlNS0zNTM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2K1-GXW0k9a7ymRpC016dQ_XURdrVPF2kX5MZk9NeYM=)
Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your continued support of my campaign for Congress.

**Voters are beginning to see a clear contrast between me and my opponent, Rep. Mike Garcia – and they’re ready to bring new leadership to California’s 27th District.**

While Garcia and Kevin McCarthy plot their next attack ad, I’ve been out in the Santa Clarita and Antelope Valleys, getting to know the folks I’m running to represent. I’ve truly enjoyed meeting people from all walks of life across this district.

I hope I get the chance to see you out on the trail, too, but until then, here are a few recent highlights.

Take care,

George
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67995604/421560135/-1766409733?refcode=em-8.12.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTkzNmNlNS0zNTM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2K1-GXW0k9a7ymRpC016dQ_XURdrVPF2kX5MZk9NeYM=)****
---

* * *

**My team and I stopped by a BBQ cook-off** featuring the Asian Democrats of Los Angeles, Southern California Armenian Democrats, Pilipino American Democrats of Los Angeles, and Korean American Democratic Committee. The real winners were those of us who got to enjoy the incredible food!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67995605/421560136/-1766409733?refcode=em-8.12.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTkzNmNlNS0zNTM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2K1-GXW0k9a7ymRpC016dQ_XURdrVPF2kX5MZk9NeYM=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67995606/421560137/-1766409733?refcode=em-8.12.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTkzNmNlNS0zNTM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2K1-GXW0k9a7ymRpC016dQ_XURdrVPF2kX5MZk9NeYM=)
**I also enjoyed dinner with the Santa Clarita Valley Democrats** , who I’m excited to work alongside in the effort to flip CA-27 blue.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67995607/421560138/-1766409733?refcode=em-8.12.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTkzNmNlNS0zNTM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2K1-GXW0k9a7ymRpC016dQ_XURdrVPF2kX5MZk9NeYM=)
**I visited a wonderful back-to-school event hosted by the nonprofit Solé of the CommUNITY in Lancaster.** The event offered supplies like backpacks as well as haircuts to prepare students for the coming year.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67995608/421560139/-1766409733?refcode=em-8.12.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTkzNmNlNS0zNTM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2K1-GXW0k9a7ymRpC016dQ_XURdrVPF2kX5MZk9NeYM=)
**And I met with the Southwest Mountain States Carpenters** , who discussed how they’re creating good-paying union jobs across CA-27 thanks to a stellar apprenticeship program.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67995609/421560140/-1766409733?refcode=em-8.12.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOTkzNmNlNS0zNTM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2K1-GXW0k9a7ymRpC016dQ_XURdrVPF2kX5MZk9NeYM=)
Peter, traveling around the district has made me more motivated than ever to build a grassroots movement that can win this seat. **But we need to keep our momentum going, and I’m relying on individual donors to keep this campaign strong.**

clean_body: | = Peter, I wanted to take a moment to thank you for your continued support of my campaign for Congress. Voters are beginning to see a clear contrast between me and my opponent, Rep. Mike Garcia – and they’re ready to bring new leadership to California’s 27th District. While Garcia and Kevin McCarthy plot their next attack ad, I’ve been out in the Santa Clarita and Antelope Valleys, getting to know the folks I’m running to represent. I’ve truly enjoyed meeting people from all walks of life across this district. I hope I get the chance to see you out on the trail, too, but until then, here are a few recent highlights. Take care, George | **= My team and I stopped by a BBQ cook-off featuring the Asian Democrats of Los Angeles, Southern California Armenian Democrats, Pilipino American Democrats of Los Angeles, and Korean American Democratic Committee. The real winners were those of us who got to enjoy the incredible food! = = I also enjoyed dinner with the Santa Clarita Valley Democrats , who I’m excited to work alongside in the effort to flip CA-27 blue. = I visited a wonderful back-to-school event hosted by the nonprofit Solé of the CommUNITY in Lancaster. The event offered supplies like backpacks as well as haircuts to prepare students for the coming year. = And I met with the Southwest Mountain States Carpenters , who discussed how they’re creating good-paying union jobs across CA-27 thanks to a stellar apprenticeship program. = Peter, traveling around the district has made me more motivated than ever to build a grassroots movement that can win this seat. But we need to keep our momentum going, and I’m relying on individual donors to keep this campaign strong. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thanks for standing with us, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . George Whitesides for Congress P.O. Box 221776 Newhall, CA 91322 United States

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Thursday night’s Twilight Parade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Hi folks, I wanted to take a break from our usual emails today to share a bit about one of my favorite August traditions: **the Illinois State Fair** , which takes place in my hometown of Springfield every year. This year marks the fair’s 170th anniversary, and when it comes to town, it's a yearly reminder for me that summer is winding down and the election cycle is about to heat up. On Thursday night, we kicked off the festivities with the annual Twilight Parade, with Future Farmers of America leaders serving as Grand Marshals of the parade procession to the fairgrounds. It was great to see members of our grassroots movement join us at the parade, and I look forward to meeting more folks over the next few days and welcoming them to join us in the fight to support our working families, our small farmers, and our community. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67995622/421560182/-2053028736?refcode=AU_NJB_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20230812_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGM2Y2RmMy0zNTM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xjdT4i6Spw_PY0e7OOoPS56P52p5fgdz_PP8E3m1qLc=) The theme of this year’s fair is “Harvest the Fun,” and celebrates the vast agricultural contributions farmers make to our state every day. Whether it’s the incredible food from one of the 200 vendors in attendance or the unforgettable butter cow sculpture — folks will see how this grassroots team’s support has helped our farmers by bolstering crop insurance programs and investing in rural development initiatives — benefiting our entire state. I am excited that hundreds of thousands of folks will travel to Springfield over the next nine days to attend the State Fair and will see a small snapshot of our incredible district. Thank you for standing with me. — Nikki | [DONATE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67995623/421560183/-2053028736?refcode=AU_NJB_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20230812_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGM2Y2RmMy0zNTM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xjdT4i6Spw_PY0e7OOoPS56P52p5fgdz_PP8E3m1qLc=)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, climate change is the defining issue of our time, and we don’t have a second to waste.

Hard stop.

That’s why we’re launching our 2024 PROGRESSIVE POWER Fund to make sure we have the resources we need to mobilize progressive voters to stand up to corporate interests and defeat the radical right-wing at the polls. Will you chip in $10 today to become a founding donor? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9609?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230812_FR_trumpclimate24_0_3MO_jgourrevolution_na_na_ppf2024&t=1008&akid=4540%2E5885482%2ELbEQ3c)

BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9609?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230812_FR_trumpclimate24_0_3MO_jgourrevolution_na_na_ppf2024&t=1009&akid=4540%2E5885482%2ELbEQ3c)

July 2023 was the hottest month in recorded history. Waters off the coast of Florida measured at 101o two weeks ago. And this week alone we have seen an entire community and at least 55 lives lost to the ravages of wildfire.

These are not singular incidents, Peter Willis.

And instead of working toward a solution that will save lives, the billionaire SuperPAC-funded GOP wants to double down on dirty energy and the devastation it causes.

https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9609?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230812_FR_trumpclimate24_0_3MO_jgourrevolution_na_na_ppf2024&t=1010&akid=4540%2E5885482%2ELbEQ3c

It’s up to us to seize this moment and fight back. That’s exactly why we’re launching the 2024 PROGRESSIVE POWER Fund now — to build a war chest and bulk up our organizing operation for the crucial battles ahead. Will you chip in today to become a founding donor (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9609?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_OR_20230812_FR_trumpclimate24_0_3MO_jgourrevolution_na_na_ppf2024&t=1011&akid=4540%2E5885482%2ELbEQ3c)

When we organize, we win!

Joseph Geevarghese,

body:
Sen. Jacky Rosen is TWO POINTS DOWN in Nevada’s battleground Senate race

| Peter, I’ve read just about a million polls in my life, and very few have terrified me quite like this one:

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67996092/421561756/-220169546?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230812-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY4ZjU3NmZlLTM3MzktZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vcV-z3gB7avJs7to1Y4U30a_AWuk97CCNb0XP_N74g4=)
That’s right: Sen. Jacky Rosen is TWO POINTS DOWN in Nevada’s battleground Senate race – a race that analysts at _FiveThirtyEight_ report is likely to decide Senate control.

**But this poll shouldn’t be shocking. Mitch McConnell and his GOP cronies are all in on Jacky as a TOP target for defeat. They’ve already been coming after her with vicious attack ads, and this is only the beginning.**

[_**So ahead of Jacky’s midnight fundraising deadline, I’m begging you to pitch in a split donation of $10 – or whatever you can spare – to Jacky’s campaign and Fight for Progress to make sure she has enough resources to keep both Nevada and the Senate blue.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67996093/421561757/-220169546?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230812-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY4ZjU3NmZlLTM3MzktZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vcV-z3gB7avJs7to1Y4U30a_AWuk97CCNb0XP_N74g4=)

Last year, McConnell and his cronies FLOODED Nevada’s Senate race with $55 MILLION – **and they came within less than a percentage point of winning.**

As Republicans gear up to spend _even more_ this time around, I can’t believe that grassroots Democrats would just sit by and let Jacky Rosen lose to McConnell’s handpicked puppet candidate!

**So please, Jacky needs your immediate grassroots support. She still needs to raise another $1,472 by midnight tonight to fight back against the GOP’s attacks and close this polling gap, but there’s not much time left.[_Will you rush a split donation of $10 or more now to make sure Jacky wins in Nevada and defends our Democratic Senate majority?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/67996095/421561759/-220169546?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230812-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY4ZjU3NmZlLTM3MzktZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vcV-z3gB7avJs7to1Y4U30a_AWuk97CCNb0XP_N74g4=)**

Jacky Rosen is TWO POINTS DOWN in Nevada’s battleground Senate race – a race that analysts at FiveThirtyEight report is likely to decide Senate control. But this poll shouldn’t be shocking. Mitch McConnell and his GOP cronies are all in on Jacky as a TOP target for defeat. They’ve already been coming after her with vicious attack ads, and this is only the beginning. = | = Last year, McConnell and his cronies FLOODED Nevada’s Senate race with $55 MILLION – and they came within less than a percentage point of winning. As Republicans gear up to spend even more this time around, I can’t believe that grassroots Democrats would just sit by and let Jacky Rosen lose to McConnell’s handpicked puppet candidate! So please, Jacky needs your immediate grassroots support. She still needs to raise another $1,472 by midnight tonight to fight back against the GOP’s attacks and close this polling gap, but there’s not much time left.= | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, James Carville * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. | | The toxic ultra-partisanship of Washington is failing the American people. Fellow American, Bidenomics is not working, and we need a new path forward. Our country is accumulating debt and spending more than we have – and for only the second time in our nation's history, our country's credit rating has dropped. _**This represents a notable blemish on Washington DC and its failure to come together and create positive solutions that will help the American people in this time of financial crisis.**_ _**We can't continue to do NOTHING... there are steps we can take. **_

_**An America United**_ works with leaders such as Former Maryland Governor Larry Hogan, who crossed party lines as governor to get things done. Governor Hogan collaborated with Republicans and Democrats to bring Maryland's economy from one of the worst in the country to one of the top in our nation. This is what needs to be done in Washington. No more partisan bickering over divisive issues. clean_body: | | | | | The toxic ultra-partisanship of Washington is failing the American people. Fellow American, Bidenomics is not working, and we need a new path forward. Our country is accumulating debt and spending more than we have – and for only the second time in our nation's history, our country's credit rating has dropped. This represents a notable blemish on Washington DC and its failure to come together and create positive solutions that will help the American people in this time of financial crisis. We can't continue to do NOTHING... there are steps we can take. An America United works with leaders such as Former Maryland Governor Larry Hogan, who crossed party lines as governor to get things done. Governor Hogan collaborated with Republicans and Democrats to bring Maryland's economy from one of the worst in the country to one of the top in our nation. This is what needs to be done in Washington. No more partisan bickering over divisive issues. We need leaders who will work together with common sense solutions to restore confidence in America's ability to pay off our debts, expand our economy, unleash our domestic energy, and spend responsibly. | | Thank you, Team AAU | | | | | | Join An America United on social media! | | ---|--- | | | | Contributions to An America United are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

subject: Protecting our veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
This week was the one year anniversary of the passage of the PACT Act. This legislation was the biggest expansion of benefits and services for toxic exposed veterans in over thirty years, and Kirsten was thrilled to see it become law.
Veterans who are exposed to toxic chemicals while in service often don't see the negative impacts until years down the line — in illnesses like asthma, cancer, and more. The PACT Act ensures that these brave men and women are getting the care and treatment they deserve.
Veterans are heroes who have dedicated their lives to protecting our country. We owe them everything — but too often, our political leaders let them down.
Since he took office, Kirsten's opponent has repeatedly voted against the best interests of our nation's service members.
He voted in lockstep with MAGA Republicans to approve a budget that would have meant 31 million fewer veteran outpatient visits and 81,000 layoffs across the Veterans Health Administration. He voted yes on banning diversity and inclusion initiatives in the Department of Defense. And he voted yes on an amendment that would make it even harder for active service members to receive reproductive care.
We should be giving the people who sacrifice so much for our country more support, not less.
In Congress, Kirsten will fight to uplift and support our veterans. Their needs will always come before culture war antics and political agendas.
On the anniversary of the PACT Act, we're calling on Republicans in Congress to stand up for veterans, not cut funding to crucial services and benefits. Will you join us by adding your name now? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/-m9LO7HdYkSckjCUksiLFA2]

clean_body: [] This week was the one year anniversary of the passage of the PACT Act. This legislation was the biggest expansion of benefits and services for toxic exposed veterans in over thirty years, and Kirsten was thrilled to see it become law. Veterans who are exposed to toxic chemicals while in service often don't see the negative impacts until years down the line — in illnesses like asthma, cancer, and more. The PACT Act ensures that these brave men and women are getting the care and treatment they deserve. Veterans are heroes who have dedicated their lives to protecting our country. We owe them everything — but too often, our political leaders let them down. Since he took office, Kirsten's opponent has repeatedly voted against the best interests of our nation's service members. He voted in lockstep with MAGA Republicans to approve a budget that would have meant 31 million fewer veteran outpatient visits and 81,000 layoffs across the Veterans Health Administration. He voted yes on banning diversity and inclusion initiatives in the Department of Defense. And he voted yes on an amendment that would make it even harder for active service members to receive reproductive care. We should be giving the people who sacrifice so much for our country more support, not less. In Congress, Kirsten will fight to uplift and support our veterans. Their needs will always come before culture war antics and political agendas. On the anniversary of the PACT Act, we're calling on Republicans in Congress to stand up for veterans, not cut funding to crucial services and benefits. Will you join us by adding your name now? [] ADD YOUR NAME [] ADD YOUR NAME [] Thank you so much! — Team Engel DONATE NOW [] DONATE NOW [] [] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer. She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District. In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? name: Will Rollins HQ
subject: Here’s the state of the race in CA-41.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Will Rollins for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67997899/421568646/-1669222325?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzQ4NDc4ZS00MDM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Em2jQf_zk9ctjHjh-PjRYwbsxsiTZfIg9yVBkdIAGZw=)
Hi Peter \-- It’s Coby, Will’s campaign manager.

Election Day may seem far off (451 days, to be exact), but in a race as close as ours, every single day counts. As a valued member of our team, we want to make sure you’re in the loop on where things stand. That’s why I wanted to send you this strategy memo laying out the state of the race here in CA-41.
| **State of the Race in California’s 41st District**

_**CA-41 is a toss up that could determine House control.**_
Currently, Democrats hold a +3,000 voter registration advantage in CA-41. That’s a big reason why non-partisan elections analysts at the Cook Political Report moved our race from "Lean Republican" to "Toss up."

_**Will can unify Democrats, Republicans and Independents.**_
In the last election cycle, Will stood out by outperforming high-profile Democrats in CA-41 -- including Governor Gavin Newsom and Senator Alex Padilla. This was done by attracting Republican and Independent voters who were fed up with Ken Calvert's corruption. For context, Will was the sole Democratic challenger in California to win the majority of Independents in 2022. We’re going to build on that success in 2024.

_**Ken Calvert's anti-LGBTQ+ past is a major liability.**_
CA-41 is home to one of the largest LGBTQ+ populations in the country. Despite this, Calvert has one of the worst anti-LGBTQ+ records in Congress. Just last month, Calvert voted to defund housing and services to the LGBTQ+ community. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67997900/421568647/-1669222325?refcode=em-8.12.23-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzQ4NDc4ZS00MDM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Em2jQf_zk9ctjHjh-PjRYwbsxsiTZfIg9yVBkdIAGZw=) Will, on the other hand, would make history as the first openly gay member of Congress to represent Palm Springs. In Congress, he will fight for the rights of all Americans. _**Our early fundraising is strong (thanks to you!).**_
In our first six weeks, Will raised over $890,000 from 4,300+ donors. Over 90% of our donations were less than $100, and $0 came in from corporate PACs. That’s huge and a testament to our grassroots strength.

_**We need to be prepared for an onslaught of GOP attacks.**_
This week, a super PAC aligned with Kevin McCarthy announced plans to spend $100+ million across blue-state swing districts like CA-41. Ken Calvert is also quietly raking in massive sums of special interest cash. His reported cash on hand is over $1.5 million -- $700,000 more than Will has. According to reports, our race could become one of the most expensive in the state, if not the country.

clean_body: | = Hi Peter \-- It’s Coby, Will’s campaign manager. Election Day may seem far off (451 days, to be exact), but in a race as close as ours, every single day counts. As a valued member of our team, we want to make sure you’re in the loop on where things stand. That’s why I wanted to send you this strategy memo laying out the state of the race here in CA-41. | State of the Race in California’s 41st District CA-41 is a toss up that could determine House control. Currently, Democrats hold a +3,000 voter registration advantage in CA-41. That’s a big reason why non-partisan elections analysts at the Cook Political Report moved our race from "Lean Republican" to "Toss up." Will can unify Democrats, Republicans and Independents. In the last election cycle, Will stood out by outperforming high-profile Democrats in CA-41 -- including Governor Gavin Newsom and Senator Alex Padilla. This was done by attracting Republican and Independent voters who were fed up with Ken Calvert's corruption. For context, Will was the sole Democratic challenger in California to win the majority of Independents in 2022. We’re going to build on that success in 2024. Ken Calvert's anti-LGBTQ+ past is a major liability. CA-41 is home to one of the largest LGBTQ+ populations in the country. Despite this, Calvert has one of the worst anti-LGBTQ+ records in Congress. Just last month, Calvert voted to defund housing and services to the LGBTQ+ community. = Will, on the other hand, would make history as the first openly gay member of Congress to represent Palm Springs. In Congress, he will fight for the rights of all Americans. Our early fundraising is strong (thanks to you!). In our first six weeks, Will raised over $890,000 from 4,300+ donors. Over 90% of our donations were less than $100, and $0 came in from corporate PACs. That’s huge and a testament to our grassroots strength. We need to be prepared for an onslaught of GOP attacks. This week, a super PAC aligned with Kevin McCarthy announced plans to spend $100+ million across blue-state swing districts like CA-41. Ken Calvert is also quietly raking in massive sums of special interest cash. His reported cash on hand is over $1.5 million -- $700,000 more than Will has. According to reports, our race could become one of the most expensive in the state, if not the country. Peter, I hope this gave you some insight into where things stand on the ground. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for your support, Coby Eiss Campaign Manager P.S.
