name: Rep. Lauren Underwood
subject: A historic change for Medicare beneficiaries
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
It’s been one year since the signing of the Inflation Reduction Act, and President Biden is still working to get the job done -- so that every American can access the health care they need. | | |
---
Peter, President Biden signed the historic _Inflation Reduction Act_ last August, and it’s benefiting communities across America: from investments in clean energy to addressing domestic energy security, this legislation is an essential step towards economic prosperity for all. And President Biden and I are excited to see that prosperity spread across the country -- but we also know that economic growth and access to health care go hand in hand. As a public health nurse, I saw firsthand the importance of making health care more accessible for all. **Because when we take care of our communities and ensure they have the tools to look after their health, we can band together to focus on the bigger picture.** That’s why I’m proud that the IRA includes my signature legislation to lower the cost of health care premiums, along with crucial provisions that cap insulin costs for seniors on Medicare at $35 a month. It allows Medicare to meaningfully negotiate drug prices, with the number of drugs covered steadily increasing. Over the next few years, we’ll see Medicare benefits substantially expand to include free vaccines and an out-of-pocket cost cap of $2,000. **But this is just the beginning.** President Biden has approached this work with determination and tenacity -- preparing our country for the industries of the future, with historic investments in infrastructure, clean energy, domestic manufacturing, and research and innovation -- so that every American has a chance to benefit. **Learn more about the work he’s doing to fight for families in your community and across the country:**
| | | [LEARN MORE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDEA0Es8AR8U9h_eL5jzwmAJIpBJDHtx1vZ2JNBQQfV409BzcNizqRU0Hyu4wwx8BjQdS2mNejhmuokUFsAzGuCdGTs_0gmRmQ78ZTBGjTCWUtGmxMVW5olyC_Zv12w_az-xzR3ZWZK_8iDeREaGsIyykgvjlmQraa_VzY-9X48xnYNgp0ftne_QZt4u3qNSaVSfON51dgfx-SThTVezivKToE_OTzfwPahD6LPhmhz1DnJ-I2WNcApDV7qypLdFYW1fw6Jb7Qtk3-vSFPVs6TGj5GHIm27SbABj5hD1aDTGfc1EYNSAoTCzm-6uM20tRSay6ySQOnBVtnP7B5t4idSe4sJjnMqkCMkK7hF5K7Rm9Hl8VwUlfHSwyF-v6xFsYiH5wYdhgsufKeoUam8RDYQAy49tqenh5aXX4OKc1VKkqC1xRdn84_7ncVMTL-tBPMsqfmx0gKKF-D-xyNXoa2XvRoyzdU03zMTehfPgEX7wa/3yo/sfVgmXx5SAeoZgbjL-Lphg/h0/F7Fo3nEbLx0W3-szzbv6NOKgoQHpT4mUIL6i2bQLVnk)
---
I know Joe Biden. I know he won’t leave you behind. And I know that we’ll see the benefits of these investments for years to come -- so that families across the country can prosper in healthy, thriving communities and access the opportunities they deserve. I hope you’ll take just a minute to learn more about what the _Inflation Reduction Act_ can do in ensuring that every American sees success.
Thank you,
Lauren
Lauren Underwood
U.S. Representative, IL-14

If you’d like to only receive our most important emails, **[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk6gVFZ1bAZYY22mWHMkylxrCXInB9iTFNtbMmsdDMYnbCKr6iPHrkQcUiVDIm6qWUJhaZnCqQsfGbjGtvsRB2rnvS2Xy72OwtjZ6BG77nPVy_bo4YmVHCnKtwGqqUHLx6ISxU4YK5958DnnkvrlssPx2aEoGNtTkQm4VscqdB_iCQNRcTWF0yDwVtqfV3Q4uEn8VpSaM3pBX1y3hLMuah1Y_zk8gO7yoeqEK5g2zJH7yrZLRVtl2USFZyHR7Uavid9F7a9vfyQo5BDcdJEZY9G2zU5GaKeYlFdNWIVPla3Lg/3yo/sfVgmXx5SAeoZgbjL-Lphg/h4/Jhy7wrIFTH34ZwkdXDvF-FQq1q5hVQqxhsqQyG9Fe8Q)** If you’d like to unsubscribe from all Biden for President emails, you can **[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWalZZNA-6Dgih5xl3OksS5iLi-uAnhayJjPQh6we-GTyc4BQhzb8JxCPOOhma092iYC6OECoTBsjTo7TDdAC_XerRJe6r9EnDlEWpqjFG1GrGFmuW3eSZGqMc23SZpQkw8_uZ__4C49VbVXMe4Wc1Ov5F_e_XdA5CqocpyKwbvoF7yKA1krd1gL-eeemDxnMzqCVUidAn6L3kk6LjiQch_ffhVzZr9pYEMebHfg_JdoSPgNwUWGSBCl4hw10o0zYplFAnhrZdS3ED1Y4FEICkz1qWTeDIlxuKExVmuofiSA/3yo/sfVgmXx5SAeoZgbjL-Lphg/h5/U5r_a--8nEo0fNZF88jFyidNVdphOZqgyqaDmLfTlr4)**

body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=28088%2E3422442%2EVdDRhi)
Derek,
We’d like to introduce the Grassroots Whiteboard—a whiteboard we will use to highlight our donors! **[Donate now to get your name on the official Katie Porter HQ Grassroots Whiteboard.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230812-1?refcode=EMAK12_1_GRA_20230812_V1_F&refcode2=28088_3422442_VdDRhi&akid=28088%2E3422442%2EVdDRhi)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230812-1?refcode=EMAK12_1_GRA_20230812_V1_F&refcode2=28088_3422442_VdDRhi&akid=28088%2E3422442%2EVdDRhi)
As the only candidate in this race who doesn’t accept corporate PAC or federal lobbyist money, Katie and our campaign rely on support from folks like you. That’s why we’re excited to have your names on the whiteboard in our campaign headquarters!
[**Chip in now to get your name on the Grassroots Whiteboard before the space fills up!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230812-1?refcode=EMAK12_1_GRA_20230812_V1_F&refcode2=28088_3422442_VdDRhi&akid=28088%2E3422442%2EVdDRhi)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230812-1?refcode=EMAK12_1_GRA_20230812_V1_F&refcode2=28088_3422442_VdDRhi&akid=28088%2E3422442%2EVdDRhi)
—Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAK12_1_GRA_20230812_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=28088_3422442_VdDRhi&akid=28088%2E3422442%2EVdDRhi)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=28088%2E3422442%2EVdDRhi)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=28088%2E3422442%2EVdDRhi)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Clarence Thomas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
No individual, regardless of their position, should be exempt from legal scrutiny for lawbreaking.
#
For two decades, Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas failed to disclose millions of dollars in gifts from billionaire GOP megadonors. According to new reporting from ProPublica that broke this week, Thomas accepted 26 private jet flights and 38 destination vacations — **and disclosed exactly zero of them.**
No one is above the law. So yesterday, Alexandria led a letter to the Department of Justice to urge an official investigation into Thomas. She was joined by Ranking Members Jamie Raskin and Jerry Nadler, and Judiciary Members Ted Lieu and Hank Johnson.
This level of corruption is shocking by any standard of a functioning democracy. **A failure to hold Justice Thomas accountable sends a loud, dangerous signal to the full court that his actions are fair game.**
[Will you make a $5 contribution today so that Alexandria can continue to call out corruption and ensure that no one — no matter how rich or powerful — is above the law?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-2023812.TsF9gM&refcode=em20230812-4799-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4799%2E2526796%2ELxJWW_)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-2023812.TsF9gM&refcode=em20230812-4799-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4799%2E2526796%2ELxJWW_)**
According to legal experts, Thomas appears to have violated the Ethics in Government Act of 1978 by failing to disclose years worth of private jet flights, luxury yacht vacations, and VIP sports tickets afforded to him by a circle of ultrawealthy, conservative executives.
Reporting has revealed that Thomas met many of these wealthy friends after his appointment to the Court, through an exclusive nonprofit to which Thomas gives annual access to the Supreme Court Building for a fundraiser that costs $1,500 or more per person to attend.
This is a tipping point, and inaction is a decision to erode and further delegitimize the Supreme Court. As Alexandria said, “We must go where the facts take us.”
[If you agree with Alexandria and want to help power her reelection to Congress, will you chip in $5,or anything you can, today before our mid-month deadline?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-2023812.TsF9gM&refcode=em20230812-4799-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4799%2E2526796%2ELxJWW_)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-2023812.TsF9gM&refcode=em20230812-4799-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4799%2E2526796%2ELxJWW_)**
Thank you for reading and we'll keep you informed about how this story develops.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-2023812?refcode=em20230812-4799-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=23&refcode2=4799_2526796_LxJWW_&akid=4799%2E2526796%2ELxJWW_)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230812-4799-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=24&akid=4799%2E2526796%2ELxJWW_)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=4799%2E2526796%2ELxJWW_) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=4799%2E2526796%2ELxJWW_) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=4799%2E2526796%2ELxJWW_)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

body:
[**Tell Congress: We Need Affordable Housing NOW!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67998698/421572030/1755162476?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230812_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDM3MDYzNC00NjM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PW_0AU9yiYBuBR0jS1TIrCP_204m546f--u5EExzYiA=&emci=f9b38f2c-9d38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=b0370634-4639-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)
Growing up, Derek Marshall and his siblings spent Saturdays helping their parents with a weekly homeless outreach program called “Soup to Go,” which provided meals, supplies, and solidarity to people who’d been disenfranchised and dismissed from society.
Now, as rents and housing prices skyrocket, homelessness is on the rise. Working families can’t afford to live near their jobs, lengthening commutes and snarling traffic.
We can’t solve this problem without systemic change.
**Derek Marshall is running for Congress to build more affordable housing. Will you stand with his campaign today?**
**[Sign the petition: demand more affordable housing now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67998699/421572031/1755162476?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230812_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDM3MDYzNC00NjM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PW_0AU9yiYBuBR0jS1TIrCP_204m546f--u5EExzYiA=&emci=f9b38f2c-9d38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=b0370634-4639-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)**
[Sign On](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67998700/421572032/1755162476?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230812_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDM3MDYzNC00NjM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PW_0AU9yiYBuBR0jS1TIrCP_204m546f--u5EExzYiA=&emci=f9b38f2c-9d38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=b0370634-4639-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)
In Congress, Derek Marshall will fight to build more housing that’s owned and occupied by people.
We need to keep homes in the hands of American families, not hedge funds.
And, his “Public Option for Housing” plan will create rental units tied to income for working families nationwide.
**[Derek Marshall believes housing is a human right. Stand with his campaign for Congress and sign on: more affordable housing now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67998701/421572033/1755162476?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_marshall2024%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20230812_01%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDM3MDYzNC00NjM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PW_0AU9yiYBuBR0jS1TIrCP_204m546f--u5EExzYiA=&emci=f9b38f2c-9d38-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=b0370634-4639-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=21617867)**

Marshall for Congress

clean_body: Growing up, Derek Marshall and his siblings spent Saturdays helping their parents with a weekly homeless outreach program called “Soup to Go,” which provided meals, supplies, and solidarity to people who’d been disenfranchised and dismissed from society. Now, as rents and housing prices skyrocket, homelessness is on the rise. Working families can’t afford to live near their jobs, lengthening commutes and snarling traffic. We can’t solve this problem without systemic change. Derek Marshall is running for Congress to build more affordable housing. Will you stand with his campaign today? In Congress, Derek Marshall will fight to build more housing that’s owned and occupied by people. We need to keep homes in the hands of American families, not hedge funds. And, his “Public Option for Housing” plan will create rental units tied to income for working families nationwide. Thanks for your support, Marshall for Congress = Derek Marshall is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. = To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 (760) 486-2416 Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | |

Fellow American, they can preach to their far-left audiences all they want, it's not going to stop me from speaking the TRUTH the D.C. Establishment doesn't want you to hear.

**Their name-calling won't stop me.**

_**[Will you stand with me, Fellow American?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3a08f1113bc34df4901d817749a8e12c&_e=KJl9TeYF3ap1V8BK3lVcrlJB8UTiZzF0hr1PYErLZiZVZDB0GK2rM0C-E-CZwD8qhUrAaXJ4F030AAsutbdb7MLEqHCIHzLPzTCPzXI7BIpD6cDS6WaaBPzysy8CUoIVhOmdlxRuaUEUE9lpiCctv720Odpn2U4F2G_USWp8a6lB3pswjz2fshMLyjASNc37H4RrC2bZbFl2FvArSsnl5Ms0cMxY0y8f-aaVp_3KggASkXfFqzjM86sKGPWZE6Ohi1hIydfR9vXgJDciDiTc_3H5Ax0NRgyYFrX3Jb3nNV4tcQOovD17ew_owhM7UQ5-CbDh5jS95cO842po5R3SLiXaLpIdrmjSEtqsMYD22vf07AMc4viE6bbGGCs05nhMkge8GdUKBzmzvZ41YrLahmc3WR_lF3K7jOpfNDBADnQ%3D)**_

Chris Christie's interview on MSNBC made one thing clear: It doesn't matter if you have an R or a D next to your name, the “New Establishment” all share the same things:
* Pro-war in Ukraine
* Fine with political opponents getting arrested
* Anti-free speech
* Bought & paid for by Super PACs
* Pretends to be anti-establishment

It's laughable that MSNBC will trot out someone like Chris Christie to bash me so they can feign “bipartisanship” while still totally hiding from direct debate with me.

I won't ever back down from speaking the TRUTH, even if it's not popular with the mainstream media. That's why I am looking forward to the first Republican Presidential Debate later this month, but I need your help to secure a center spot on stage.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: The D.C. Establishment is afraid of our movement. They don't want to disrupt the status quo. | | Chris Christie, former Republican Joe Scarborough, and Mika Brzezinski all had a lot to say about me and this movement we're creating. Fellow American, they can preach to their far-left audiences all they want, it's not going to stop me from speaking the TRUTH the D.C. Establishment doesn't want you to hear. Their name-calling won't stop me. Chris Christie's interview on MSNBC made one thing clear: It doesn't matter if you have an R or a D next to your name, the “New Establishment” all share the same things: Pro-war in Ukraine Fine with political opponents getting arrested Anti-free speech Bought & paid for by Super PACs Pretends to be anti-establishment It's laughable that MSNBC will trot out someone like Chris Christie to bash me so they can feign “bipartisanship” while still totally hiding from direct debate with me. I won't ever back down from speaking the TRUTH, even if it's not popular with the mainstream media. That's why I am looking forward to the first Republican Presidential Debate later this month, but I need your help to secure a center spot on stage. | | | ---|---|--- | | Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence**. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. body:
Folks, did you see the most recent Montana Senate poll?
JON TESTER: 45%
GOP OPPONENT: 42%
This poll proves we have what it takes to win 2024’s most competitive race, but all of our momentum could come crashing down if we don’t have the resources to fend off the GOP’s attacks. If we want to win, we will have to fight like hell to make it happen.
Will you step up today and split a contribution between Seth Moulton and my campaign to help us stay in the lead no matter what national Republicans throw our way? It’s important we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Folks, we know the election seems far away, but the honest truth is that early resources are critical to building a campaign strong enough to win.
And with Mitch McConnell planning to unleash tens of millions in dark money so his hand-picked candidate can win, every dollar we raise counts. Your support today means we can reach more voters, mobilize more supporters, and fight back harder against the negative attacks that will come.
Your support is critical, especially now. Please chip in -- split with Seth Moulton -- to help us build up as much small-dollar support as possible so we can take on whatever McConnell and other national Republicans throw our way. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
It means so much to me to have folks like you on this team.
—Jon

JON TESTER: 45% GOP OPPONENT: 42% This poll proves we have what it takes to win 2024’s most competitive race, but all of our momentum could come crashing down if we don’t have the resources to fend off the GOP’s attacks. If we want to win, we will have to fight like hell to make it happen. Will you step up today and split a contribution between Seth Moulton and my campaign to help us stay in the lead no matter what national Republicans throw our way? It’s important we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal. [] Donate [] Folks, we know the election seems far away, but the honest truth is that early resources are critical to building a campaign strong enough to win. And with Mitch McConnell planning to unleash tens of millions in dark money so his hand-picked candidate can win, every dollar we raise counts. Your support today means we can reach more voters, mobilize more supporters, and fight back harder against the negative attacks that will come. Your support is critical, especially now. Please chip in -- split with Seth Moulton -- to help us build up as much small-dollar support as possible so we can take on whatever McConnell and other national Republicans throw our way. [] It means so much to me to have folks like you on this team. —Jon [] Donate [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . subject: Catching you up

body:
This race has been heating up, so we wanted to catch you up to speed on what's been happening. Peter – we're less than three months away from Election Day! This race is heating up, so we wanted to catch you up to speed on what's been happening:
1. This race has been called competitive from the start. Andy only won by less than 0.35% in 2019, and _Politico_ has called the race "dramatically close” this year.

2. Daniel Cameron and the three super PACs propping him up have announced or spent nearly $10 MILLION on TV ads to try to buy this race.

3. Andy’s opponent was just endorsed by Brian Kemp, the GOP governor of Georgia. That means out-of-state dollars will keep pouring into Kentucky to fund dishonest attack ads against Andy.

[**Peter – we have a tough three months ahead of us if we're going to re-elect Andy and protect Kentucky's progress. clean_body: This race has been heating up, so we wanted to catch you up to speed on what's been happening. Peter – we're less than three months away from Election Day! This race is heating up, so we wanted to catch you up to speed on what's been happening: 1. This race has been called competitive from the start. Andy only won by less than 0.35% in 2019, and Politico has called the race "dramatically close” this year. 2. Daniel Cameron and the three super PACs propping him up have announced or spent nearly $10 MILLION on TV ads to try to buy this race. 3. Andy’s opponent was just endorsed by Brian Kemp, the GOP governor of Georgia. That means out-of-state dollars will keep pouring into Kentucky to fund dishonest attack ads against Andy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thanks, Team Beshear | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Hello – I’m emailing to ask you for $5 to help me defeat Lauren Boebert.
Here’s why: **The latest poll of the 2024 campaign shows me neck-and-neck with Lauren Boebert. I’m TIED with Boebert 45% - 45%.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67999949/421579763/1610638071?refcode=em20230812pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=63253cd7-5339-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzI1M2NkNy01MzM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FhWXheOxLVAt2wh_yAl84Zo-Kb6BHbZ40gUGgfCtApo=)
In 2022, our race was the closest in the entire country. After a recount, I came just 546 short of sending Boebert packing. That’s why I’m asking for a $5 donation from you now.
I know $5 might not sound like much, but that’s how we’ve been building momentum and how we made Lauren Boebert the most vulnerable Republican incumbent.
But with this new poll now showing Boebert still as vulnerable as she was in 2022, her Super PACs are going to stop at nothing to prevent us from winning. That’s why I need you to give now if I’m going to defeat Lauren Boebert in 2024.
**My campaign has set a goal to raise another $125,000 before our critical fundraising deadline tonight, but right now, we’re still pretty short. And with Boebert and her Washington allies already attacking me, we cannot afford to fall even one dollar short.**
Since you started reading this email, three other people will have already donated their $5 to help me win, but I’m counting on you to chip in now too.
[**Please, this cannot wait. Will you chip in $5 or more right now – our average online donation is $26 – before this critical fundraising deadline to help me defeat Lauren Boebert? I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so every dollar truly counts. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67999950/421579764/1610638071?refcode=em20230812pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=63253cd7-5339-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzI1M2NkNy01MzM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FhWXheOxLVAt2wh_yAl84Zo-Kb6BHbZ40gUGgfCtApo=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Fabi=C3=A1n=20Basabe?=
subject: I shocked the political establishment. Let's do it again!
body:
| | | | | Copy of Lavern for Fabian | | | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=b58e4b3aff&e=84ee529f47)
---
| | | My Fellow American,
In November 2022 I shocked the entire political establishment when I flipped a seat in Miami that had belonged to the Democrats reliably for decades.
I was the first Republican to win that seat, but it was an incredibly close race. I won by just over 200 votes.
With that victory, I got to the Florida House of Representatives and went right to work.
I've voted as a constitutional conservative every chance I've gotten and that has subjected me to **MANY** attacks from those on the Left - the smear campaigns have been unprecedented.
**They can't handle the fact that a Republican won this seat and is actually voting as a conservative.**
---
[HELP FABIAN BASABE KEEP THIS SEAT RED!](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=d9de4319a8&e=84ee529f47)
| | | Here's the problem, though. My opponent is a well-funded radical Leftist from an activist group known as Equality Florida.
So far, he's raised six figures to try and get this seat back. In a state race, that's not a small deal. **[We MUST catch up and do so quickly. Can I count on your support today?](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=42a2863a97&e=84ee529f47)**
In Florida, we really don't care what you do, as long as you do not mess with children.
In Florida, we simply make sure you do not “come for our children”.
In Florida, if you do go after OUR children, YOUR problems begin.
I know it is a pretty sane and standard thought process, but it is not one that our opponents agree with.
They have made it very clear that they are coming for our children -- they want to overturn laws that we've passed to protect children and insert gender ideology and CRT right back into our classrooms.
**I'm their top target in Florida and the only way to stop the Democrats’ attacks is to make sure my campaign war chest is fully funded. I'm working hard to deliver for the people but I'm being put through one of the dirtiest smear campaigns in the history of Florida politics.**
[**_I’m humbly asking you to come to my urgent defense by giving a small donation to my campaign today. Anything you can give, even if it’s just $5 will make a TREMENDOUS impact on defending this seat against the Left’s attacks._**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=b86ccc999f&e=84ee529f47)

---
[KEEP THIS SEAT RED: $10.00](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=d00e52760c&e=84ee529f47)
[KEEP THIS SEAT RED: $25.00](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=924b6d8a60&e=84ee529f47)
[KEEP THIS SEAT RED: $50.00](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=e4dbcb0511&e=84ee529f47)
[KEEP THIS SEAT RED: $106.00](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=ead12a79f5&e=84ee529f47)
[KEEP THIS SEAT RED: CUSTOM AMOUNT](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=d9cc372b35&e=84ee529f47)
| | These state races make a **HUGE** difference for the whole country. If Democrats are able to flip this seat back, it has big national implications.
Let's not allow the Democrats the victory. **[Chip in today. Our campaign really needs you.](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=9c7f2dd2a4&e=84ee529f47)**
---
| | In Liberty,
Fabián Basabe

---

| | Peter,

We need your help right now. Early investment in the Democratic Party of Georgia will be critical to all of our victories up and down the ballot in 2024.

It’s like I always say, “If you want peaches on election day, you have to plant your seeds the year before.”

[_**Can I count on you to help us plant our seeds right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67999987/421580129/710125701?refcode=20230812.1_JP_8Q&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGQyNWVkYi01NjM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CpVKl4FsFpCNKmyofKnHCDfFTVlZ6sqjFSqUr7VDc0Q=)**_

If we want Georgia to go blue in 2024, we need to make investments right now in our field and voter protection programs. We need to talk with voters about the issues that matter most to them. We need to make sure that everyone across Georgia knows how Democrats are delivering for Georgians: bringing inflation down and job growth up, lowering health care costs, and building our economy from the bottom up and the middle out – all while pushing back on Republicans’ extreme agenda across the country and right here in Georgia.

**_But if we don’t get the investment we need, then we won’t be able to reach voters in every corner of the state._**

[_**Will you pitch in and invest in the Democratic Party of Georgia ahead of 2024? We have a whole lot of work to do, and we could use your help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/67999988/421580130/710125701?refcode=20230812.1_JP_8Q&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGQyNWVkYi01NjM5LWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CpVKl4FsFpCNKmyofKnHCDfFTVlZ6sqjFSqUr7VDc0Q=)**_

Thank you for all your support, and let’s plant the seeds of democracy!

– Justin

Justin Pitts
Deputy Executive Director
Democratic Party of Georgia

body:
A year ago, the House passed an assault weapons ban, but Republicans in the Senate stopped its passage.

| Peter,

It’s David Hogg. A year ago, the House passed an assault weapons ban, but Republicans in the Senate stopped its passage.

I’m all too familiar with the deadly effects of assault-style weapons. It’s the same type of weapon that a former classmate used when he entered my school, Marjory Stoneman Douglas, and killed my classmates.

_No one, especially not teenagers, should be able to access assault weapons._

**These weapons of war don’t belong in our schools or on our streets.

[_That’s why I’m joining Stop Gun Violence PAC and Leaders We Deserve in calling for Congress to immediately pass an assault weapons ban. name: Mark Lamb
subject: This is disgusting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
Why in the HELL would New York state be awarded $130 million for migrant containment efforts when states like Arizona bear the brunt of the illegal activity?
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=dd7881bd76ce4452adba229aa3746078&_t=rsmWd-WfzeOeTbVeEhhlt58aVllfboexjUcPycNJXupVywFaWta9kqvAc_VHjeWLdGU1_Gawpddn8wrKHxovw_cYF6Ut4AhSKBaNnQ0oGgQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=dd7881bd76ce4452adba229aa3746078&_t=rsmWd-WfzeOeTbVeEhhlt58aVllfboexjUcPycNJXupVywFaWta9kqvAc_VHjeWLdGU1_Gawpddn8wrKHxovw_cYF6Ut4AhSKBaNnQ0oGgQ%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=dd7881bd76ce4452adba229aa3746078&_e=SjGH3EQJnvFBYSoU35ltCelDxCOlAGqKpR7b8c4K6GTJCwYWpHRWAb8geX-GIcVK6fpI0EyHXmgPEzSST1ZnmBkYiB4F-YnYFxVh53ac2SSMqh5ZOICrSkG4Uq7m_2NwMWrco9T8ex_PStAsraaypiu0-Q3SoTOCPxk0Bq8RamiBETBPa6OLZSySZBkgbE7aYQik-URRKFu3oyCuKTlN5H6Wdj8V-5UR6Di3uaDiN7-eNN8_kZEF6yU00yfgHZ6Hf7MfK2S0gweai2g0YLz4k2L5tyjiJPy5XRElcGNzxPL1h0FhIrtwQbpgp1K1jbTNfDnkiMei9uKXBtpgd_4CBtN7xj3fUNmD8y53FhcZaG25NBvG0KhlQVmk3a-pBa4b8nuXFa5oxsyqspEn6awovg%3D%3D)
| $130 MILLION TO NEW YORK CITY TO MANAGE **_"MIGRANT CRISIS"_**
Fellow Conservative,

Our Southern Border is not secure and every member of the House and Senate, whether they want to admit it or not, knows it. **There have been 2,310,987 border encounters in fiscal year 2023 so far; in 2022, there were 2,378,944!**

As Sheriff of Pinal County – Arizona’s 3rd largest – it’s up to me and my deputies to ensure the security of the communities under our jurisdiction. And unlike President Biden and Washington Democrats, I don’t play favorites. **As I see it, every man, woman, and child deserve a safe community in which to live. Again, that’s my belief, and it’s not necessarily one that the President or the Senate majority leader share. **

_**IF THEY DID, $130 MILLION**_ in federal aid wouldn’t have gone to New York City to help their city manage their own “migrant surge.” **Think about it:** New York doesn’t share a border with Mexico like Arizona does, so why would the Federal Emergency Management Agency funnel such a significant amount of cash to New York City? Well, probably because Chuck Schumer is from Brooklyn! Want to know something else Arizona doesn’t have that New York City does? **Deep pocketed Democrat donors who aren’t used to migrants freely wondering into their upper crust communities uninvited.**

Meanwhile in Arizona where we’re bearing the brunt of illegal border encounters, along with New Mexico, Texas and California, **we’ve received just $45 million from feds to help prevent overcrowding in migrant facilities.**
**
** **THIS IS AS WRONG AS WRONG GETS!**

**[I’m asking you to chip in $5, $10, or even $25 right now](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=dd7881bd76ce4452adba229aa3746078&_e=SjGH3EQJnvFBYSoU35ltCelDxCOlAGqKpR7b8c4K6GTJCwYWpHRWAb8geX-GIcVK6fpI0EyHXmgPEzSST1ZnmBkYiB4F-YnYFxVh53ac2SSMqh5ZOICrSkG4Uq7m_2NwMWrco9T8ex_PStAsraaypiu0-Q3SoTOCPxk0Bq8RamiBETBPa6OLZSySZBkgbE7aYQik-URRKFu3oyCuKTlN5H6Wdj8V-5UR6Di3uaDiN7-eNN8_kZEF6yU00yfgHZ6HMm5R8T6TACWyzDcKSosJMNxo1gJ2iGY_fzOhtNTNkiXq4j1RO_ACv618e8xfHzgLzFnzCWvXhnU7MEQdvHAHdVRBUhQMdp1jkv5eiagO4xoFE97JfZ5Z1XuDqJ1bEaZTN7VHt3aIr3TAPWeDfke7NA%3D%3D)** to my Senate campaign because you, and everyone reading this right now, needs a law enforcement official who understands the true crisis we’re facing at our border as Arizona’s next U.S. Senator.

[**INVEST IN BORDER PROTECTION
INVEST IN SHERIFF LAMB**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=dd7881bd76ce4452adba229aa3746078&_e=SjGH3EQJnvFBYSoU35ltCelDxCOlAGqKpR7b8c4K6GTJCwYWpHRWAb8geX-GIcVK6fpI0EyHXmgPEzSST1ZnmBkYiB4F-YnYFxVh53ac2SSMqh5ZOICrSkG4Uq7m_2NwMWrco9T8ex_PStAsraaypiu0-Q3SoTOCPxk0Bq8RamiBETBPa6OLZSySZBkgbE7aYQik-URRKFu3oyCuKTlN5H6Wdj8V-5UR6Di3uaDiN7-eNN8_kZEF6yU00yfgHZ6HsaqM8VvfeqbqQwDiiW1nrH3b2C6lYG8DesvlJkEA00bd3baxEBb3mEVe3dEVrlxipLuyHvBNxgGUuLE9Bioow4hMbvDtQ1yiKEX0DMlW1Gfut24tLISan0e0ErwbNkE4bXgiCDBn2AHbexgD4oJPuw%3D%3D)
I’m running for the United States Senate because every American family deserves to feel safe in their homes – not just New York City Democrats. If I had it my way, the border would be completely shut down. But without a Republican in the White Hour or a majority in the Senate, that’s currently not an option. **[What we can do to start addressing the ever-spiraling problem is to boot Democrats from office that can’t seem to figure out how to get border communities and Border Patrol agents the funds they need to secure our homeland.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=dd7881bd76ce4452adba229aa3746078&_e=SjGH3EQJnvFBYSoU35ltCelDxCOlAGqKpR7b8c4K6GTJCwYWpHRWAb8geX-GIcVK6fpI0EyHXmgPEzSST1ZnmBkYiB4F-YnYFxVh53ac2SSMqh5ZOICrSkG4Uq7m_2NwMWrco9T8ex_PStAsraaypiu0-Q3SoTOCPxk0Bq8RamiBETBPa6OLZSySZBkgbE7aYQik-URRKFu3oyCuKTlN5H6Wdj8V-5UR6Di3uaDiN7-eNN8_kZEF6yU00yfgHZ6H7085bisMMfjKxZh1YCTDZsMKBYJM8JLH_62kcHP5hqqcEFUGW4BUpWcWOIUXzRaxbAaM01vSw1mqGXD0M778Y7I1HI1Ed2WI1E7ip9ACyVuv4EFASwWl734KC_Dw-Kctg95pFycBiJi-vtOpPQLOOw%3D%3D)**

Arizona’s border communities, our cities, and frankly our entire state is being made to feel that folks in New York City are more deserving of safe living spaces than those of us living in border communities.

**Frankly, it's outrageous.**

**[Please let me know if you can assist today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=dd7881bd76ce4452adba229aa3746078&_e=SjGH3EQJnvFBYSoU35ltCelDxCOlAGqKpR7b8c4K6GTJCwYWpHRWAb8geX-GIcVK6fpI0EyHXmgPEzSST1ZnmBkYiB4F-YnYFxVh53ac2SSMqh5ZOICrSkG4Uq7m_2NwMWrco9T8ex_PStAsraaypiu0-Q3SoTOCPxk0Bq8RamiBETBPa6OLZSySZBkgbE7aYQik-URRKFu3oyCuKTlN5H6Wdj8V-5UR6Di3uaDiN7-eNN8_kZEF6yU00yfgHZ6H-W5B6RqM0qxGI_JmuzFVqldwLF_C55gGcUb6hREFWu_797s7ndz4P01efse4v-wqaipu1ri-A8gbPdoQznF-lZL-ssKJQmm5armBlrUcyWeHGf6uxTjvxKJ8B9O_dSEx7bcdsrnSmBmZmoG_V7qqLg%3D%3D)** We cannot allow Democrats states to disproportionately benefit from federal aid money just because their members of Congress are in positions of power.

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: Why in the HELL would New York state be awarded $130 million for migrant containment efforts when states like Arizona bear the brunt of the illegal activity? | | $130 MILLION TO NEW YORK CITY TO MANAGE "MIGRANT CRISIS" Fellow Conservative, Our Southern Border is not secure and every member of the House and Senate, whether they want to admit it or not, knows it. There have been 2,310,987 border encounters in fiscal year 2023 so far; in 2022, there were 2,378,944! As Sheriff of Pinal County – Arizona’s 3rd largest – it’s up to me and my deputies to ensure the security of the communities under our jurisdiction. And unlike President Biden and Washington Democrats, I don’t play favorites. As I see it, every man, woman, and child deserve a safe community in which to live. Again, that’s my belief, and it’s not necessarily one that the President or the Senate majority leader share. IF THEY DID, $130 MILLION in federal aid wouldn’t have gone to New York City to help their city manage their own “migrant surge.” Think about it: New York doesn’t share a border with Mexico like Arizona does, so why would the Federal Emergency Management Agency funnel such a significant amount of cash to New York City? Well, probably because Chuck Schumer is from Brooklyn! Want to know something else Arizona doesn’t have that New York City does? Deep pocketed Democrat donors who aren’t used to migrants freely wondering into their upper crust communities uninvited. Meanwhile in Arizona where we’re bearing the brunt of illegal border encounters, along with New Mexico, Texas and California, we’ve received just $45 million from feds to help prevent overcrowding in migrant facilities. THIS IS AS WRONG AS WRONG GETS! to my Senate campaign because you, and everyone reading this right now, needs a law enforcement official who understands the true crisis we’re facing at our border as Arizona’s next U.S. Senator. I’m running for the United States Senate because every American family deserves to feel safe in their homes – not just New York City Democrats. If I had it my way, the border would be completely shut down. But without a Republican in the White Hour or a majority in the Senate, that’s currently not an option. Arizona’s border communities, our cities, and frankly our entire state is being made to feel that folks in New York City are more deserving of safe living spaces than those of us living in border communities. Frankly, it's outrageous. We cannot allow Democrats states to disproportionately benefit from federal aid money just because their members of Congress are in positions of power. Thank you, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media | | | ---|---|--- ../../../../../../../Desktop/Desktop/Mark Lamb/Templates/April Pelosi/www.alekfororegon.com Meet Sheriff Lamb: GOD. name: Gov. Gretchen Whitmer
subject: The progress we’ve made in Michigan and beyond
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
One year after the passage of the Inflation Reduction Act, economic progress in Michigan is everywhere. | | |
---
Hi, Peter -- it’s Gretchen Whitmer. I’m so proud to be working alongside President Biden and Vice President Harris as we fight for progress here in Michigan and beyond. We share a core belief: **that the economic wellbeing of hardworking Americans cannot just be a privilege for some -- it must be a priority for all.** Perhaps no legislation demonstrates that fight better than the _Inflation Reduction Act_ , which President Biden signed into law this time last year. Since then, we’ve seen the law’s benefits over and over again: It’s lowering the cost of prescription drugs. It’s securing good manufacturing jobs in our own communities. It’s spurring job creation and economic opportunity. I’m proud of the administration’s efforts to rebuild the economy and prioritize growing from the middle out and the bottom up -- so that hard-working families across the country have the opportunities they deserve to get ahead. But in order to keep building on the progress we’ve made, and to keep more money in the pockets of hard-working Americans, President Biden and Vice President Harris need your help. Can I count on you to pitch in $25 today so they can continue championing our families and communities for years to come?

subject: ☀️ CaucusRoom Weekend Edition
body:
What you missed this week. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-agujid-trhiujldw-yh/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-r/)
### ** Welcome to the Weekend Wrap Up! **

### **Here are the top articles that CaucusRoom members shared.**
* 442 reporters have **[lost their WH press credentials.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-y/)**
* **[Joe Biden wrote a letter](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-j/) **to Hunter's business partner.
* **[Pelosi thinks](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-t/)** impeachments are frivolous.
* People in Oregon can **[pump their own gas](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-i/)** now!
* **[Biden lied](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-d/) **to Gold Star Families.
* NYT asked people to **[compare Biden to an animal.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-h/)**
* Biden thinks there are **[NINE wonders of the world](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-k/).**
* **[Unlawful gun law](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-u/) **BLOCKED in Colorado!
* Biden admits **[he wanted to stop ALL oil drilling.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-o/)**
* **[Biden knows](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-x/) **who the cocaine belongs to.
* Jack Smith [**got a search warrant** ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-m/)for Trump's Twitter account.
* **[Biden is paying Iran](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-c/)** $6 Billion for American hostages.
* [**We have a date** ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-q/)for Trump's trial.

### **Special Counsel for Hunter**
AG Merrick **[Garland has appointed a special counsel](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-a/)** in the Hunter Biden Investigation. It is the same attorney that tried to give Hunter a sweetheart deal.
### **Experts Throw Cold Water on Claims**
Environmental**[experts are pushing back on claims that the devastating wildfires in Maui, Hawaii, were caused by global warming](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-f/), **instead pointing to poor state land management practices. **Biden Admits to Lying** Biden**[admitted that Democrats' signature Inflation Reduction Act wasn't as much about actually reducing the then-record-high inflation](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-z/) **facing the nation as he originally touted to the American people. [**Here For The Laughs**](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-v/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-e/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-s/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-g/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-w/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-agujid-trhiujldw-yd/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

clean_body: An indictment is looming. An indictment is looming. | | Friend, It's been reported that if I am unjustly indicted and arrested in the Atlanta Witch Hunt, a mugshot will be taken of me: Georgia sheriff on Trump probe: "We'll have a mugshot ready for you " [SOURCE: Axios] Atlanta has already begun setting up security barricades, shutting down roads surrounding the courthouse, and the Grand Jury is expected to reconvene. All signs indicate that a FOURTH SHAM INDICTMENT is on its way. The Left is trying their hardest to turn me - an innocent man - into a criminal, all while they are the true criminals, violating our rights and weaponizing the legal system to imprison their leading opposition. These are the same thugs who attempted to FRAME me as an agent of the Russian government. Keep in mind - they've had access to just about every single piece of paper I've ever laid a finger on... and yet, they still can't find a crime to pin me down for. If they can't find anything real after looking at my entire life under a microscope, then I must be one of the most honest people alive! The truth is: My only offense is opposing the Washington ruling class and standing up for the hardworking citizens of our country. And in the eyes of the Deep State, there is no greater offense than that... As a possible fourth sham indictment hangs over my head, I will continue our campaign to drain the corrupt Washington swamp and restore power to YOU, the American people. If you 're doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day. But if not, I don't have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now. | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Tue, August 8, 2023 Subject: BARRICADES AND ROAD CLOSURES To: /cdn-cgi/l/email-protection | Friend, I've been briefed on reports that Atlanta has begun setting up security barricades, shutting down roads surrounding the courthouse, and the Grand Jury is expected to reconvene. All signs indicate that your favorite president - whose only offense is challenging the political ruling class - may be INDICTED yet again as an innocent man. | [SOURCE: WSB-TV Atlanta] The prosecutor leading the witch hunt is so corrupt that even CNN (!!!) has called her out after she "intermixed her political fortunes with this case." Her bias was so terrible that she was REMOVED from one part of this witch hunt because of a "political conflict of interest" of her own creation. Do you think she's going to treat me fairly and put aside her extreme political biases? Not a chance! This is yet another political persecution of the ONLY candidate who can beat Crooked Joe and restore power to YOU, the American people. As I 've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way. And even as a possible fourth indictment hangs over my head, I will continue to stand in their way, because the fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It 's not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well - and I will NEVER let them take it from you. If you 're doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day. But if not, I don't have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now. | Thank you, | Donald J.
